#define BYTESTOBITS(x)          ((x)<<3)

#define CdSetFidDirentOffset(I,D)           ((I).LowPart = D)
#define CdFidIsDirectory(I)                 FlagOn( (I).LowPart, FID_DIR_MASK )
#define CdFidSetDirectory(I)                SetFlag( (I).LowPart, FID_DIR_MASK )

#define LONG2POINT(l, pt)    ((pt).x = (SHORT)LOWORD(l), (pt).y = (SHORT)HIWORD(l))

// shell\ext\cscui\pch.h
#define MAKEDWORDLONG(low,high) ((DWORDLONG)(((DWORD)(low)) | ((DWORDLONG)((DWORD)(high))) << 32))

#define ACTUAL_LENGTH(l) ((l) == NULL_PACKET_LENGTH ? 0 : (l)+1)

#define RESET_ATTR(Array, A)    ( (Array)[(A) / 32UL]  &= ~(1UL << ((A) % 32UL)) )

// drivers\video\ms\3dlabs\perm3\disp\dx\dcontext.h
#define STATESET_MASK(set, state)       \
        (set).bits[((state) - 1) >> DWORD_SHIFT]

#define STATESET_BIT(state)     (1 << (((state) - 1) & (DWORD_BITS - 1)))

#define STATESET_ISSET(set, state) \
        STATESET_MASK(set, state) & STATESET_BIT(state)

#define STATESET_SET(set, state) \
        STATESET_MASK(set, state) |= STATESET_BIT(state)

#define STATESET_CLEAR(set, state) \
        STATESET_MASK(set, state) &= ~STATESET_BIT(state)

#define STATESET_INIT(set)      memset(&(set), 0, sizeof(set))

#define TCP_DATA_OFFSET(h)          (((h)->OffsetAndFlags & 0x00F0) >> 2)

#define TCP_ALL_FLAGS(h)            ((h)->OffsetAndFlags & 0x3f00)
#define TCP_RESERVED_BITS(h)        ((h)->OffsetAndFlags & 0xc00f)

#define TCP_GET_DGRAM_PTR(p)    ((PUCHAR)(((ULONG *)(p)) + ((ULONG) TCP_GET_HLEN(p))))
#define UDP_GET_DGRAM_PTR(p)    ((PUCHAR)(p) + sizeof (UDP_HDR))

#define DCFLAG8(X)                     ((DCUINT8)  (1 << X))

#define DCFLAG32(X)                    ((DCUINT32) (1 << X))

#define DCFLAGN(X)                     ((DCUINT)   (1 << X))

                               ((rop) == 0x00) || ((rop) == 0xFF) )

// multimedia\dshow\filters\wav\audio\waveout\waveout.h

                   (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                   (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                   (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

// base\ntdll\ldrapi.c
#define ULONG_PTR_IZE_SHIFT_AND_MASK(_x, _shift, _mask) ((ULONG_PTR) ((ULONG_PTR_IZE((_x)) & (_mask)) << (_shift)))

#define MAKE_LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE(_type, _code) \
    ((ULONG_PTR) (ULONG_PTR_IZE_SHIFT_AND_MASK((_type), LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE_TYPE_BIT_OFFSET, LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE_TYPE_BIT_MASK) | \
                  ULONG_PTR_IZE_SHIFT_AND_MASK((HandleToUlong((NtCurrentTeb())->ClientId.UniqueThread)), LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE_TID_BIT_OFFSET, LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE_TID_BIT_MASK) | \
                  ULONG_PTR_IZE_SHIFT_AND_MASK((_code), LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE_CODE_BIT_OFFSET, LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE_CODE_BIT_MASK)))

#define EXTRACT_LOADER_LOCK_COOKIE_FIELD(_cookie, _shift, _mask) ((((ULONG_PTR) (_cookie)) >> (_shift)) & (_mask))

// base\ntdll\sxsp.h
#define HAS_ACTIVATION_CONTEXT_NOTIFICATION_BEEN_SENT(_pac, _nt) (((_pac)->SentNotifications[ACTIVATION_CONTEXT_NOTIFICATION_ ## _nt ## _INDEX] & ACTIVATION_CONTEXT_NOTIFICATION_ ## _nt ## _MASK) != 0)

#define RECORD_ACTIVATION_CONTEXT_NOTIFICATION_SENT(_pac, _nt) { (_pac)->SentNotifications[ACTIVATION_CONTEXT_NOTIFICATION_ ## _nt ## _INDEX] |= ACTIVATION_CONTEXT_NOTIFICATION_ ## _nt ## _MASK; }

// sdktools\asn1\asn1c\libasn1.h
#define ASN1BITSET(_val, _bitnr) \
    ((_val)[(_bitnr) >> 3] |= 0x80 >> ((_bitnr) & 7))

#define ASN1BITCLR(_val, _bitnr) \
    ((_val)[(_bitnr) >> 3] &= ~(0x80 >> ((_bitnr) & 7)))

#define ASN1BITTEST(_val, _bitnr) \
    ((_val)[(_bitnr) >> 3] & (0x80 >> ((_bitnr) & 7)))

// admin\activec\inc\classreg.h
#define DECLARE_MMC_CONTROL_REGISTRATION(                           \
	szModule,														\
    clsid,                                                          \
    szClassName,                                                    \
    szProgID,                                                       \
    szVersionIndependentProgID,                                     \
    libid,                                                          \
    szBitmapID,                                                     \
    szVersion)                                                      \
static HRESULT WINAPI UpdateRegistry(BOOL bRegister)                \
{                                                                   \
    CObjectRegParams op (											\
		clsid,														\
		szModule,													\
		szClassName,												\
		szProgID,													\
		szVersionIndependentProgID);								\
                                                                    \
    CControlRegParams cp (											\
		libid,														\
		szBitmapID,													\
		szVersion);													\
                                                                    \
    return (MMCUpdateRegistry (bRegister, &op, &cp));               \
}

#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_AUTOHIDESHOW (1 << 0)    // Automatically hide/show tri-pane window
#define HHWIN_PROP_ONTOP            (1 << 1)    // Top-most window
#define HHWIN_PROP_NOTITLEBAR       (1 << 2)    // no title bar
#define HHWIN_PROP_NODEF_STYLES     (1 << 3)    // no default window styles (only HH_WINTYPE.dwStyles)
#define HHWIN_PROP_NODEF_EXSTYLES   (1 << 4)    // no default extended window styles (only HH_WINTYPE.dwExStyles)
#define HHWIN_PROP_TRI_PANE         (1 << 5)    // use a tri-pane window
#define HHWIN_PROP_NOTB_TEXT        (1 << 6)    // no text on toolbar buttons
#define HHWIN_PROP_AUTO_SYNC        (1 << 8)    // automatically ssync contents and index
#define HHWIN_PROP_TRACKING         (1 << 9)    // send tracking notification messages
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_SEARCH       (1 << 10)   // include search tab in navigation pane
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_HISTORY      (1 << 11)   // include history tab in navigation pane
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_FAVORITES    (1 << 12)   // include favorites tab in navigation pane
#define HHWIN_PROP_CHANGE_TITLE     (1 << 13)   // Put current HTML title in title bar
#define HHWIN_PROP_NAV_ONLY_WIN     (1 << 14)   // Only display the navigation window
#define HHWIN_PROP_NO_TOOLBAR       (1 << 15)   // Don't display a toolbar
#define HHWIN_PROP_MENU             (1 << 16)   // Menu
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_ADVSEARCH    (1 << 17)   // Advanced FTS UI.
#define HHWIN_PROP_USER_POS         (1 << 18)   // After initial creation, user controls window size/position
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM1      (1 << 19)   // Use custom tab #1
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM2      (1 << 20)   // Use custom tab #2
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM3      (1 << 21)   // Use custom tab #3
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM4      (1 << 22)   // Use custom tab #4
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM5      (1 << 23)   // Use custom tab #5
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM6      (1 << 24)   // Use custom tab #6
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM7      (1 << 25)   // Use custom tab #7
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM8      (1 << 26)   // Use custom tab #8
#define HHWIN_PROP_TAB_CUSTOM9      (1 << 27)   // Use custom tab #9
#define HHWIN_TB_MARGIN             (1 << 28)   // the window type has a margin
#define HHWIN_PARAM_PROPERTIES      (1 << 1)    // valid fsWinProperties
#define HHWIN_PARAM_STYLES          (1 << 2)    // valid dwStyles
#define HHWIN_PARAM_EXSTYLES        (1 << 3)    // valid dwExStyles
#define HHWIN_PARAM_RECT            (1 << 4)    // valid rcWindowPos
#define HHWIN_PARAM_NAV_WIDTH       (1 << 5)    // valid iNavWidth
#define HHWIN_PARAM_SHOWSTATE       (1 << 6)    // valid nShowState
#define HHWIN_PARAM_INFOTYPES       (1 << 7)    // valid apInfoTypes
#define HHWIN_PARAM_TB_FLAGS        (1 << 8)    // valid fsToolBarFlags
#define HHWIN_PARAM_EXPANSION       (1 << 9)    // valid fNotExpanded
#define HHWIN_PARAM_TABPOS          (1 << 10)   // valid tabpos
#define HHWIN_PARAM_TABORDER        (1 << 11)   // valid taborder
#define HHWIN_PARAM_HISTORY_COUNT   (1 << 12)   // valid cHistory
#define HHWIN_PARAM_CUR_TAB         (1 << 13)   // valid curNavType
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_EXPAND         (1 << 1)    // Expand/contract button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_BACK           (1 << 2)    // Back button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_FORWARD        (1 << 3)    // Forward button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_STOP           (1 << 4)    // Stop button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_REFRESH        (1 << 5)    // Refresh button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_HOME           (1 << 6)    // Home button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_BROWSE_FWD     (1 << 7)    // not implemented
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_BROWSE_BCK     (1 << 8)    // not implemented
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_NOTES          (1 << 9)    // not implemented
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_CONTENTS       (1 << 10)   // not implemented
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_SYNC           (1 << 11)   // Sync button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_OPTIONS        (1 << 12)   // Options button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_PRINT          (1 << 13)   // Print button
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_INDEX          (1 << 14)   // not implemented
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_SEARCH         (1 << 15)   // not implemented
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_HISTORY        (1 << 16)   // not implemented
#define HHWIN_BUTTON_FAVORITES      (1 << 17)   // not implemented

    {                                                                                    \
        (AuditParameters).Parameters[(Index)].Type = SeAdtParmTypeAccessMask;            \
        (AuditParameters).Parameters[(Index)].Length = sizeof( ACCESS_MASK );            \
        (AuditParameters).Parameters[(Index)].Data[0] = (AccessMask);                    \
        (AuditParameters).Parameters[(Index)].Data[1] = (ObjectTypeIndex);               \
    }

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeg\jdcolor.c
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeg\jdhuff.c
#define HUFF_EXTEND(x,s)  ((x) < (1<<((s)-1)) ? (x) + (((-1)<<(s)) + 1) : (x))

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeg\jdmarker.c
#define INPUT_2BYTES(cinfo,V,action)  \
	MAKESTMT( MAKE_BYTE_AVAIL(cinfo,action); \
		  V = ((unsigned int) GETJOCTET(*next_input_byte++)) << 8; \
		  MAKE_BYTE_AVAIL(cinfo,action); \
		  V += GETJOCTET(*next_input_byte++); )

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeg\jdmerge.c
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeg\jdphuff.c
#define HUFF_EXTEND(x,s)  ((x) < (1<<((s)-1)) ? (x) + (((-1)<<(s)) + 1) : (x))

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeg\jidctfst.c
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
    ((ishift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
     (ishift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~((DCTELEM) 0)) << (DCTELEMBITS-(shft))) : \
     (ishift_temp >> (shft)))
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)	((x) >> (shft))
#define IDESCALE(x,n)  ((int) IRIGHT_SHIFT((x) + (1 << ((n)-1)), n))

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeg\jquant2.c
#define HIST_C0_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C0_BITS)
#define HIST_C1_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C1_BITS)
#define HIST_C2_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C2_BITS)
#define STEP_C0  ((1 << C0_SHIFT) * C0_SCALE)
#define STEP_C1  ((1 << C1_SHIFT) * C1_SCALE)
#define STEP_C2  ((1 << C2_SHIFT) * C2_SCALE)

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeginc\jdct.h
#define CONST_SCALE (ONE << CONST_BITS)
#define DESCALE(x,n)  RIGHT_SHIFT((x) + (ONE << ((n)-1)), n)

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeginc\jdhuff.h
#define BITREAD_SAVE_STATE(cinfop,permstate)  \
	cinfop->src->next_input_byte = br_state.next_input_byte; \
	cinfop->src->bytes_in_buffer = br_state.bytes_in_buffer; \
	cinfop->unread_marker = br_state.unread_marker; \
	permstate.get_buffer = get_buffer; \
	permstate.bits_left = bits_left
#define CHECK_BIT_BUFFER(state,nbits,action) \
	{ if (bits_left < (nbits)) {  \
	    if (! jpeg_fill_bit_buffer(&(state),get_buffer,bits_left,nbits))  \
	      { action; }  \
	    get_buffer = (state).get_buffer; bits_left = (state).bits_left; } }
#define GET_BITS(nbits) \
	(((int) (get_buffer >> (bits_left -= (nbits)))) & ((1<<(nbits))-1))
#define PEEK_BITS(nbits) \
	(((int) (get_buffer >> (bits_left -  (nbits)))) & ((1<<(nbits))-1))

// admin\darwin\src\handler\jpeginc\jpegint.h
#define RIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
	((shift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
	 (shift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~((INT32) 0)) << (32-(shft))) : \
	 (shift_temp >> (shft)))
#define RIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)	((x) >> (shft))

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\psglobal\pserr.h
#define PS_EXCEPTION_CANT_CONTINUE ((1 << 29) | 0x00000001)

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\fixmath.c
#define FRACT2FLOAT(x)  (float)((double)(x) / (double)(1L << 30))
#define FLOAT2FRACT(x)  ((Fract)(x * (1L << 30)))
#define FIX2FLOAT(x)  (((float)(x)/(float)(1L << 16)))
#define FLOAT2FIX(x)  ((Fixed)(x * (1L << 16)))

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\fnt.c
#define BIT0( t ) ( (t) & 0x01 )
#define BIT1( t ) ( (t) & 0x02 )
#define BIT2( t ) ( (t) & 0x04 )
#define BIT3( t ) ( (t) & 0x08 )
#define BIT4( t ) ( (t) & 0x10 )
#define BIT5( t ) ( (t) & 0x20 )
#define BIT6( t ) ( (t) & 0x40 )
#define BIT7( t ) ( (t) & 0x80 )
#define bitcount(a,count)     \
  {                           \
    count = 0;                \
    while (a)                 \
    {                         \
      a >>= 1;                \
      count++;                \
    }                         \
  }

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\fnt.h
#define VECTOR2FIX(a)                   ((Fixed) (a) << 2)
#define ONESIXTEENTHVECTOR              ((ONEVECTOR) >> 4)

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\fontmath.c
#define FASTDIV26LIMIT  (1L << 25)
#define OVFMASK(i)      ( ~0L ^ ( ((unsigned long)BIT(i)) - 1 ) )
#define CHKOVF(a,i,v)   (\
        ( ((a)[0] & OVFMASK(i))==0)          ? ( (v)>=0 ?(v) :POSINFINITY) : \
        ( ((a)[0] & OVFMASK(i))==OVFMASK(i)) ? ( (v)<=0 ?(v) :NEGINFINITY) : \
        ( ((a)[0] & BIT(31))                 ? POSINFINITY   :NEGINFINITY)   \
        )
#define GET32(a,i) \
((((a)[0]<<(32-(i))) | ((unsigned long)((a)[1])>>(i))) + !!((a)[1] & BIT((i)-1)))

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\fontmath.h
#define ONESHORTFRAC            (1 << 14)
#define FIXROUND( x )           (int16)((((Fixed) x) + FIXONEHALF) >> 16)

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\fscdefs.h
#define ONEFIX      ( 1L << 16 )
#define ONEFRAC     ( 1L << 30 )
#define HALFVECDIV  (1L << (ONEVECSHIFT-1))

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\fsglue.c
#define NORMALIZELIMIT  (135L << 16)
#define FRACT2FIX(n)    (((n) + (1 << (sizeof (Fract) - 3))) >> 14)

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\sc.c
#define MASK_INVPIX(mask,val)   mask = aulInvPixMask [val]
#define MASK_INVPIX(mask,val)   mask = ((uint32) 0x80000000L) >> (val)
#define MASK_OFF(x) ~aulMask [32-(x)]
#define MASK_ON(x)  (NEGONE >> (x))
#define MASK_OFF(x) (NEGONE << (x))
#define CLEARUpToAndSetLoOrder( x, lastBit, row, temp )                         \
{                                                                                                   \
        if (x >= lastBit)                                                               \
        {                                                                                   \
                *row++ = temp;                                                          \
                temp = 0;                                                               \
                lastBit += 32;                                                          \
        }                                                                                   \
        while (x >= lastBit)                                                            \
        {                                                                                   \
                *row++ = 0;                                                             \
                lastBit += 32;                                                          \
        }                                                                                   \
        temp |= MASK_ON (32 + x - lastBit);                                             \
}
#define SETUpToAndClearLoOrder( x, lastBit, row, temp )                         \
{                                                                                                   \
  if (x >= lastBit)              /*<4>*/                                        \
  {                                                                                             \
    *row++ = temp;                                                                          \
    temp = NEGONE;                                                                          \
    lastBit += 32;                                                                          \
  }                                                                                             \
  while (x >= lastBit)   /*<4>*/                                                    \
  {                                                                                             \
    *row++ = NEGONE;                                                                        \
    lastBit += 32;                                                                          \
  }                                                                                             \
     /* JJJ Peter BEGIN 11/06/90 */                     \
     /* temp &= (NEGONE << (lastBit - x));  */          \
        if ((lastBit - x) == 32)                        \
           temp &= 0x0;                                 \
        else                                            \
           temp &= MASK_OFF (lastBit - x);              \
     /* JJJ Peter END   11/06/90 */                     \
}
#define FILLONEROW( row, longsWide, line, lineWide, xMin )                      \
/* do a winding number fill of one row of a bitmap from two sorted arrays   \
of onTransitions and offTransitions.                                                \
*/                                                                                              \
{                                                                                               \
  register int16 moreOns, moreOffs;                                                     \
  register int16 *onTp, *offTp;                                                         \
  register uint32 temp;                                                                     \
  uint32 *rowEnd = row + longsWide;                                                     \
  int  windNbr, lastBit, on, off, x, stop;                                          \
                                                                                                    \
  lastBit = 32 + xMin;                                                                      \
  windNbr  = 0;                                                                                 \
  temp = 0;                                                                                     \
  moreOns = *line;                                                                              \
  onTp = line+1;                                                                                \
  offTp = line + lineWide - 1;                                                          \
  moreOffs = *offTp;                                                                            \
  offTp -= moreOffs;                                                                            \
                                                                                                    \
  on = *onTp ;                                                                                  \
  off = *offTp ;                                                                                \
  while (moreOns || moreOffs)                                                           \
  {                                                                                         \
        stop = 0 ;                                                                              \
      if (on < off)                                                                         \
      {                                                                                        \
          x = on ;                                                                              \
          stop = 1 ;                                                                            \
        }                                                                                           \
      if (on > off)                                                                         \
        {                                                                                           \
          x = off ;                                                                             \
          stop = -1 ;                                                                           \
        }                                                                                           \
                                                                                                    \
        if (stop)                                                                               \
        {                                                                                           \
            windNbr += stop ;                                                                   \
        if (windNbr == stop)                                                            \
             CLEARUpToAndSetLoOrder (x, lastBit, row, temp)                    \
        else                                                                                   \
                if (windNbr == 0)                                                           \
                SETUpToAndClearLoOrder (x, lastBit, row, temp)                  \
        }                                                                                           \
                                                                                                    \
        if (stop >= 0)                                                                          \
        {                                                                                           \
        --moreOns;                                                                         \
            if (moreOns)                                                                        \
           on = *(++onTp) ;                                                             \
            else                                                                                    \
                on = LARGENUM ;                                                             \
        }                                                                                           \
        if (stop <= 0)                                                                          \
        {                                                                                           \
        --moreOffs;                                                                        \
            if (moreOffs)                                                                       \
            off = *(++offTp) ;                                                          \
            else                                                                                    \
                off = LARGENUM ;                                                                \
       }                                                                                            \
  }                                                                                           \
  *row = temp;                                                                                  \
  while (++row < rowEnd) *row = 0;                                                      \
}
#define FILLONEROW( row, longsWide, line, lineWide, xMin )                      \
/* do a winding number fill of one row of a bitmap from two sorted arrays   \
of onTransitions and offTransitions.                                                \
*/                                                                                              \
{                                                                                               \
  register int16 moreOns, moreOffs;                                                     \
  register int16 *onTp, *offTp;                                                         \
  register uint32 temp;                                                                     \
  uint32 *rowEnd = row + longsWide;                                                     \
  int  windNbr, lastBit, on, off;                                                       \
                                                                                                    \
  lastBit = 32 + xMin;                                                                      \
  windNbr  = 0;                                                                                 \
  temp = 0;                                                                                     \
  moreOns = *line;                                                                              \
  onTp = line+1;                                                                                \
  offTp = line + lineWide - 1;                                                          \
  moreOffs = *offTp;                                                                            \
  offTp -= moreOffs;                                                                            \
                                                                                                    \
  while (moreOns || moreOffs)                                                           \
  {                                                                                         \
    if (moreOns)                                                                        \
    {                                                                                           \
      on = *onTp;                                                                       \
      if (moreOffs)                                                                         \
      {                                                                                         \
        off = *offTp;                                                                   \
        if (on < off)                                                                   \
        {                                                                                   \
          --moreOns;                                                                        \
          ++onTp;                                                                           \
          ++windNbr;                                                                        \
          if (windNbr == 1)                                                             \
              CLEARUpToAndSetLoOrder (on, lastBit, row, temp)                   \
          else                                                                              \
            if (windNbr == 0)                                                           \
              SETUpToAndClearLoOrder (on, lastBit, row, temp)                   \
        }                                                                                   \
        else if (on > off)                                                              \
        {                                                                                   \
          --moreOffs;                                                                       \
          ++offTp;                                                                          \
          --windNbr;                                                                        \
          if (windNbr == 0)                                                             \
            SETUpToAndClearLoOrder (off, lastBit, row, temp)                    \
          else                                                                              \
            if (windNbr == -1)                                                          \
              CLEARUpToAndSetLoOrder (off, lastBit, row, temp)                  \
        }                                                                                   \
        else                                                                            \
        {                                                                                   \
          --moreOns;                                                                        \
          ++onTp;                                                                           \
          --moreOffs;                                                                       \
          ++offTp;                                                                          \
        }                                                                                   \
      }                                                                                         \
      else                                 /* no more offs left */         \
      {                                                                                         \
        --moreOns;                                                                      \
        ++onTp;                                                                         \
        ++windNbr;                                                                      \
        if (windNbr == 1)                                                               \
          CLEARUpToAndSetLoOrder (on, lastBit, row, temp)                       \
        else                                                                                    \
          if (windNbr == 0)                                                             \
            SETUpToAndClearLoOrder (on, lastBit, row, temp)                 \
      }                                                                                         \
    }                                                                                           \
    else                                   /* no more ons left */          \
    {                                                                                           \
      off = *offTp;                                                                         \
      --moreOffs;                                                                       \
      ++offTp;                                                                                  \
      --windNbr;                                                                                \
      if (windNbr == 0)                                                                     \
        SETUpToAndClearLoOrder (off, lastBit, row, temp)                    \
      else                                                                                      \
        if (windNbr == -1)                                                              \
          CLEARUpToAndSetLoOrder (off, lastBit, row, temp)                  \
    }                                                                                           \
  }                                                                                         \
  *row = temp;                                                                                  \
  while (++row < rowEnd) *row = 0;                                                      \
}
#define RSH(a) (int16)(a>>PIXSHIFT)
#define LSH(a) ((int32)a<<PIXSHIFT)
#define     INTERIOR        (SCMR_Flags & F_INTERIOR)
#define HORIZ           (SCMR_Flags & F_V_LINEAR)
#define  VERT           (SCMR_Flags & F_H_LINEAR)
#define QUAD_1OR2   (SCMR_Flags & (F_Q1 | F_Q2))
#define QUAD_3OR4   (SCMR_Flags & (F_Q3 | F_Q4))
#define QUAD_2OR3   (SCMR_Flags & (F_Q2 | F_Q3))
#define QUAD_1OR4   (SCMR_Flags & (F_Q1 | F_Q4))
#define  QUAD_1     (SCMR_Flags & F_Q1)
#define  QUAD_2     (SCMR_Flags & F_Q2)
#define  QUAD_3     (SCMR_Flags & F_Q3)
#define  QUAD_4     (SCMR_Flags & F_Q4)
#define  QUADRANT_BITS              (F_Q1 | F_Q2 | F_Q3 | F_Q4)

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\bass\sfnt.c
#define BinaryIteration \
        newP = (uint16 FAR *) ((int8 FAR *)tableP + (range >>= 1)); \
        if (charCode > (uint16) SWAPW (*newP)) tableP = newP;

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\font\in_sfnt.c
#define FIXED2FLOAT(x)  (((float)(x)/(float)(1L << 16)) + (float)0.0005)
#define FLOAT2FIXED(x)  ((Fixed)(x * (1L << 16)))
#define FixToInt( x )   (int16)(((x) + 0x00008000) >> 16)

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\font\ry_font.c
#define  DE_EXPONENT(ff)                                    \
                ( (fix16) (  (F2L(ff) & 0x7FFFFFFF)         \
                             >> N_MANTISSA_BITS             \
                          )                                 \
                )

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\gei\geiio.h
#   define  GEIio_isok( f )         \
                ( GEIio_isopen(f)  &&  !((f)->f_flag & _F_ERR) )
#   define  GEIio_isreadable( f )   \
                ( GEIio_isok(f)  &&  (f)->f_flag & _O_RDONLY )
#   define  GEIio_iswriteable( f )  \
                ( GEIio_isok(f)  &&  (f)->f_flag & _O_WRONLY )
#   define  GEIio_eof( f )          \
                ( !GEIio_isopen(f)  ||  (f)->f_flag & _F_EOF )
#   define  GEIio_err( f )          \
                ( !GEIio_isopen(f)  ||  (f)->f_flag & _F_ERR )
#   define  GEIio_clearerr( f )     \
                {                                               \
                    if( GEIio_isopen(f) )                       \
                        ( (f)->f_flag &= ~(_F_EOF |_F_ERR) );   \
                }

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\gei\geipm.c
#define     SetAllDiff( setval )                    \
            (  memset( PMDiffBitmap,                \
                       setval? 0xFF : 0x00,         \
                       (MAXEEPROMSIZE + 7) / 8 )  )

#   define  MAJdev( dev )           ( ( 0xFF00 & (dev) ) >> 8 )
#   define  MAKEdev( major, minor ) ( (0xFF & (major))<<8 | (0xFF & (minor)) )
#   define _TT_O_CTRL_T     ( 00004 )   /* ^T pressed flag */

#define     GESevent_anypending()    ( GESeventword & GESeventmask )
#define     GESevent_setdoing(eid)      ( GESeventmask |=  (eid) )
#define     GESevent_setdone(eid)       ( GESeventmask &= ~(eid) )
#define     GESevent_isdoing(eid)       ( GESeventmask & (eid) )

#define LED_RAM         (1 << 1)        /* RAM Address and Data         */

#define LED_SERIAL      (1 << 4)        /* Serial port                  */
#define LED_COPROC      (1 << 5)        /* Coprocessor interface        */

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\graph\fillgb.c
#define WORDSWAP(lw) \
        (lw =  (lw << 16) | (lw >> 16))
#define SWORDSWAP(sw) \
        (sw =  (sw << 8) | (sw >> 8))
#define LWORDSWAP(lw) \
        (lw =  (lw << 24) | (lw >> 24) | \
                 ((lw >> 8) & 0x0000ff00) | ((lw << 8) & 0x00ff0000))
#define S2WORDSWAP(lw) \
        (lw = ((lw >> 8) & 0x00ff00ff) | ((lw << 8) & 0xff00ff00))
#define SWAPWORD(lw) (lw = (lw << 16) | (lw >> 16))

#define WORDSWAP(lw) \
        (lw =  (lw << 16) | (lw >> 16))
#define SWORDSWAP(sw) \
        (sw =  (sw << 8) | (sw >> 8))
#define LWORDSWAP(lw) \
        (lw =  (lw << 24) | (lw >> 24) | \
                 ((lw >> 8) & 0x0000ff00) | ((lw << 8) & 0x00ff0000))
#define S2WORDSWAP(lw) \
        (lw = ((lw >> 8) & 0x00ff00ff) | ((lw << 8) & 0xff00ff00))
#define SWAPWORD(lw) (lw = (lw << 16) | (lw >> 16))

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\graph\fillproc.h
#define MB_ENTRY(MB)   ((gmaddr) ((ufix32) MB << 20))
#define BMS_LEFT(BM,S) (BM << S)        /* shift a bitmap word left       */
#define BMS_RIGH(BM,S) (BM >> S)        /* shift a bitmap word right      */
#define GM_PBANK(G)    ((ufix16) ((ufix32) G >> 16))
#define WORD_ALLIGN(x)  (((x + BITSPERWORD -1) >> WORDPOWER) << WORDPOWER )

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\graph\graphics.h
#define ONE_SFX  (1L << S_SHIFT)        /* 1   in SF format representation */
#define HALF_SFX (ONE_SFX >> 1)         /* 0.5 in SF format representation */
#define ONE_LFX  (1L << L_SHIFT)        /* 1   in LF format representation */
#define HALF_LFX (ONE_LFX >> 1)         /* 0.5 in LF format representation */
#define HALF_L_S ((1L << L_S_DIFF)>> 1)/* the real half value of above number */
#define F2SFX(f)        ((sfix_t)((((lfix_t)((f) * 65536)) +  4096L) >> 13))
#define F2SFX12(f)      ((sfix_t)((((lfix_t)((f) * 65536)) +     8L) >>  4))
#define LFX2SFX(lfx)    ((sfix_t)(((lfx) +  4096L) >> 13))
#define LFX2I(lfx)      ((fix)   (((lfx) + 32768L) >> 16))      |* @you *|
#define SFX2LFX(s)      ((lfix_t)(s) << 13)
#define SFX2I(sfx)      ((fix)(((sfx) + 4) >> 3))               |* @you *|
#define I2LFX(i)        ((lfix_t)(i) << 16)
#define I2SFX(i)                ((i) << 3)              |* @I2SFX *|
#define LFX2SFX_T(lfx)  ((sfix_t)((lfx) >> 13) )
#define LFX2I_T(lfix)   ( (fix) ((lfix) >> 16) )    |* truncate to long fix  *|
#define SFX2I_T(sfix)   ( (fix) ((sfix) >>  3) )    |* truncate to short fix *|
#define F2SFX(f)    ((sfix_t)(((lfix_t)((f) * ONE_LFX) + HALF_L_S) >> L_S_DIFF))
#define F2SFX(f)    ((sfix_t)(((lfix_t)((f) * ONE_LFX) + HALF_L_S) >> L_S_DIFF))
#define LFX2SFX(lfx)    ((sfix_t)(((lfx) + 4096L) >> 13))
#define LFX2SFX(lfx)    ((sfix_t)(((lfx) + HALF_L_S) >> L_S_DIFF))
#define LFX2SFX(lfx)    ((sfix_t)(((lfx) + HALF_L_S) >> L_S_DIFF))
#define LFX2I(lfx)      ((fix)(((lfx) + HALF_LFX) >> L_SHIFT))
#define SFX2LFX(s)      ((lfix_t)(s) << L_S_DIFF)
#define SFX2LFX(s)      ((lfix_t)(s) << L_S_DIFF)
#define SFX2I(sfx)      ((fix)(((sfx) + HALF_SFX) >> S_SHIFT))
#define I2LFX(i)        ((lfix_t)(i) << L_SHIFT)
#define I2SFX(i)        ((i) << S_SHIFT)
#define LFX2SFX_T(lfx)  ((sfix_t)((lfx) >> L_S_DIFF))
#define LFX2SFX_T(lfx)  ((sfix_t)((lfx) >> L_S_DIFF))
#define LFX2I_T(lfix)   ((fix)((lfix) >> L_SHIFT))
#define SFX2I_T(sfix)   ((fix)((sfix) >> S_SHIFT))
#define I_OF_LFX(lfix)  ( (lfix) >> 16 )            |* take integer part     *|
#define I_OF_SFX(sfix)  ( (sfix) >> 3)              |* take integer part     *|
#define I_OF_LFX(lfix)  ((lfix) >> L_SHIFT)        /* take integer part */
#define F_OF_LFX(lfix)  ((lfix) & ((1L << L_SHIFT) - 1))
#define PF_BSIZE        (PF_HEIGHT * (PF_WIDTH >> WORDPOWER))
#define BM_PIXEL_MASK  ( (BM_PIXEL_WORD - 1))   /* mask for pixel from word   */
#define BM_ALIGN_MASK  (~(BM_PIXEL_WORD - 1))   /* mask for word alignment    */
#define BM_ALIGN(X)    (((X) & BM_ALIGN_MASK))  /* floor   word alignment     */
#define BM_BOUND(X)    (((X) + BM_PIXEL_MASK) & BM_ALIGN_MASK)
#define BM_FRONT(X)    (((X) | BM_PIXEL_MASK) + 1)
#define BM_LEFT_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix32) ((D) >> (S)))          /* @WIN */
#define BM_RIGH_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix32) ((D) << (S)))          /* @WIN */
#define BM_LEFT_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix32) ((D) << (S)))          /* @WIN */
#define BM_RIGH_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix32) ((D) >> (S)))          /* @WIN */
#define BM_P_MASK(C)                                                          \
                (BM_RIGH_SHIFT(BM_L_PIX, (C) & BM_PIXEL_MASK))  /* ----*---- */
#define BM_L_MASK(C)                                                          \
                (BM_RIGH_SHIFT(BM_BLACK, (C) & BM_PIXEL_MASK))  /* ----***** */
#define BM_R_MASK(C)                                                          \
                (BM_LEFT_SHIFT(BM_BLACK, (((C) ^ BM_PIXEL_MASK)               \
                                             & BM_PIXEL_MASK))) /* *****---- */
#define CC_PIXEL_MASK  ( (CC_PIXEL_WORD - 1))   /* mask for pixel from word  */
#define CC_ALIGN_MASK  (~(CC_PIXEL_WORD - 1))   /* mask for word alignment   */
#define CC_ALIGN(X)    (((X) & CC_ALIGN_MASK))  /* floor   word alignment    */
#define CC_BOUND(X)    (((X) + CC_PIXEL_MASK) & CC_ALIGN_MASK)
#define CC_FRONT(X)    (((X) | CC_PIXEL_MASK) + 1)
#define CC_LEFT_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix16) ((D) >> (S)))
#define CC_RIGH_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix16) ((D) << (S)))
#define SwapWord(S)     ((S) << 8 | (S) >> 8)
#define CC_LEFT_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                ((ufix16) SwapWord((ufix16)(SwapWord(D) << (S))))
#define CC_RIGH_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                ((ufix16) SwapWord((ufix16)(SwapWord(D) >> (S))))
#define CC_LEFT_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix16) ((D) << (S)))
#define CC_RIGH_SHIFT(D, S)                                             \
                       ((ufix16) ((D) >> (S)))
#define CC_P_MASK(C)                                                          \
                (CC_RIGH_SHIFT(CC_L_PIX, (C) & CC_PIXEL_MASK))  /* ----*---- */
#define CC_L_MASK(C)                                                          \
                (CC_RIGH_SHIFT(CC_BLACK, (C) & CC_PIXEL_MASK))  /* ----***** */
#define CC_R_MASK(C)                                                          \
                (CC_LEFT_SHIFT(CC_BLACK, (((C) ^ CC_PIXEL_MASK)               \
                                             & CC_PIXEL_MASK))) /* *****---- */

#define SHIFTER(x)      ShifterMask[x&0x1f]

#define LEFT_SHIFT(D, S) ((D) << (S))

#define ORSWAP(L)       ((ufix32) ((L) << 24) | ((L) >> 24) |            \
                (((L) << 8) & 0x00ff0000) | (((L) >> 8) & 0x0000ff00))
#define ANDNOTSWAP(L)   ((ufix32) ~(((L) << 24) | ((L) >> 24) |          \

#define     SYSOPREUBFD  (OPERATORTYPE | (EXECUTABLE << ATTRIBUTE_BIT))
#define     SYSPKAEUBFD  (PACKEDARRAYTYPE | (EXECUTABLE << ATTRIBUTE_BIT)
#define     SYSPKAERBFD  (PACKEDARRAYTYPE | (EXECUTABLE << ATTRIBUTE_BIT) | (READONLY << ACCESS_BIT))
#define     SYSDCTLRBFD  (DICTIONARYTYPE | (READONLY << ACCESS_BIT))
#define     SYSDCTEUBFD  (DICTIONARYTYPE | (EXECUTABLE << ATTRIBUTE_BIT))

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\lang\language.h
#define     TYPE_OP_SET(idx, var)\
            ( opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield =\
              (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield & TYPE_OFF) |\
              (var & TYPE_ON) )
#define     ATTRIBUTE_OP_SET(idx, var)\
            ( opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield =\
              (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield & ATTRIBUTE_OFF) |\
              ((ufix16)((var & ATTRIBUTE_ON) << ATTRIBUTE_BIT)) )
#define     ROM_RAM_OP_SET(idx, var)\
            ( opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield =\
              (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield & ROM_RAM_OFF) |\
              ((var & ROM_RAM_ON) << ROM_RAM_BIT) )
#define     LEVEL_OP_SET(idx, var)\
            ( opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield =\
              (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield & LEVEL_OFF) |\
              ((var & LEVEL_ON) << LEVEL_BIT) )
#define     ACCESS_OP_SET(idx, var)\
            ( opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield =\
              (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield & ACCESS_OFF) |\
              ((var & ACCESS_ON) << ACCESS_BIT) )
#define     TYPE_OP(idx)\
            ( opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield & TYPE_ON )
#define     ATTRIBUTE_OP(idx)\
            ( (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield >> ATTRIBUTE_BIT) & ATTRIBUTE_ON )
#define     ROM_RAM_OP(idx)\
            ( (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield >> ROM_RAM_BIT) & ROM_RAM_ON )
#define     LEVEL_OP(idx)\
            ( (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield >> LEVEL_BIT) & LEVEL_ON )
#define     ACCESS_OP(idx)\
            ( (opnstack[opnstktop - (idx+1)].bitfield >> ACCESS_BIT) & ACCESS_ON )

// admin\netui\macprint\pstodib\ti\src\win\trueim.h
#define     TYPE(obj)\
            ((obj)->bitfield & TYPE_ON)
#define     ATTRIBUTE_SET(obj, var)\
            ((obj)->bitfield =\
             ((obj)->bitfield & ATTRIBUTE_OFF) | (((var) & ATTRIBUTE_ON) << ATTRIBUTE_BIT))

                                   _GetAccountName(flag),       \
                                   c_wzGlobalGroupClass));      \

#define Begin_Service_Table(device, seg) \
    enum device##_SERVICES { \
    device##_dummy = (device##_DEVICE_ID << 16) - 1,
#define VxDCall(service) \
    _asm _emit 0xcd \
    _asm _emit 0x20 \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) & 0xff) \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 8) & 0xff \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 16) & 0xff \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 24) & 0xff \
#define VxDJmp(service) \
    _asm _emit 0xcd \
    _asm _emit 0x20 \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) & 0xff) \
    _asm _emit ((GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 8) & 0xff) | 0x80 \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 16) & 0xff \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 24) & 0xff \

#define NdrFcLong(s)    (unsigned char)(s >> 24), (unsigned char)((s & 0x00ff0000) >> 16), \
                        (unsigned char)((s & 0x0000ff00) >> 8), (unsigned char)(s & 0xff)

#define NdrFcLong(s)    (unsigned char)(s & 0xff), (unsigned char)((s & 0x0000ff00) >> 8), \
                        (unsigned char)((s & 0x00ff0000) >> 16), (unsigned char)(s >> 24)

#define IS_ARRAY(FC)           (_FC_FLAGS(FC) & _ARRAY_)
#define IS_UNION(FC)           (_FC_FLAGS(FC) & _UNION_)
#define IS_STRING(FC)          (_FC_FLAGS(FC) & _STRING_)
#define IS_ARRAY_OR_STRING(FC) (_FC_FLAGS(FC) & (_STRING_ | _ARRAY_))

// com\mobile\sens\conn\senssvc\event.cxx
#define FIRE_PNP_EVENT(_EVENT_NAME_)                                            \
{                                                                               \
    PSENSEVENT_PNP pData = (PSENSEVENT_PNP)EventData;                           \
                                                                                \
    SensPrint(SENS_INFO, (SENS_STRING("\t|            PNP Event\n")));          \
    SensPrint(SENS_INFO, (SENS_STRING("\t|\n\t|                 Type  -  DEVICE %s\n"), _EVENT_NAME_)); \
    SensPrint(SENS_INFO, (SENS_STRING("\t|                 Size  -  %d\n"), pData->Size));            \
    SensPrint(SENS_INFO, (SENS_STRING("\t|              DevType  -  %d\n"), pData->DevType));         \
    SensPrint(SENS_INFO, (SENS_STRING("\t|             Resource  -  0x%x\n"), pData->Resource));      \
    SensPrint(SENS_INFO, (SENS_STRING("\t|                Flags  -  0x%x\n"), pData->Flags));         \
                                                                                \
    break;                                                                      \
}

// com\mobile\syncmgr\test\brfhndlr\rover\filesync\syncui\inc\vmm.h
#define Begin_Service_Table(device, seg) \
    enum device##_SERVICES { \
    device##_dummy = (device##_DEVICE_ID << 16) - 1,
#define VxDCall(service) \
    _asm _emit 0xcd \
    _asm _emit 0x20 \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) & 0xff) \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 8) & 0xff \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 16) & 0xff \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 24) & 0xff \
#define VxDJmp(service) \
    _asm _emit 0xcd \
    _asm _emit 0x20 \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) & 0xff) \
    _asm _emit ((GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 8) & 0xff) | 0x80 \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 16) & 0xff \
    _asm _emit (GetVxDServiceOrdinal(service) >> 24) & 0xff \
#define VMSTAT_EXCLUSIVE        (1L << VMSTAT_EXCLUSIVE_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_BACKGROUND       (1L << VMSTAT_BACKGROUND_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_CREATING         (1L << VMSTAT_CREATING_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_SUSPENDED        (1L << VMSTAT_SUSPENDED_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_NOT_EXECUTEABLE  (1L << VMSTAT_NOT_EXECUTEABLE_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_PM_EXEC          (1L << VMSTAT_PM_EXEC_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_PM_APP           (1L << VMSTAT_PM_APP_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_PM_USE32         (1L << VMSTAT_PM_USE32_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_VXD_EXEC         (1L << VMSTAT_VXD_EXEC_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_HIGH_PRI_BACK    (1L << VMSTAT_HIGH_PRI_BACK_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_BLOCKED          (1L << VMSTAT_BLOCKED_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_AWAKENING        (1L << VMSTAT_AWAKENING_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_PAGEABLEV86      (1L << VMSTAT_PAGEABLEV86BIT)
#define VMSTAT_V86INTSLOCKED    (1L << VMSTAT_V86INTSLOCKEDBIT)
#define VMSTAT_IDLE_TIMEOUT     (1L << VMSTAT_IDLE_TIMEOUT_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_IDLE             (1L << VMSTAT_IDLE_BIT)
#define VMSTAT_CLOSING          (1L << VMSTAT_CLOSING_BIT)

    ((SCODE) (((unsigned long)(sev)<<31) | ((unsigned long)(fac)<<16) | \
              ((unsigned long)(code))) )

EXTERN_C unsigned long comp##InfoLevel;					     \

void comp##InlineDebugOut(unsigned long fDebugMask, char const *pszfmt, ...);

        (((oskind) << 16) | ((minor) << 8) | (major))
#define PROPSETVER_CURRENT \
    MAKEPSVER(CURRENT_OSKIND, CURRENT_OSVER >> 8, CURRENT_OSVER & 0xff)

    ((((cf) & ~(STGC_OVERWRITE | STGC_ONLYIFCURRENT | \
                STGC_DANGEROUSLYCOMMITMERELYTODISKCACHE)) == 0) ? S_OK : \
     STG_E_INVALIDFLAG)

    #define CRC_CALC(X,Y) ibCrcIndex = (BYTE) ((X ^ Y) & 0x000000FFL); \
                          X = ((X >> 8) & 0x00FFFFFFL) ^ aulCrc[ibCrcIndex]

// com\oleutest\balls\oleprx32\proxy\transmit.h
#define REMOTE_CALL( Flags) ((USER_CALL_CTXT_MASK(Flags) == MSHCTX_DIFFERENTMACHINE) \
                          || (USER_CALL_CTXT_MASK(Flags) == MSHCTX_NOSHAREDMEM))

// com\oleutest\letest\gizmobar\gizmo.h
#define BITPOSITION(i, j)  {int k=i; for (j=0; k>>=1; j++);}
#define POSITIONBIT(i)     (1 << i)

// com\oleutest\letest\ole2ui\olestd.h
#define OleStdGetDropEffect(grfKeyState)    \
    ( (grfKeyState & MK_CONTROL) ?          \
        ( (grfKeyState & MK_SHIFT) ? DROPEFFECT_LINK : DROPEFFECT_COPY ) :  \
        ( (grfKeyState & MK_SHIFT) ? DROPEFFECT_MOVE : 0 ) )

// com\oleutest\stgbvt\ctolestg\common\inc\getmach.hxx
#define GM_PROTO_WORD(a)   (a >> 16)

// com\oleutest\stgbvt\ctolestg\common\inc\util.hxx
#define CRC_CALC(X,Y)                                       \
    {                                                       \
        register BYTE ibCrcIndex;                           \
        ibCrcIndex = (BYTE) ((X ^ Y) & 0x000000FFL);        \
        X = ((X >> 8) & 0x00FFFFFFL) ^ aulCrc[ibCrcIndex];  \
    }
#define MUNGECRC(a,b)                               \
{                                                   \
    for (int i=0; i < sizeof(b); i++)               \
    {                                               \
        CRC_CALC(a, (BYTE)((b >> (i<<3)) & 0xff));  \
    }                                               \
}

    #define B2  (1<<1)
    #define B3  (1<<2)

    #define B6  (1<<5)
    #define B7  (1<<6)
    #define B32 (1<<31)

#define ZZM     (1 << 1)
#define ZCZ     (1 << 2)
#define ZCM     (1 << 3)
#define AZZ     (1 << 4)

#define ACZ     (1 << 6)
#define ACM     (1 << 7)

// com\rpc\midl\front\gramutil.hxx
#define SET_ATTRIB(x,att)   (x = x | att)
#define SET_TYPE(x,type)    (x = x | (type << 4 ))
#define SET_SIZE(x,size)    (x = x | (size << 8))
#define SET_SIGN(x,sign)    (x = x | (sign << 12))
#define GET_TYPE(x)         ((x & 0x00f0) >> 4)
#define GET_SIZE(x)         ((x & 0x0f00) >> 8)
#define GET_SIGN(x)         ((x & 0xf000) >> 12)
#define MAKE_TYPE_SPEC(sign,size,type, attrib) ((sign << 12) | (size << 8) | (type << 4) | attrib)

#define PF_MMASK		(PF_ACVMOD | PF_AEMPTY)

#define PF_ISMODIFIER	((ParseFlags & PF_MMASK) != 0)
#define PF_ISEMPTY		((ParseFlags & PF_AEMPTY) != 0)
#define PF_INRPC		(ParseFlags & PF_RPC)
#define PF_SET(a)		(ParseFlags |= (a))
#define PF_CLEAR(a)		(ParseFlags &= (~(a)))
#define PF_LOOKFORTYPENAME ((ParseFlags & PF_ATYPE) == 0)

                    ((Flags) & Oi_IGNORE_OBJECT_EXCEPTION_HANDLING)

#define NDR64_IS_ARRAY(FC)           (Ndr64TypeFlags[(FC)] & _ARRAY_)

#define NDR64_IS_HANDLE(FC)          (Ndr64TypeFlags[(FC)] & _HANDLE_)

#define NDR64_SET_CONF_MARK_VALID( f )                ( ( f ) |= NDR64_CONF_MARK_VALID_FLAG )
#define NDR64_RESET_CONF_MARK_VALID( f )              ( ( f ) &= ~NDR64_CONF_MARK_VALID_FLAG )
#define NDR64_IS_VAR_MARK_VALID( f )                  ( ( f ) &  NDR64_VAR_MARK_VALID_FLAG )
#define NDR64_SET_VAR_MARK_VALID( f )                 ( ( f ) |= NDR64_VAR_MARK_VALID_FLAG )
#define NDR64_RESET_VAR_MARK_VALID( f )               ( ( f ) &= ~NDR64_VAR_MARK_VALID_FLAG )
#define NDR64_IS_NEW_EMBEDDED_ALLOCATION( f )         ( ( f ) & NDR64_NEW_EMBEDDED_ALLOCATION_FLAG )
#define NDR64_SET_NEW_EMBEDDED_ALLOCATION( f )        ( ( f ) |= NDR64_NEW_EMBEDDED_ALLOCATION_FLAG )
#define NDR64_RESET_IS_NEW_EMBEDDED_ALLOCATION( f )   ( ( f ) &= ~NDR64_NEW_EMBEDDED_ALLOCATION_FLAG )
#define NDR64_IS_WALKIP( f )        ( ( f ) & NDR64_WALKIP_FLAG )
#define NDR64_SET_WALKIP( f )       ( ( f ) |= NDR64_WALKIP_FLAG )
#define NDR64_RESET_WALKIP( f )     ( ( f ) &= ~NDR64_WALKIP_FLAG )
#define NDR64_IS_SKIP_REF_CHECK( f ) ( ( f ) & NDR64_SKIP_REF_CHECK_FLAG )
#define NDR64_SET_SKIP_REF_CHECK( f ) ( ( f ) |= NDR64_SKIP_REF_CHECK_FLAG )
#define NDR64_RESET_SKIP_REF_CHECK( f ) ( ( f ) &= ~NDR64_SKIP_REF_CHECK_FLAG )
#define NDR64_RESET_EMBEDDED_FLAGS_TO_STANDALONE( f )      \
    ( ( f ) &= ~ ( NDR64_NEW_EMBEDDED_ALLOCATION_FLAG |    \
                   NDR64_CONF_MARK_VALID_FLAG |            \
                   NDR64_VAR_MARK_VALID_FLAG  ) )

void FORMAT_PRINTER::HANDLE_##type() { \
   dout << #type "\n";                      \
   FormatString.IncUCHAR();                 \
}                                           \

// com\rpc\ndrexts\ndrexts\print.hxx
#define ABORT( exp )                                                 \
{                                                                    \
    ostringstream err;                                               \
    err << exp;                                                      \
    throw exception(err.str().c_str());                              \
}

// com\rpc\runtime\epmap\local.h
#define MAKEGLOBALIFOBJID(x)  ( ( ((x-1) % MAXIFOBJID) << 24 ) & 0xFF000000L )
#define VERSION(x,y)  ( ((0x0000FFFFL & x)<<16) | (y) )

// com\rpc\runtime\mtrt\dgpkt.hxx
#define MAX_WINDOW_SIZE (CHAR_BIT * sizeof(unsigned))

#define DG_EE_MAGIC_VALUE  ('M' + (('S' + (('E' + ('E' << 8)) << 8)) << 8))

// com\rpc\runtime\mtrt\dgsvr.hxx
#define  CBI_SEQUENCE_MASK  (~((1 << CBI_SEQUENCE_SHIFT) - 1))

// com\rpc\runtime\mtrt\dumpcert.cxx
#define ByteSwapShort(Value) \
    Value = (  (((Value) & 0x00FF) << 8) \
             | (((Value) & 0xFF00) >> 8))

// com\rpc\runtime\mtrt\handle.hxx
#define PARTIAL(_Message) ((_Message)->RpcFlags & RPC_BUFFER_PARTIAL)
#define EXTRA(_Message) ((_Message)->RpcFlags & RPC_BUFFER_EXTRA)
#define ASYNC(_Message) ((_Message)->RpcFlags & RPC_BUFFER_ASYNC)
#define COMPLETE(_Message) ((_Message)->RpcFlags & RPC_BUFFER_COMPLETE)
#define NOTIFY(_Message) (!((_Message)->RpcFlags & RPC_BUFFER_NONOTIFY))
#define NONSYNC(_Message) ((_Message)->RpcFlags & \
                                        (RPC_BUFFER_ASYNC | RPC_BUFFER_PARTIAL))

// com\rpc\runtime\mtrt\lpcpack.hxx
#define MAX_LRPC_CONTEXTS ((PORT_MAXIMUM_MESSAGE_LENGTH - sizeof(LRPC_BIND_MESSAGE)) / sizeof(DWORD))

// com\rpc\runtime\mtrt\osfpcket.hxx
#define DataConvertEndian(drep) \
    ( (drep[0] & NDR_DREP_ENDIAN_MASK) != NDR_LOCAL_INT_DREP )
#define DataConvertCharacter(drep) \
    ( (drep[0] & NDR_DREP_CHARACTER_MASK) != NDR_LOCAL_CHAR_DREP)

#define MAKE_TEST_HOOK_ID( major, minor ) ( ((major) << 16) | (minor) )

#define PLEVEL(i) (((i)>>4)&077)
#define TYPE(i)  ((i>>10)&077)
#define SETPLEV(i,j) i |= (j<<4)
#define SETTYPE(i,j) i |= (j<<10)

#define TRK_DEBUG_FLAGS_DEFAULT             TRKDBG_ERROR // (0xFFFFFFFF & ~TRKDBG_WORKMAN) == 0xff7fffff

// com\svcdlls\trksvcs\common\trklib.hxx

#define HIGH_BYTE(word)   ( (BYTE) (word >> 8) )

#define AsLSHL(a, b) ((DWORD)((DWORD)(a) << (DWORD)(b)))
#define AsULSHR(a, b) ((DWORD)((DWORD)(a) >> (DWORD)(b)))
#define PITCH(x)                        ((DWORD)((x) * (double) (1L << 19) / FSAMP))

// drivers\filters\sgdma\hw.h
#define DMA_HW_ALIGN(Bytes) ((Bytes) >> 10)
#define SgDmaHwMakeValidTx(TxEntry, Pfn) \
    ((TxEntry)->AsULONGLONG = ((Pfn) << 1) | 1)

// drivers\input\pnpi8042\i8042prt.h
#define FE_SUBTYPE(SubType,OemId) ((SubType)|((OemId<<4)))
#define MOUSE_SIGN_OVERFLOW_MASK (X_DATA_SIGN | Y_DATA_SIGN | X_OVERFLOW | Y_OVERFLOW)
#define TEST_HARDWARE_PRESENT(bits)         \
 ((Globals.ControllerData->HardwarePresent & (bits)) == (bits))
#define CLEAR_HW_FLAGS(bits) (Globals.ControllerData->HardwarePresent &= ~(bits))
#define SET_HW_FLAGS(bits) (Globals.ControllerData->HardwarePresent |= (bits))
#define CLEAR_MOUSE_PRESENT() CLEAR_HW_FLAGS(MOUSE_HARDWARE_INITIALIZED | MOUSE_HARDWARE_PRESENT | WHEELMOUSE_HARDWARE_PRESENT)
#define CLEAR_KEYBOARD_PRESENT() CLEAR_HW_FLAGS(KEYBOARD_HARDWARE_INITIALIZED | KEYBOARD_HARDWARE_PRESENT)
#define MOU_POWER_FLAGS             (MOU_POWERED_DOWN       |   \
                                     MOU_POWERED_UP_STARTED |   \
                                     MOU_POWERED_UP_SUCCESS)
#define KBD_POWER_FLAGS             (KBD_POWERED_DOWN       |   \
                                     KBD_POWERED_UP_STARTED |   \
                                     KBD_POWERED_UP_SUCCESS)
#define SET_PWR_FLAGS(bits)     (Globals.PowerFlags |= (bits))
#define CMP_PWR_FLAGS(bits)     ((Globals.PowerFlags & (bits)) == (bits))
#define TEST_PWR_FLAGS(bits)    (Globals.PowerFlags & (bits))
#define A_POWERED_UP_SUCCEEDED() \
            TEST_PWR_FLAGS(KBD_POWERED_UP_SUCCESS | MOU_POWERED_UP_SUCCESS)
#define MANUALLY_REMOVED(ext) ((ext)->PnpDeviceState & PNP_DEVICE_REMOVED)
#define RECORD_ISR_STATE(devExt, byte, lastbyte, time)                  \
    if ((devExt->RecordHistoryFlags & devExt->RecordHistoryState)) {    \
        if (CurrentIsrState >= IsrStateHistoryEnd) {                    \
            CurrentIsrState = IsrStateHistory;                          \
            RtlFillMemory(CurrentIsrState, sizeof(MOUSE_STATE_RECORD), 0x88);  \
            CurrentIsrState++;                                          \
        }                                                               \
        CurrentIsrState->InputState = (USHORT) devExt->InputState;      \
        CurrentIsrState->InputResetSubState = (USHORT) devExt->InputResetSubState;    \
        CurrentIsrState->Byte = byte;                                   \
        CurrentIsrState->LastByte = lastbyte;                           \
        CurrentIsrState->Time = time;                                   \
        CurrentIsrState++;                                              \
    }
#define RECORD_ISR_STATE_COMMAND(devExt, command)                     \
    if ((devExt->RecordHistoryFlags & devExt->RecordHistoryState))    \
            CurrentIsrState->Command = command;
#define RECORD_ISR_STATE_TRANSITION(devExt, state)                          \
    if ((devExt->RecordHistoryFlags & devExt->RecordHistoryState)) {        \
        if (CurrentIsrState >= IsrStateHistoryEnd) CurrentIsrState = IsrStateHistory; \
        RtlFillMemory(CurrentIsrState, sizeof(MOUSE_STATE_RECORD), 0xFF);   \
        CurrentIsrState->Time.LowPart  = state;                             \
        CurrentIsrState++;                                                  \
    }
#define SET_RECORD_FLAGS(devExt, flags) if (IsrStateHistory) devExt->RecordHistoryFlags |= (flags)
#define CLEAR_RECORD_FLAGS(devExt, flags) devExt->RecordHistoryFlags &= ~(flags)

// drivers\ksfilter\inc\fakeks.h
#define IOCTL_KS_WRITE_PACKETSTREAM    CTL_CODE(FILE_DEVICE_KS, 0x007, METHOD_NEITHER, FILE_WRITE_ACCESS | FILE_READ_ACCESS)
#define IOCTL_KS_READ_PACKETSTREAM     CTL_CODE(FILE_DEVICE_KS, 0x008, METHOD_NEITHER, FILE_WRITE_ACCESS | FILE_READ_ACCESS)

// drivers\ksfilter\ks\kdexts\kskdx.h
#define XTN_DUMPGUID(text,tab,guid) \
   if (!text [0])\
       dprintf ("%s%08lx-%04x-%04x-%02x%02x-%02x%02x%08lx\n", \
       Tab (tab), \
       *(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 0), \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 2), \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 3), \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 4) & 0xFF, \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 4) >> 8, \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 5) & 0xFF, \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 5) >> 8, \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF) << 24 | \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF00) << 8 | \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF0000) >> 8 | \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF000000) >> 24); \
   else \
       dprintf ("%s%s %08lx-%04x-%04x-%02x%02x-%02x%02x%08lx\n", \
       Tab (tab), \
       text, \
       *(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 0), \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 2), \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 3), \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 4) & 0xFF, \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 4) >> 8, \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 5) & 0xFF, \
       *(((USHORT *)&(guid)) + 5) >> 8, \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF) << 24 | \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF00) << 8 | \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF0000) >> 8 | \
       ((*(((ULONG *)&(guid)) + 3)) & 0xFF000000) >> 24)

// drivers\ksfilter\ks\ksp.h
#define KspMutexIsAcquired(m)\
    ((m)->Header.SignalState != 1)

// drivers\ksfilter\ks\shmisc.cpp
#define FCC(ch4) ((((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF) << 24) |     \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

// drivers\ksfilter\ksdsp\epd\loader.c
#define C4ToNum(_c4_,_n_) (_n_) = ( ((_c4_)[3]      ) \
                                  | ((_c4_)[2] << 8 ) \
                                  | ((_c4_)[1] << 16) \
                                  | ((_c4_)[0] << 24) )
#define C3ToNum(_c4_,_n_) (_n_) = ( ((_c4_)[2]      ) \
                                  | ((_c4_)[1] << 8 ) \
                                  | ((_c4_)[0] << 16) )
#define C2ToNum(_c4_,_n_) (_n_) = ( ((_c4_)[1]      ) \
                                  | ((_c4_)[0] << 8 ) )
#define NumToC4(_n_,_c4_) { (_c4_)[3] = (BYTE)(((_n_)      ) & 0xff); \
                            (_c4_)[2] = (BYTE)(((_n_) >>  8) & 0xff); \
                            (_c4_)[1] = (BYTE)(((_n_) >> 16) & 0xff); \
                            (_c4_)[0] = (BYTE)(((_n_) >> 24) & 0xff); \
                          }

// drivers\ksfilter\ksdsp\epd\private.h
#define SetDspIrq(x)    MMIO(x,IPENDING) = 1 << IRQ_ID_HOST

// drivers\ksfilter\ksdsp\inc\tm\mmio.h
#define ISETTING(_n_)           (0x100810 + (_n_<<2))
#define INTVEC(_n_)             (0x100880 + (_n_<<2))

// drivers\ksfilter\miniport\msg711\msg711.cpp
#define PCM_BLOCKALIGNMENT(pwf)     (UINT)(((pwf)->wBitsPerSample >> 3) << ((pwf)->wf.nChannels >> 1))

// drivers\ksfilter\mskssrv\mskssrv.c
#define FCC(ch4) ((((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF) << 24) |     \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

// drivers\ksfilter\tests\avshws\avshws.h
#define mmioFOURCC( ch0, ch1, ch2, ch3 )                \
        ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8 ) |    \
        ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16 ) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ) )

// drivers\ksfilter\tests\avstest\avssamp.h
#define mmioFOURCC( ch0, ch1, ch2, ch3 )                \
        ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8 ) |    \
        ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16 ) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ) )

// drivers\net\irda\mknet\sys\mk7.h
#define B_GANA_SEL01		0x0003		// Bits 0 (SEL0) & 1 (SEL1)
#define	RINGSIZE_RX4			(RINGSIZE_4  << 8)
#define	RINGSIZE_RX8			(RINGSIZE_8  << 8)
#define	RINGSIZE_RX16			(RINGSIZE_16 << 8)
#define	RINGSIZE_RX32			(RINGSIZE_32 << 8)
#define	RINGSIZE_RX64			(RINGSIZE_64 << 8)
#define	RINGSIZE_TX4			(RINGSIZE_4  << 12)
#define	RINGSIZE_TX8			(RINGSIZE_8  << 12)
#define	RINGSIZE_TX16			(RINGSIZE_16 << 12)
#define	RINGSIZE_TX32			(RINGSIZE_32 << 12)
#define	RINGSIZE_TX64			(RINGSIZE_64 << 12)
#define HW_SIR_SPEED_2400		((47<<10) |  (12<<5))
#define HW_SIR_SPEED_9600		((11<<10) |  (12<<5))
#define HW_SIR_SPEED_19200		((5<<10)  |  (12<<5))
#define HW_SIR_SPEED_38400		((2<<10)  |  (12<<5))
#define HW_SIR_SPEED_57600		((1<<10)  |  (12<<5))
#define HW_SIR_SPEED_115200		((12<<5))
#define	HW_MIR_SPEED_576000		((1<<10)  |  (16<<5))
#define	HW_MIR_SPEED_1152000	((8<<5))

// drivers\net\irda\mknet\sys\queue.h
#define PMK7_RESERVED_FROM_PACKET(_Packet) \
	((PMK7_RESERVED)((_Packet)->MiniportReserved))
#define EnqueuePacket(_Head, _Tail, _Packet)		   		\
{													   		\
	if (!_Head) {									   		\
		_Head = _Packet;							   		\
	} else {										   		\
		PMK7_RESERVED_FROM_PACKET(_Tail)->Next = _Packet;	\
	}												   		\
	PMK7_RESERVED_FROM_PACKET(_Packet)->Next = NULL;   		\
	_Tail = _Packet;								   		\
}
#define DequeuePacket(Head, Tail)						\
{													 	\
	PMK7_RESERVED Reserved =						  	\
		PMK7_RESERVED_FROM_PACKET(Head);				\
	if (!Reserved->Next) {							   	\
		Tail = NULL;									\
	}												   	\
	Head = Reserved->Next;							   	\
}

// drivers\net\irda\mknet\sys\wincomm.h
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_2400       (UINT)(0 << 0)	// Not supported
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_9600       (UINT)(1 << 1)

        (dataLen) * 2 + (MAX_NUM_EXTRA_BOFS + 1) *								\
        SLOW_IR_BOF_SIZE + IRDA_ADDRESS_FIELD_SIZE + IRDA_CONTROL_FIELD_SIZE +	\
        SLOW_IR_FCS_SIZE + SLOW_IR_EOF_SIZE) + sizeof(STIR4200_FRAME_HEADER)
#define BM_DATA_SIZE_2048   (1 << 5)
#define BM_DATA_SIZE_1024   (1 << 4)

#define BM_DATA_SIZE_256    (1 << 2)
#define BM_DATA_SIZE_128    (1 << 1)
#define BM_DATA_SIZE_64     (1 << 0)

#define BM_WINDOW_SIZE_6     (1 << 5)
#define BM_WINDOW_SIZE_5     (1 << 4)
#define BM_WINDOW_SIZE_4     (1 << 3)
#define BM_WINDOW_SIZE_3     (1 << 2)
#define BM_WINDOW_SIZE_2     (1 << 1)
#define BM_WINDOW_SIZE_1     (1 << 0)
#define BM_TURNAROUND_TIME_0ms      (1 << 7)  // 0 ms
#define BM_TURNAROUND_TIME_0p01ms   (1 << 6)  // 0.01 ms
#define BM_TURNAROUND_TIME_0p05ms   (1 << 5)  // 0.05 ms
#define BM_TURNAROUND_TIME_0p1ms    (1 << 4)  // 0.1 ms
#define BM_TURNAROUND_TIME_0p5ms    (1 << 3)  // 0.5 ms

#define BM_TURNAROUND_TIME_5ms      (1 << 1)  // 5 ms
#define BM_TURNAROUND_TIME_10ms     (1 << 0)  // 10 ms
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_2400		(1 << 0)    // SLOW IR ...
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_9600		(1 << 1)
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_19200		(1 << 2)
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_38400		(1 << 3)
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_57600		(1 << 4)
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_115200		(1 << 5)
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_576K		(1 << 6)   // MEDIUM IR ...
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_1152K		(1 << 7)
#define NDIS_IRDA_SPEED_4M			(1 << 8)   // FAST IR
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_0        (1 << 7)
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_1        (1 << 6)
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_2        (1 << 5)
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_3        (1 << 4)
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_6        (1 << 3)
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_12       (1 << 2)
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_24       (1 << 1)
#define BM_EXTRA_BOFS_48       (1 << 0)

// drivers\net\irda\sigmatel\sys\stir4200.h
#define MAKEUSHORT(lo, hi)  ((unsigned short)(((unsigned char)(lo)) | ((unsigned short)((unsigned char)(hi))) << 8))
#define MAKEULONG(lo, hi)   ((unsigned long)(((unsigned short)(lo)) | ((unsigned long)((unsigned short)(hi))) << 16))
#define STIR4200_MODE_MASK                  (STIR4200_MODE_FIR | STIR4200_MODE_MIR | STIR4200_MODE_SIR | STIR4200_MODE_ASK)

// drivers\net\ms\e100bex\e100_557.h
#define SCB_ACK_MASK            (BIT_9 | BIT_12_15 | BIT_8)   // ACK Mask
#define SCB_CUS_MASK            (BIT_6 | BIT_7) // CUS 2-bit Mask
#define SCB_RUS_SUSP_NO_RBDS    (BIT_2 | BIT_5) // RU No More RBDs
#define SCB_RUS_NO_RBDS         (BIT_3 | BIT_5) // RU No More RBDs
#define SCB_RUS_READY_NO_RBDS   (BIT_4 | BIT_5) // RU Ready, No RBDs
#define SCB_CUC_DUMP_STAT       (BIT_4 | BIT_6) // CU Dump statistics counters
#define SCB_CUC_STATIC_RESUME   (BIT_5 | BIT_7) // CU Static Resume
#define SCB_RUC_LOAD_HDS        (BIT_0 | BIT_2) // Load RFD Header Data Size
#define CB_SELFTEST_ERROR_MASK ( \
                CB_SELFTEST_FAIL_BIT | CB_SELFTEST_DIAG_BIT | \
                CB_SELFTEST_REGISTER_BIT | CB_SELFTEST_ROM_BIT)

// drivers\net\ms\e100bex\mp.h
#define MP_SET_FLAG(_M, _F)         ((_M)->Flags |= (_F))
#define MP_CLEAR_FLAG(_M, _F)       ((_M)->Flags &= ~(_F))
#define MP_TEST_FLAG(_M, _F)        (((_M)->Flags & (_F)) != 0)
#define MP_TEST_FLAGS(_M, _F)       (((_M)->Flags & (_F)) == (_F))
#define MP_SHOULD_FAIL_SEND(_M)   ((_M)->Flags & fMP_ADAPTER_FAIL_SEND_MASK)
#define MP_IS_NOT_READY(_M)       ((_M)->Flags & fMP_ADAPTER_NOT_READY_MASK)
#define MP_IS_READY(_M)           !((_M)->Flags & fMP_ADAPTER_NOT_READY_MASK)
#define MP_SET_PACKET_RFD(_p, _rfd)  *((PMP_RFD *)&(_p)->MiniportReserved[0]) = _rfd
#define MP_GET_PACKET_RFD(_p)        *((PMP_RFD *)&(_p)->MiniportReserved[0])
#define MP_GET_PACKET_MR(_p)         (&(_p)->MiniportReserved[0])

// drivers\net\ms\e100bex\mp_def.h
#define NIC_SUPPORTED_FILTERS (     \
    NDIS_PACKET_TYPE_DIRECTED       | \
    NDIS_PACKET_TYPE_MULTICAST      | \
    NDIS_PACKET_TYPE_BROADCAST      | \
    NDIS_PACKET_TYPE_PROMISCUOUS    | \
    NDIS_PACKET_TYPE_ALL_MULTICAST)
#define NIC_RFD_GET_PACKET_SIZE(_HwRfd) (((_HwRfd)->RfdActualCount) & RFD_ACT_COUNT_MASK)
#define NIC_RFD_VALID_ACTUALCOUNT(_HwRfd) ((((_HwRfd)->RfdActualCount) & (RFD_EOF_BIT | RFD_F_BIT)) == (RFD_EOF_BIT | RFD_F_BIT))

// drivers\net\ms\e100bex\mp_nic.h
#define NIC_INTERRUPT_DISABLED(_adapter) \
   (_adapter->CSRAddress->ScbCommandHigh & SCB_INT_MASK)

// drivers\net\ms\e100bex\offload.c
#define IP_HEADER_LENGTH(pIpHdr)   \
        ( (ULONG)((pIpHdr->iph_verlen & 0x0F) << 2) )
#define TCP_HEADER_LENGTH(pTcpHdr) \
        ( (USHORT)(((*((PUCHAR)(&(pTcpHdr->tcp_flags))) & 0xF0) >> 4) << 2) )

// drivers\net\ms\e100bex\private\mp_pm.c
#define MP_CLEAR_PMDR(pPMDR)  (*pPMDR) = ((*pPMDR) | 0xe0);  // clear the 3 uppermost bits in the PMDR

// drivers\net\ms\ne2000\ne2000hw.h
#define CardBlockInterrupts(Adapter) \
    NdisRawWritePortUchar(((Adapter)->IoPAddr+NIC_INTR_MASK), 0)
#define CardUnblockInterrupts(Adapter) \
    NdisRawWritePortUchar(\
            ((Adapter)->IoPAddr+NIC_INTR_MASK), \
            (Adapter)->NicInterruptMask)

// drivers\net\ms\ne2000\ne2000sw.h
#define MSB(Value) ((UCHAR)((((ULONG)Value) >> 8) & 0xff))

#define PAR_FWD_MODE_SKIP_MASK   (EPP_ANY | BOUNDED_ECP | ECP_HW_NOIRQ | ECP_HW_IRQ)

#define DEVICE_TYPE_ATA_BIT             1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_ATA - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_ATAPI_BIT           1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_ATAPI - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_SCSI_BIT            1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_SCSI - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_SSFDC_BIT           1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_SSFDC - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_MMC_BIT             1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_MMC - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_FLASH_BIT           1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_FLASH - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_EPP_DEVICE_BIT      1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_EPP_DEVICE - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_SOUND_BIT           1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_SOUND - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_HIFD_BIT            1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_HIFD - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_LS120_BIT           1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_LS120 - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_PCMCIA_CF_BIT       1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_PCMCIA_CF - 1 )
#define DEVICE_TYPE_FLP_TAPE_DSK_BIT    1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_FLP_TAPE_DSK - 1 )

#define DEVICE_TYPE_UMAX_BIT            1 << ( DEVICE_TYPE_UMAX - 1 )
