// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d8\fw\dxcursor.cpp
#define FORMAT_8888_1555(val)  \
    ( ((val & 0x80000000) >> 16) | ((val & 0xF80000) >> 9) | ((val & 0xF800) >> 6) | ((val & 0xF8) >> 3))
#define FORMAT_8888_555(val)  \
    ( ((val & 0xF80000) >> 9) | ((val & 0xF800) >> 6) | ((val & 0xF8) >> 3))
#define FORMAT_8888_565(val)  \
    ( ((val & 0xF80000) >> 8) | ((val & 0xFC00) >> 5) | ((val & 0xF8) >> 3))

#define DDI_MULTISAMPLE_TYPE(x) (1 << ((x)-1))

#define CLIPPED_LEFT    (D3DCS_PLANE5 << 1)
#define CLIPPED_RIGHT   (D3DCS_PLANE5 << 2)
#define CLIPPED_TOP     (D3DCS_PLANE5 << 3)
#define CLIPPED_BOTTOM  (D3DCS_PLANE5 << 4)

((((((INT32)(g) - (INT32)(b)) & (p)->iZAndMask) - (p)->iZNeg) >= 0) ^ (p)->iZXorMask)
#define ZCMP32(p, g, b)  \
((((((INT32)(g) - (INT32)(b)) & (p)->iZAndMask) - (p)->iZNeg) >= 0) ^ (p)->iZXorMask)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d8\inc\vshader.hpp
#define D3DVSD_GETTOKENTYPE(token) ((token & D3DVSD_TOKENTYPEMASK) >> D3DVSD_TOKENTYPESHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_ISSTREAMTESS(token) ((token & D3DVSD_STREAMTESSMASK) >> (D3DVSD_TOKENTYPESHIFT - 1))
#define D3DVSD_GETDATALOADTYPE(token) ((token & D3DVSD_DATALOADTYPEMASK) >> D3DVSD_DATALOADTYPESHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETDATATYPE(token) ((token & D3DVSD_DATATYPEMASK) >> D3DVSD_DATATYPESHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETSKIPCOUNT(token) ((token & D3DVSD_SKIPCOUNTMASK) >> D3DVSD_SKIPCOUNTSHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETSTREAMNUMBER(token) ((token & D3DVSD_STREAMNUMBERMASK) >> D3DVSD_STREAMNUMBERSHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETVERTEXREG(token) ((token & D3DVSD_VERTEXREGMASK) >> D3DVSD_VERTEXREGSHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETCONSTCOUNT(token) ((token & D3DVSD_CONSTCOUNTMASK) >> D3DVSD_CONSTCOUNTSHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETCONSTADDRESS(token) ((token & D3DVSD_CONSTADDRESSMASK) >> D3DVSD_CONSTADDRESSSHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETCONSTRS(token) ((token & D3DVSD_CONSTRSMASK) >> D3DVSD_CONSTRSSHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETEXTCOUNT(token) ((token & D3DVSD_EXTCOUNTMASK) >> D3DVSD_EXTCOUNTSHIFT)
#define D3DVSD_GETEXTINFO(token) ((token & D3DVSD_EXTINFOMASK) >> D3DVSD_EXTINFOSHIFT)

                                                  D3DDEVBOOL_HINTFLAGS_INBEGIN_BIG_PRIM)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\inc\fltval.h
#define VALTOFXP(d,prec) ((int)SAFE_FLOAT_TO_INT((d) * (double)(1 << (prec))))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\inc\haldrv.hpp
#define LOCK_HAL(ret, lpDevI)                                           \
{                                                                       \
    if (lpDevI->dwFEFlags & D3DFE_REALHAL)  {                           \
        _EnterSysLevel(lpWin16Lock);                                    \
    }                                                                   \
    ret = D3D_OK;                                                       \
}
#define UNLOCK_HAL(lpDevI)                                              \
{                                                                       \
    if (lpDevI->dwFEFlags & D3DFE_REALHAL)  {                           \
        _LeaveSysLevel(lpWin16Lock);                                    \
    }                                                                   \
}
#define LOCK_DIBENGINE(ret, lpDevI)                                     \
{                                                                       \
    if (lpDevI->dwFEFlags & D3DFE_REALHAL)  {                           \
        ret = D3DHAL_LockDibEngine(lpDevI);                             \
    }                                                                   \
    else    {                                                           \
        ret = D3D_OK;                                                   \
    }                                                                   \
}
#define UNLOCK_DIBENGINE(lpDevI)                                        \
{                                                                       \
    if (lpDevI->dwFEFlags & D3DFE_REALHAL)  {                           \
        D3DHAL_UnlockDibEngine(lpDevI);                                 \
    }                                                                   \
}

#define CLIPPED_RIGHT   (D3DCLIP_GEN5 << 2)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\d3dif\d3dif.hpp
#define DDSurf_BitDepth(lpLcl) \
    ( (lpLcl->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT) ? \
      (lpLcl->lpGbl->ddpfSurface.dwRGBBitCount) : \
      (lpLcl->lpGbl->lpDD->vmiData.ddpfDisplay.dwRGBBitCount) \
    )
#define DDSurf_PixFmt(lpLcl) \
    ( ((lpLcl)->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT) ? \
      ((lpLcl)->lpGbl->ddpfSurface) : \
      ((lpLcl)->lpGbl->lpDD->vmiData.ddpfDisplay) \
    )
#define VIDEO_MEMORY(pDDS) \
    (!(((LPDDRAWI_DDRAWSURFACE_INT) (pDDS))->lpLcl->lpGbl->dwGlobalFlags & \
    DDRAWISURFGBL_SYSMEMREQUESTED))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\inc\setup.hpp
#define SPLIT_COLOR(uPacked, uB, uG, uR, uA)                                  \
    ((uB) = (UINT)RGBA_GETBLUE(uPacked),                                      \
     (uG) = (UINT)RGBA_GETGREEN(uPacked),                                     \
     (uR) = (UINT)RGBA_GETRED(uPacked),                                       \
     (uA) = (UINT)RGBA_GETALPHA(uPacked))
#define COLOR_DELTA(uPacked, uB, uG, uR, uA, fDB, fDG, fDR, fDA)              \
    ((fDB) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETBLUE(uPacked)-(uB)) << COLOR_SHIFT), \
     (fDG) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETGREEN(uPacked)-(uG)) << COLOR_SHIFT),\
     (fDR) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETRED(uPacked)-(uR)) << COLOR_SHIFT),  \
     (fDA) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETALPHA(uPacked)-(uA)) << COLOR_SHIFT))
#define SPLIT_IDX_COLOR(uPacked, iIdx, iA)                                    \
    ((iIdx) = (INT32)CI_MASKALPHA(uPacked) + (1<<(INDEX_COLOR_VERTEX_SHIFT-1)),                                   \
     (iA) = (INT32)CI_GETALPHA(uPacked))
#define IDX_COLOR_DELTA(uPacked, iIdx, iA, fDIdx, fDA)                        \
    ((fDIdx) = (FLOAT)((((INT32)CI_MASKALPHA(uPacked) +                       \
                    (1<<(INDEX_COLOR_VERTEX_SHIFT-1))) - (iIdx)) <<           \
                       INDEX_COLOR_FIXED_SHIFT),                              \
     (fDA) = (FLOAT)(((INT32)CI_GETALPHA(uPacked) - (iA)) <<                  \
                     INDEX_COLOR_SHIFT))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\rampmat\palette.h
#define RGB_HASH(red, green, blue)      (((red) << 8) ^ ((green) << 4) ^ (blue))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\rampmat\rgbmap.cpp
#define SHIFT(t, v, s)                                \
do {                                          \
    if (s < 0)                                    \
    t = v >> -s;                                  \
    else                                      \
    t = v << s;                               \
} while (0)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\rampold\dditypes.h
#define CI_GET_ALPHA(ci)	((ci) >> 24)
#define CI_GET_INDEX(ci)	(((ci) >> 8) & 0xffff)
#define CI_MASK_ALPHA(ci)	((ci) & 0xffffff)
#define CI_MAKE(a, i, f)	(((a) << 24) | ((i) << 8) | (f))
#define RGBA_GET_ALPHA(ci)	((ci) >> 24)
#define RGBA_GET_RED(ci)	(((ci) >> 16) & 0xff)
#define RGBA_GET_GREEN(ci)	(((ci) >> 8) & 0xff)
#define RGBA_SET_ALPHA(rgba, x)	(((x) << 24) | ((rgba) & 0x00ffffff))
#define RGBA_SET_RED(rgba, x)	(((x) << 16) | ((rgba) & 0xff00ffff))
#define RGBA_SET_GREEN(rgba, x)	(((x) << 8) | ((rgba) & 0xffff00ff))
#define RGBA_SET_BLUE(rgba, x)	(((x) << 0) | ((rgba) & 0xffffff00))
#define RGBA_MAKE(r, g, b, a)	(((a) << 24) | ((r) << 16) | ((g) << 8) | (b))
#define RGB_GET_RED(ci)		(((ci) >> 16) & 0xff)
#define RGB_GET_GREEN(ci)	(((ci) >> 8) & 0xff)
#define RGB_SET_RED(rgb, x)	(((x) << 16) | ((rgb) & 0xff00ffff))
#define RGB_SET_GREEN(rgb, x)	(((x) << 8) | ((rgb) & 0xffff00ff))
#define RGB_SET_BLUE(rgb, x)	(((x) << 0) | ((rgb) & 0xffffff00))
#define RGB_MAKE(r, g, b)	(((r) << 16) | ((g) << 8) | (b))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\rampold\dmath.h
#define TWOPOW(N) (((N) < 32) ? ((double)(1UL << (N))) : \
		                ((double)(1UL << (N - 32)) * TWOPOW32))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\rampold\fltval.h
#define VALTOFXP(d,prec) ((RLDDIFixed)SAFE_FLOAT_TO_INT((d) * (double)(1 << (prec))))
#define FXPTOVAL(f,prec) ((RLDDIValue)(((double)(f)) / (double)(1 << (prec))))
#define ITOFXP(i,prec)	((i) << (prec))
#define FXPTOI(f,prec)	((int)((f) >> (prec)))
#define FXPROUND(f,prec) ((int)(((f) + (1 << ((prec) - 1))) >> (prec)))
#define FXPCEIL(f,prec) ((int)(((f) + (1 << (prec)) - 1) >> (prec)))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\setup\lstp.cpp
#define LINE_FIX_HALF (1 << (LINE_FIX - 1))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx6\rast\spaninit\rastcap.h
#define SET_VAL(pos, len, val)  ((m_rgdwData[(pos) / 32]) |= \
                                 (((val) & ~(0xFFFFFFFF << (len))) << \
                                  ((pos) % 32)))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\dx7\fe\d3ddev.cpp
#define _COMPUTE_NEXT_LOD_RECT( m_pRct )                                                \
{                                                                                       \
    (m_pRct)->left >>= 1;                                                               \
    (m_pRct)->top  >>= 1;                                                               \
    DWORD right  = ((m_pRct)->right +1) >> 1;                                           \
    DWORD bottom = ((m_pRct)->bottom+1) >> 1;                                           \
    (m_pRct)->right  = ((right  - (m_pRct)->left) < 1) ? ((m_pRct)->left+1) : (right);  \
    (m_pRct)->bottom = ((bottom - (m_pRct)->top ) < 1) ? ((m_pRct)->top +1) : (bottom); \
}

#define FPU_MODE_MASK_EXCEPTIONS(uMode) \
    ((uMode) | 0x3f)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\ref\inc\refrast.hpp
#define RR_TEXTURE_HAS_CK           (1L<< 0)    // set if texture has colorkey
#define RR_TEXTURE_LOCKED           (1L<< 1)    // set if DD surface is locked (external use only)
#define RR_TEXTURE_ALPHAINPALETTE   (1L<< 2)    // set if alpha channel in palette
#define RR_TEXTURE_ENVMAP           (1L<< 3)    // set if texture is envmap with 6 times
#define RR_TEXTURE_SHADOWMAP        (1L<< 4)    // set if the texture is a ZBuffer
#define D3DFVF_GETTEXCOORDSIZE(FVF, CoordIndex) ((FVF >> (CoordIndex*2 + 16)) & 0x3)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\ref\inc\reftnl.hpp
#define RRPV_COLORVERTEXFLAGS     (RRPV_VERTEXDIFFUSENEEDED       | \
                                   RRPV_VERTEXSPECULARNEEDED      | \
                                   RRPV_COLORVERTEXAMB            | \
                                   RRPV_COLORVERTEXDIFF           | \
                                   RRPV_COLORVERTEXSPEC           | \
                                   RRPV_COLORVERTEXEMIS )

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\ref\inc\rrutil.hpp
#define D3DFVFP_EYENORMAL     ((UINT64)1<<32)
#define D3DFVFP_EYEXYZ        ((UINT64)1<<33)
#define FVF_TRANSFORMED(dwFVF) ((dwFVF & D3DFVF_POSITION_MASK) == D3DFVF_XYZRHW)
#define FVF_TEXCOORD_NUMBER(dwFVF) \
    (((dwFVF) & D3DFVF_TEXCOUNT_MASK) >> D3DFVF_TEXCOUNT_SHIFT)
#define DDSurf_BitDepth(lpLcl) \
    ( (lpLcl->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT) ? \
      (lpLcl->lpGbl->ddpfSurface.dwRGBBitCount) : \
      (lpLcl->lpGbl->lpDD->vmiData.ddpfDisplay.dwRGBBitCount) \
    )
#define DDSurf_PixFmt(lpLcl) \
    ( ((lpLcl)->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT) ? \
      ((lpLcl)->lpGbl->ddpfSurface) : \
      ((lpLcl)->lpGbl->lpDD->vmiData.ddpfDisplay) \
    )
#define VIDEO_MEMORY(pDDSLcl) \
    (!((pDDSLcl)->lpGbl->dwGlobalFlags & DDRAWISURFGBL_SYSMEMREQUESTED))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\d3d\ref\tnl\clipping.hpp
#define RRCLIP_INTERPOLATE_COLOR       (1<< 0)
#define RRCLIP_INTERPOLATE_SPECULAR    (1<< 1)
#define RRCLIP_INTERPOLATE_TEXTURE     (1<< 2)
#define RRCLIP_INTERPOLATE_S           (1<< 3)
#define RRCLIP_INTERPOLATE_EYENORMAL   (1<< 4)
#define RRCLIP_INTERPOLATE_EYEXYZ      (1<< 5)
#define RRCLIPGB_LEFT    (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 1)
#define RRCLIPGB_RIGHT   (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 2)
#define RRCLIPGB_TOP     (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 3)
#define RRCLIPGB_BOTTOM  (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 4)
#define CLIPPED_LEFT    (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 1)
#define CLIPPED_RIGHT   (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 2)
#define CLIPPED_TOP     (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 3)
#define CLIPPED_BOTTOM  (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 4)
#define CLIPPED_FRONT   (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 5)
#define CLIPPED_BACK    (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 6)
#define CLIPPED_ENABLE  (RRCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 7) // wireframe enable flag

// multimedia\directx\dxg\dd\ddraw\blitlib\bitblt.h
#define BPP_16_FILLSPAN		0x01FF	// LO = 256bpp, HI = Penguin H/W code 001 (SrcAdr of span desc. if used as an RGB value
#define BLIT_BLEND(src,dst,alpha,alphacomp) \
	(((((src) & BLUE_MASK)  * (alpha) + ((dst) & BLUE_MASK) \
		* (alphacomp)) >> 8) & BLUE_MASK) | \
	(((((src) & GREEN_MASK) * (alpha) + ((dst) & GREEN_MASK) \
		* (alphacomp)) >> 8) & GREEN_MASK) | \
	(((((src) & RED_MASK)   * (alpha) + ((dst) & RED_MASK) \
		* (alphacomp)) >> 8) & RED_MASK)
#define BLIT_BLEND16(src,dst,alpha,alphacomp) \
	((WORD) ((((((DWORD) (src) & BLUE_MASK16)  * (alpha) + \
        ((DWORD) (dst) & BLUE_MASK16)  * (alphacomp)) >> 8) & BLUE_MASK16) | \
     (((((DWORD) (src) & GREEN_MASK16) * (alpha) + \
        ((DWORD) (dst) & GREEN_MASK16) * (alphacomp)) >> 8) & GREEN_MASK16) | \
     (((((DWORD) (src) & RED_MASK16)   * (alpha) + \
        ((DWORD) (dst) & RED_MASK16)   * (alphacomp)) >> 8) & RED_MASK16)))
#define BLIT_COLOR16_FROM_COLORREF(cr) \
	((WORD) ((((cr) >> 8) & BLUE_MASK16) | (((cr) >> 5) & \
		GREEN_MASK16) | (((cr) >> 3) & RED_MASK16)))
#define BLIT_COLORREF_FROM_COLOR16(w) \
	((DWORD) ((((w) & BLUE_MASK16) << 8) | (((w) & GREEN_MASK16) << 5) | \
		(((w) & RED_MASK16) << 3)))
#define ALPHAFROMDWORD(a) ((a & ALPHA_MASK) + 1)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\dd\ddraw\blitlib\dibfx.h
#define DibWidth(lpbi)			(UINT)(((LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbi))->biWidth)
#define DibHeight(lpbi)         (((LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbi))->biHeight)
#define DibBitCount(lpbi)       (UINT)(((LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbi))->biBitCount)
#define DibCompression(lpbi)    (DWORD)(((LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbi))->biCompression)
#define DibWidthBytes(lpbi)     DibWidthBytesN(((LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)lpbi), \
								((LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)lpbi)->biBitCount)
#define DibNumColors(lpbi)      ((lpbi)->biClrUsed == 0 && \
								(lpbi)->biBitCount <= 8 \
                                ? (int)(1 << (int)(lpbi)->biBitCount) \
                                : (int)(lpbi)->biClrUsed)
#define FixBitmapInfo(lpbi)     if ((lpbi)->biSizeImage == 0)                 \
                                    (lpbi)->biSizeImage = DibSizeImage(lpbi); \
                                if ((lpbi)->biClrUsed == 0)                   \
                                    (lpbi)->biClrUsed = DibNumColors(lpbi);   \
                                if ((lpbi)->biCompression == BI_BITFIELDS &&  \
	(lpbi)->biClrUsed == 0) \
                                    ; // (lpbi)->biClrUsed = 3;
#define DibInfo(pDIB)			((BITMAPINFO FAR *)(pDIB))
#define IntToFixed(i) (Fixed)( ((long)(i)) << 16 )
#define FixedToShort(f) (short)( ((long)f) >> 16 )

    #define DONE_BUSY()          \
        (*pdflags) &= ~BUSY;
    #define LEAVE_BOTH_NOBUSY()  \
        { if(pdflags)            \
            (*pdflags) &= ~BUSY; \
        }                        \
        LEAVE_BOTH();
    #define DONE_EXCLUDE() \
        if (surf_dest_lcl->lpDDClipper != NULL) \
        { \
            if ((pdrv->dwFlags & DDRAWI_DISPLAYDRV) && pdrv->dwPDevice && \
                !(*pdrv->lpwPDeviceFlags & HARDWARECURSOR)) \

        }

    ( ( ( psurf_lcl )->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT ) ? \
	&( ( psurf_lcl )->lpGbl->ddpfSurface )               : \

#define MAX_PRIM_BUFFER_SIZE (1 << 20)
#define DEF_PRIM_BUFFER_SIZE (1 << 16)

        UnmapLightweightSurface(x)

#define PE_FLAGS (PC_NOCOLLAPSE |PC_RESERVED)
#define BITS_PER_BITFIELD_ENTRY (sizeof(DWORD)*8)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\dd\ddraw\main\ddrawpr.h
#define GET_PIXEL_FORMAT( thisx, thisl, pddpf ) \
    if( thisx->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT ) \
    { \
        pddpf = &thisl->ddpfSurface; \
    } \
    else \
    { \
        pddpf = &thisl->lpDD->vmiData.ddpfDisplay; \
    }
#define CHANGE_GLOBAL_CNT( pdrv, thisg, cnt ) \
    if( !(thisg->dwGlobalFlags & DDRAWISURFGBL_SYSMEMREQUESTED) ) \
    { \
        (int) pdrv->dwSurfaceLockCount += (int) (cnt); \
    }
#define GETFAILCODEBLT( testhal, testhel, halonly, helonly, flag ) \
    if( halonly ) { \
        if( !(testhal & flag) ) { \
            fail = TRUE; \
        } \
    } else if( helonly ) { \
        if( !(testhel & flag) ) { \
            fail = TRUE; \
        } \
    } else { \
        if( !(testhal & flag) ) { \
            if( !(testhel & flag) ) { \
                fail = TRUE; \
            } else { \
                helonly = TRUE; \
            } \
        } else { \
            halonly = TRUE; \
        } \
    }
#define GETFAILCODE( testhal, testhel, flag ) \
    if( halonly ) \
    { \
        if( !(testhal & flag) ) \
        { \
            fail = TRUE; \
        } \
    } \
    else if( helonly ) \
    { \
        if( !(testhel & flag) ) \
        { \
            fail = TRUE; \
        } \
    } \
    else \
    { \
        if( !(testhal & flag) ) \
        { \
            if( !(testhel & flag) ) \
            { \
                fail = TRUE; \
            } \
            else \
            { \
                helonly = TRUE; \
            } \
        } \
        else \
        { \
            halonly = TRUE; \
        } \
    }
#define SCALE_X(rcSrc,rcDest) ( ((rcSrc.right - rcSrc.left) << 16) / (rcDest.right - rcDest.left))
#define SCALE_Y(rcSrc,rcDest) ( ((rcSrc.bottom - rcSrc.top) << 16) / (rcDest.bottom - rcDest.top))
#define SIZE_PCAPS_TO_FLAGS( pcaps )                              \
    (((pcaps) & DDPCAPS_1BIT) ? DDRAWIPAL_2 :                     \
     (((pcaps) & DDPCAPS_2BIT) ? DDRAWIPAL_4 :                    \
      (((pcaps) & DDPCAPS_4BIT) ? DDRAWIPAL_16 : DDRAWIPAL_256)))
#define SIZE_FLAGS_TO_PCAPS( flags )                              \
    (((flags) & DDRAWIPAL_2) ? DDPCAPS_1BIT :                     \
     (((flags) & DDRAWIPAL_4) ? DDPCAPS_2BIT :                    \
      (((flags) & DDRAWIPAL_16) ? DDPCAPS_4BIT : DDPCAPS_8BIT)))
#define FLAGS_TO_SIZE( flags )                                    \
    (((flags) & DDRAWIPAL_2)  ? 2 :                               \
     (((flags) & DDRAWIPAL_4)  ? 4 :                              \
      (((flags) & DDRAWIPAL_16) ? 16 : 256)))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\dd\ddraw\main\ddsacc.c
#define DONE_LOCK_EXCLUDE() \
    if( this_lcl->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_LOCKEXCLUDEDCURSOR ) \
    { \
        DD16_Unexclude(pdrv->dwPDevice); \
        this_lcl->dwFlags &= ~DDRAWISURF_LOCKEXCLUDEDCURSOR; \
    }

// multimedia\directx\dxg\dd\ddraw\main\ddsblt.c
#define DONE_BUSY()          \
    (*pdflags) &= ~BUSY; \
#define LEAVE_BOTH_NOBUSY() \
    { if(pdflags)\
        (*pdflags) &= ~BUSY; \
    } \
    LEAVE_BOTH();
    #define DONE_EXCLUDE() \
        if( this_dest_lcl->lpDDClipper != NULL ) \
        { \
            if ( (pdrv->dwFlags & DDRAWI_DISPLAYDRV) && pdrv->dwPDevice && \
                !(*pdrv->lpwPDeviceFlags & HARDWARECURSOR)) \
            { \
                DD16_Unexclude(pdrv->dwPDevice); \
            } \
        }

#define DDCKEYCAPS_OVERLAYBITS (DDCKEYCAPS_SRCOVERLAY|DDCKEYCAPS_DESTOVERLAY)
#define DDALPHACAPS_BLTBITS  \
	(DDALPHACAPS_BLTSATURATE|DDALPHACAPS_BLTPREMULT|  \
	 DDALPHACAPS_BLTNONPREMULT|DDALPHACAPS_BLTRGBASCALE1F|	\
	 DDALPHACAPS_BLTRGBASCALE2F|DDALPHACAPS_BLTRGBASCALE4F)
#define DDALPHACAPS_OVERLAYBITS  \
	(DDALPHACAPS_OVERLAYSATURATE|DDALPHACAPS_OVERLAYPREMULT|   \
	 DDALPHACAPS_OVERLAYNONPREMULT|DDALPHACAPS_OVERLAYRGBASCALE1F|	 \
	 DDALPHACAPS_OVERLAYRGBASCALE2F|DDALPHACAPS_OVERLAYRGBASCALE4F)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\dd\ddraw\main\w95hal.c
#define RESTOREDATAALIAS( psx, sv ) \
		if( sv != (LPVOID) 0xffffffff ) \
		{ \
		    psx->lpGbl = sv; \
		    psx->dwFlags &= ~DDRAWISURF_DATAISALIASED; \
		}

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\drv\refif.cpp
#define DDI_MULTISAMPLE_TYPE(x) (1 << ((x)-1))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\inc\pshader.h
#define RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_0        (D3DSP_WRITEMASK_0 >> RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_1        (D3DSP_WRITEMASK_1 >> RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_2        (D3DSP_WRITEMASK_2 >> RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_3        (D3DSP_WRITEMASK_3 >> RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_ALL      (D3DSP_WRITEMASK_ALL >> RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_NOSWIZZLE          (D3DSP_NOSWIZZLE >> D3DSP_SWIZZLE_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_REPLICATERED       (D3DSP_REPLICATERED >> D3DSP_SWIZZLE_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_REPLICATEGREEN     (D3DSP_REPLICATEGREEN >> D3DSP_SWIZZLE_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_REPLICATEBLUE      (D3DSP_REPLICATEBLUE >> D3DSP_SWIZZLE_SHIFT)
#define RDPS_REPLICATEALPHA     (D3DSP_REPLICATEALPHA >> D3DSP_SWIZZLE_SHIFT)
#define _Swizzle(x,y,z,w)   ((x)|(y<<2)|(z<<4)|(w<<6))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\inc\rdcomm.hpp
#define D3DFVFP_FOG           ((UINT64)1<<32) // Fog is present
#define D3DFVFP_CLIP          ((UINT64)1<<33) // Clip coordinates are present
#define D3DFVFP_POSITION2     ((UINT64)1<<34) // Position2 present (tweening)
#define D3DFVFP_NORMAL2       ((UINT64)1<<35) // Normal2 present (tweening)
#define D3DFVFP_BLENDINDICES  ((UINT64)1<<36) // Blend Indices present.
#define FVF_TRANSFORMED(dwFVF) ((dwFVF & D3DFVF_POSITION_MASK) == D3DFVF_XYZRHW)
#define FVF_TEXCOORD_NUMBER(dwFVF) \
    (((dwFVF) & D3DFVF_TEXCOUNT_MASK) >> D3DFVF_TEXCOUNT_SHIFT)
#define D3DFVF_GETTEXCOORDSIZE(FVF, CoordIndex) ((FVF >> (CoordIndex*2 + 16)) & 0x3)
#define DDSurf_BitDepth(lpLcl) \
    ( (lpLcl->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT) ? \
      (lpLcl->lpGbl->ddpfSurface.dwRGBBitCount) : \
      (lpLcl->lpGbl->lpDD->vmiData.ddpfDisplay.dwRGBBitCount) \
    )
#define DDSurf_PixFmt(lpLcl) \
    ( ((lpLcl)->dwFlags & DDRAWISURF_HASPIXELFORMAT) ? \
      ((lpLcl)->lpGbl->ddpfSurface) : \
      ((lpLcl)->lpGbl->lpDD->vmiData.ddpfDisplay) \
    )
#define VIDEO_MEMORY(pDDSLcl) \
    (!((pDDSLcl)->lpGbl->dwGlobalFlags & DDRAWISURFGBL_SYSMEMREQUESTED))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\inc\refdev.hpp
#define RR_TEXTURE_HAS_CK           (1L<< 0)    // set if texture has colorkey
#define RR_TEXTURE_ALPHAINPALETTE   (1L<< 1)    // set if alpha channel in palette
#define RR_TEXTURE_CUBEMAP          (1L<< 2)    // set if texture is Cubemap with 6 times the number of surfaces
#define RR_TEXTURE_VOLUME           (1L<< 4)    // set if texture is volume
#define RDRF_MULTISAMPLE_CHANGED        (1L<<0)
#define RDRF_PIXELSHADER_CHANGED        (1L<<1)
#define RDRF_LEGACYPIXELSHADER_CHANGED  (1L<<2)
#define RDRF_TEXTURESTAGESTATE_CHANGED  (1L<<3)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\inc\reftnl.hpp
#define RDPV_COLORVERTEXFLAGS     (RDPV_VERTEXDIFFUSENEEDED       | \
                                   RDPV_VERTEXSPECULARNEEDED      | \
                                   RDPV_COLORVERTEXAMB            | \
                                   RDPV_COLORVERTEXDIFF           | \
                                   RDPV_COLORVERTEXSPEC           | \
                                   RDPV_COLORVERTEXEMIS )

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\inc\vstream.h
#define RDVSD_GETTOKENTYPE(token)           \
    ((token & D3DVSD_TOKENTYPEMASK) >> D3DVSD_TOKENTYPESHIFT)
#define RDVSD_ISSTREAMTESS(token)           \
    ((token & D3DVSD_STREAMTESSMASK) >> D3DVSD_STREAMTESSSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETDATALOADTYPE(token)        \
    ((token & D3DVSD_DATALOADTYPEMASK) >> D3DVSD_DATALOADTYPESHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETDATATYPE(token)            \
    ((token & D3DVSD_DATATYPEMASK) >> D3DVSD_DATATYPESHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETSKIPCOUNT(token)           \
    ((token & D3DVSD_SKIPCOUNTMASK) >> D3DVSD_SKIPCOUNTSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETSTREAMNUMBER(token)        \
    ((token & D3DVSD_STREAMNUMBERMASK) >> D3DVSD_STREAMNUMBERSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETVERTEXREG(token)           \
    ((token & D3DVSD_VERTEXREGMASK) >> D3DVSD_VERTEXREGSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETVERTEXREGIN(token)         \
    ((token & D3DVSD_VERTEXREGINMASK) >> D3DVSD_VERTEXREGINSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETCONSTCOUNT(token)          \
    ((token & D3DVSD_CONSTCOUNTMASK) >> D3DVSD_CONSTCOUNTSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETCONSTADDRESS(token)        \
    ((token & D3DVSD_CONSTADDRESSMASK) >> D3DVSD_CONSTADDRESSSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETCONSTRS(token)             \
    ((token & D3DVSD_CONSTRSMASK) >> D3DVSD_CONSTRSSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETEXTCOUNT(token)            \
    ((token & D3DVSD_EXTCOUNTMASK) >> D3DVSD_EXTCOUNTSHIFT)
#define RDVSD_GETEXTINFO(token)             \
    ((token & D3DVSD_EXTINFOMASK) >> D3DVSD_EXTINFOSHIFT)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\rast\psexec.cpp
    #define _PerChannelMasked(__STATEMENT)                         \
                for( iChn=0; iChn<4; iChn++ )                       \
                {                                                   \
                    if( !(Args.WriteMask & ComponentMask[iChn] ) )  \
                        continue;                                   \
                    __STATEMENT                                     \
                }                                                   \

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\rast\pshader.cpp
#define _RegisterNeedsToBeInitializedWithTexcoords(Reg) (*pReferencedTexCoordMask)|=(1<<Reg);
        #define _EmitProj(__DESTTYPE,__DESTNUM,__SRCTYPE,__SRCNUM,__COMPONENT)                                                      \
                    _NewPSInst(RDPSINST_RCP);                                                                                       \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_RCP).DstReg._Set(RDPSREG_SCRATCH,0);                                                        \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_RCP).SrcReg0._Set(__SRCTYPE,__SRCNUM);                                                      \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_RCP).bSrcReg0_Negate = FALSE;                                                               \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_RCP).WriteMask  = __COMPONENT;                                                              \
                                                                                                                                    \
                    _NewPSInst(RDPSINST_SWIZZLE);                                                                                   \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_SWIZZLE).DstReg._Set(RDPSREG_SCRATCH,0);                                                    \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_SWIZZLE).SrcReg0._Set(RDPSREG_SCRATCH,0);                                                   \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_SWIZZLE).WriteMask  = RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_0 | RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_1                           \
                                                            | RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_2 | RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_3;                          \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_SWIZZLE).Swizzle    =                                                                       \
                                      (RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_0 == __COMPONENT) ? RDPS_REPLICATERED :                                   \
                                      (RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_1 == __COMPONENT) ? RDPS_REPLICATEGREEN :                                 \
                                      (RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_2 == __COMPONENT) ? RDPS_REPLICATEBLUE : RDPS_REPLICATEALPHA;             \
                                                                                                                                    \
                    _NewPSInst(RDPSINST_MUL);                                                                                       \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_MUL).DstReg._Set(__DESTTYPE,__DESTNUM);                                                     \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_MUL).SrcReg0._Set(RDPSREG_SCRATCH,0);                                                       \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_MUL).SrcReg1._Set(__SRCTYPE,__SRCNUM);                                                      \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_MUL).bSrcReg0_Negate = FALSE;                                                               \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_MUL).bSrcReg1_Negate = FALSE;                                                               \
                    _InstParam(RDPSINST_MUL).WriteMask  =                                                                           \
                                      (RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_0 == __COMPONENT) ? RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_0 :                                \
                                      (RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_1 == __COMPONENT) ? RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_0 | RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_1 :         \
                                      (RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_2 == __COMPONENT) ? RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_0 | RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_1 |         \
                                                                              RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_2 : RDPS_COMPONENTMASK_ALL;

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\rast\psutil.cpp
#define D3DSPD( _RegFile, _Num ) (\
    (1L<<31) |  (D3DSPR_##_RegFile) |\
    ((_Num)&D3DSP_REGNUM_MASK) |\
    (D3DSP_WRITEMASK_0|D3DSP_WRITEMASK_1|D3DSP_WRITEMASK_2|D3DSP_WRITEMASK_3) )
#define D3DPSPS( _RegFile, _Num ) (\
    (1L<<31) | ((_Num)&D3DSP_REGNUM_MASK) |\
    D3DSP_NOSWIZZLE | (D3DSPR_##_RegFile) )

// multimedia\directx\dxg\ref8\tnl\clipping.hpp
#define RDCLIP_INTERPOLATE_COLOR       (1<< 0)
#define RDCLIP_INTERPOLATE_SPECULAR    (1<< 1)
#define RDCLIP_INTERPOLATE_TEXTURE     (1<< 2)
#define RDCLIP_INTERPOLATE_S           (1<< 3)
#define RDCLIP_INTERPOLATE_FOG         (1<< 4)
#define RDCLIPGB_LEFT    (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 1)
#define RDCLIPGB_RIGHT   (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 2)
#define RDCLIPGB_TOP     (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 3)
#define RDCLIPGB_BOTTOM  (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 4)
#define CLIPPED_LEFT    (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 1)
#define CLIPPED_RIGHT   (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 2)
#define CLIPPED_TOP     (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 3)
#define CLIPPED_BOTTOM  (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 4)
#define CLIPPED_FRONT   (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 5)
#define CLIPPED_BACK    (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 6)
#define CLIPPED_ENABLE  (RDCLIP_USERCLIPPLANE5 << 7) // wireframe enable flag

// multimedia\directx\dxg\swrast\rgb\pch\d3dflt.h
#define FPU_MODE_MASK_EXCEPTIONS(uMode) \
    ((uMode) | 0x3f)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\swrast\rgb\pch\setup.hpp
#define SPLIT_COLOR(uPacked, uB, uG, uR, uA)                                  \
    ((uB) = (UINT)RGBA_GETBLUE(uPacked),                                      \
     (uG) = (UINT)RGBA_GETGREEN(uPacked),                                     \
     (uR) = (UINT)RGBA_GETRED(uPacked),                                       \
     (uA) = (UINT)RGBA_GETALPHA(uPacked))
#define COLOR_DELTA(uPacked, uB, uG, uR, uA, fDB, fDG, fDR, fDA)              \
    ((fDB) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETBLUE(uPacked)-(uB)) << COLOR_SHIFT), \
     (fDG) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETGREEN(uPacked)-(uG)) << COLOR_SHIFT),\
     (fDR) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETRED(uPacked)-(uR)) << COLOR_SHIFT),  \
     (fDA) = (FLOAT)((INT)((UINT)RGBA_GETALPHA(uPacked)-(uA)) << COLOR_SHIFT))
#define SPLIT_IDX_COLOR(uPacked, iIdx, iA)                                    \
    ((iIdx) = (INT32)CI_MASKALPHA(uPacked) + (1<<(INDEX_COLOR_VERTEX_SHIFT-1)),                                   \
     (iA) = (INT32)CI_GETALPHA(uPacked))
#define IDX_COLOR_DELTA(uPacked, iIdx, iA, fDIdx, fDA)                        \
    ((fDIdx) = (FLOAT)((((INT32)CI_MASKALPHA(uPacked) +                       \
                    (1<<(INDEX_COLOR_VERTEX_SHIFT-1))) - (iIdx)) <<           \
                       INDEX_COLOR_FIXED_SHIFT),                              \
     (fDA) = (FLOAT)(((INT32)CI_GETALPHA(uPacked) - (iA)) <<                  \
                     INDEX_COLOR_SHIFT))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\swrast\rgb\pch\span.h
#define RAST_DIRTYBITS_SIZE     (((D3D_MAXRENDERSTATES + (D3DHAL_TSS_MAXSTAGES * D3DHAL_TSS_STATESPERSTAGE)) >> 3) + 2)
#define ZCMP16(p, g, b)  \
((((((INT32)(g) - (INT32)(b)) & (p)->iZAndMask) - (p)->iZNeg) >= 0) ^ (p)->iZXorMask)
#define ZCMP32(p, g, b)  \
((((((INT32)(g) - (INT32)(b)) & (p)->iZAndMask) - (p)->iZNeg) >= 0) ^ (p)->iZXorMask)
#define ACMP(p, g, b)  \
((((((INT32)(g) - (INT32)(b)) & (p)->iAAndMask) - (p)->iANeg) >= 0) ^ (p)->iAXorMask)
#define SCMP(p, g, b)  \
((((((INT32)(g) - (INT32)(b)) & (p)->iSAndMask) - (p)->iSNeg) >= 0) ^ (p)->iSXorMask)
#define RGB8_CHANNEL(rgb)   ((((rgb) * 5) + 0x80) >> 8)

// multimedia\directx\dxg\swrast\rgb\setup\lstp.cpp
#define LINE_FIX_HALF (1 << (LINE_FIX - 1))

// multimedia\directx\dxg\swrast\rgb\spaninit\rastcap.h
#define SET_VAL(pos, len, val)  ((m_rgdwData[(pos) / 32]) |= \
                                 (((val) & ~(0xFFFFFFFF << (len))) << \
                                  ((pos) % 32)))

#define MyD3DRMColorGetRed(color)  ((float)((color & 0x00FF0000)>>16)/(float)255)
#define MyD3DRMColorGetGreen(color)  ((float)((color & 0x0000FF00)>>8)/(float)255)

                ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8) |   \
                ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16) | ((DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ))
#define DMUS_INSTRUMENT_GM_INSTRUMENT   (1 << 0)

// multimedia\directx\dxvb\dx7vb\inc\dmusicc.h
#define DMUS_SYNTHSTATS_VOICES          (1 << 0)

#define DMUS_SYNTHSTATS_PEAK_VOLUME     (1 << 4)

// multimedia\directx\dxvb\dx7vb\inc\dmusicf.h
#define DMUS_IO_INST_PATCH          (1 << 0)        /* dwPatch is valid. */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_ASSIGN_PATCH   (1 << 3)        /* dwAssignPatch is valid */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_NOTERANGES     (1 << 4)        /* dwNoteRanges is valid */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_PAN            (1 << 5)        /* bPan is valid */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_VOLUME         (1 << 6 )       /* bVolume is valid */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_TRANSPOSE      (1 << 7)        /* nTranspose is valid */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_GM             (1 << 8)        /* Instrument is from GM collection */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_GS             (1 << 9)        /* Instrument is from GS collection */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_XG             (1 << 10)       /* Instrument is from XG collection */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_CHANNEL_PRIORITY (1 << 11)     /* dwChannelPriority is valid */
#define DMUS_IO_INST_USE_DEFAULT_GM_SET (1 << 12)   /* Always use the default GM set for this patch,  */

// multimedia\directx\dxvb\dx7vb\inc\dmusici.h
#define DMUS_OBJ_OBJECT         (1 << 0)     /* Object GUID is valid. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_CLASS          (1 << 1)     /* Class GUID is valid. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_NAME           (1 << 2)     /* Name is valid. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_CATEGORY       (1 << 3)     /* Category is valid. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_FILENAME       (1 << 4)     /* File path is valid. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_FULLPATH       (1 << 5)     /* Path is full path. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_URL            (1 << 6)     /* Path is URL. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_VERSION        (1 << 7)     /* Version is valid. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_DATE           (1 << 8)     /* Date is valid. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_LOADED         (1 << 9)     /* Object is currently loaded in memory. */
#define DMUS_OBJ_MEMORY         (1 << 10)    /* Object is pointed to by pbMemData. */
#define DMUSB_LOADED    (1 << 0)        /* Set when band has been loaded */
#define DMUSB_DEFAULT   (1 << 1)        /* Set when band is default band for a style */

// multimedia\directx\dxvb\dx7vb\inc\dsound.h
#define DSSPEAKER_COMBINED(c, g)    ((DWORD)(((BYTE)(c)) | ((DWORD)((BYTE)(g))) << 16))

  #define FCC(dw) (((dw & 0xFF) << 24) | ((dw & 0xFF00) << 8) | ((dw & 0xFF0000) >> 8) | ((dw & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

#define IsVideoHeaderPrepared(hVideo, lpwh)      ((lpwh)->dwFlags &  VHDR_PREPARED)
#define MarkVideoHeaderPrepared(hVideo, lpwh)    ((lpwh)->dwFlags |= VHDR_PREPARED)
#define MarkVideoHeaderUnprepared(hVideo, lpwh)  ((lpwh)->dwFlags &=~VHDR_PREPARED)

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\dec\dec.cpp
#define FCC(ch4) ((((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF) << 24) |     \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\midi\smfi.h
#define DWORDSWAP(dw) \
    ((((dw)>>24)&0x000000FFL)|\
    (((dw)>>8)&0x0000FF00L)|\
    (((dw)<<8)&0x00FF0000L)|\
    (((dw)<<24)&0xFF000000L))
#define WORDSWAP(w) \
    ((((w)>>8)&0x00FF)|\
    (((w)<<8)&0xFF00))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\decode\mjpeg.cpp
#define FCC(ch4) ((((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF) << 24) |     \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jccolor.c
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jdcolor.c
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jdct.h
#define CONST_SCALE (ONE << CONST_BITS)
#define DESCALE(x,n)  RIGHT_SHIFT((x) + (ONE << ((n)-1)), n)

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jdhuff.c
#define check_bit_buffer(state,nbits,action) \
	{ if ((state).cur.bits_left < (nbits))  \
	    if (! fill_bit_buffer(&(state), nbits))  \
	      { action; } }
#define get_bits(state,nbits) \
	(((int) ((state).cur.get_buffer >> ((state).cur.bits_left -= (nbits)))) & ((1<<(nbits))-1))
#define peek_bits(state,nbits) \
	(((int) ((state).cur.get_buffer >> ((state).cur.bits_left -  (nbits)))) & ((1<<(nbits))-1))
#define huff_EXTEND(x,s)  ((x) < (1<<((s)-1)) ? (x) + (((-1)<<(s)) + 1) : (x))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jdmarker.c
#define INPUT_2BYTES(cinfo,V,action)  \
	MAKESTMT( MAKE_BYTE_AVAIL(cinfo,action); \
		  V = ((unsigned int) GETJOCTET(*next_input_byte++)) << 8; \
		  MAKE_BYTE_AVAIL(cinfo,action); \
		  V += GETJOCTET(*next_input_byte++); )

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jdmerge.c
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jidctfst.c
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
	((ishift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
	 (ishift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~((DCTELEM) 0)) << (32-(shft))) : \
	 (ishift_temp >> (shft)))
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)	((x) >> (shft))
#define IDESCALE(x,n)  ((int) IRIGHT_SHIFT((x) + (1 << ((n)-1)), n))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jpegint.h
#define RIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
	((shift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
	 (shift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~((INT32) 0)) << (32-(shft))) : \
	 (shift_temp >> (shft)))
#define RIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)	((x) >> (shft))
#define DIB_PARM_LOAD \
  /* put these someplace faster */ \
  /* REDONE: modified to suppress type-check warning -anuragsh */ \
  pixel_size = (UINT8) cinfo->pixel_size; \
  pixel_mask = cinfo->pixel_mask; \
  red_table = cinfo->red_table; \
  green_table = cinfo->green_table; \
  blue_table = cinfo->blue_table;

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\jquant2.c
#define HIST_C0_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C0_BITS)
#define HIST_C1_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C1_BITS)
#define HIST_C2_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C2_BITS)
#define STEP_C0  ((1 << C0_SHIFT) * C0_SCALE)
#define STEP_C1  ((1 << C1_SHIFT) * C1_SCALE)
#define STEP_C2  ((1 << C2_SHIFT) * C2_SCALE)

// multimedia\dshow\filters\avi\mjpeg\pmjpeg32\tools16_inc\compddk.h
#define mmioFOURCC( ch0, ch1, ch2, ch3 )				\
		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8 ) |	\
		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16 ) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ) )
#define aviTWOCC(ch0, ch1) ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\core\builder2\ks.h
#define KSDATAFORMAT_TEMPORAL_COMPRESSION       (1 << KSDATAFORMAT_BIT_TEMPORAL_COMPRESSION)
#define DEFINE_KSCREATE_ITEMEX(DispatchCreate, TypeName, Context, Flags)\
{\
    (DispatchCreate),\
    (PVOID)(Context),\
    {\
        sizeof(TypeName) - sizeof(UNICODE_NULL),\
        sizeof(TypeName),\
        (PWCHAR)(TypeName)\
    },\
    NULL, (Flags)\
}

#define FCC(ch4) ((((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF) << 24) |     \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\dv\dvsp\dvsp.cpp
#define FCC(ch4) ((((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF) << 24) |     \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF00) << 8) |    \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF0000) >> 8) |  \
                  (((DWORD)(ch4) & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\image2\vmrplyer\commands.cpp
#define DibNumColors(lpbi)      ((lpbi)->biClrUsed == 0 && (lpbi)->biBitCount <= 8 \
                                    ? (int)(1 << (int)(lpbi)->biBitCount)          \
                                    : (int)(lpbi)->biClrUsed)

// multimedia\dshow\filters\image\colour\rgb16.cpp
#define DITH565(x,y,rgb)                                     \
    (g_DitherMap[0][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(((rgb)>>8)&0xF8)] +   \
     g_DitherMap[1][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(((rgb)>>3)&0xFC)] +   \
     g_DitherMap[2][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(((rgb)<<3)&0xF8)])
#define DITH555(x,y,rgb)                                       \
    (g_DitherMap[0][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(((rgb)>>7)&0xF8)] +     \
     g_DitherMap[1][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(((rgb)>>2)&0xF8)] +     \
     g_DitherMap[2][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(((rgb)<<3)&0xF8)])

// multimedia\dshow\filters\image\colour\rgb32.cpp
#define DITH32(x,y,rgb)                                      \
    (g_DitherMap[0][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(BYTE)((rgb)>>16)] +   \
     g_DitherMap[1][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(BYTE)((rgb)>>8)] +    \
     g_DitherMap[2][((x)&3)][((y)&3)][(BYTE)((rgb))])

// multimedia\dshow\filters\image\vidprop\vidprop.cpp
#define GETSWITCH(x,flag,sw) {if (x == TRUE) sw |= flag;}

// multimedia\dshow\filters\lin21dec2\l21decod.h
#define ISSUBTYPEVALID(ID) (AM_L21_CCSUBTYPEID_BytePair   == ID || \
                            AM_L21_CCSUBTYPEID_GOPPacket  == ID || \
                            AM_L21_CCSUBTYPEID_VBIRawData == ID)

// multimedia\dshow\filters\lin21dec2\l21dfilt.h
#define GETGOPUD_NUMELEMENTS(pGOPUDPacket) ((pGOPUDPacket)->Header.bTopField_Rsrvd_NumElems & 0x3F)
#define GETGOPUD_PACKETSIZE(pGOPUDPacket)  (LONG)(sizeof(AM_L21_GOPUD_HEADER) + GETGOPUD_NUMELEMENTS(pGOPUDPacket) * sizeof(AM_L21_GOPUD_ELEMENT))
#define GETGOPUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS(Elem)     ((((Elem).bMarker_Switch & 0xFE) >> 1) & 0x7F)
#define GETGOPUD_ELEM_SWITCHBITS(Elem)     ((Elem).bMarker_Switch & 0x01)
#define GETGOPUD_L21STARTCODE(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[0]) << 24 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[1]) << 16 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[2]) <<  8 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[3]) )
#define GETGOPUD_L21INDICATOR(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21Indicator[0]) << 8 |  \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Indicator[1]) )
#define GETGOPUD_L21RESERVED(Header)              \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21Reserved[0]) << 8  |  \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Reserved[1]) )
#define ISGOPUD_TOPFIELDFIRST(pGOPUDPacket)  ((pGOPUDPacket)->Header.bTopField_Rsrvd_NumElems & 0x80)
#define GETATSCUD_NUMELEMENTS(pATSCUDPacket) ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_CC_COUNT_MASK)
#define GETATSCUD_PACKETSIZE(pATSCUDPacket)  (LONG)(sizeof(AM_L21_ATSCUD_HEADER) + \
                                              GETATSCUD_NUMELEMENTS(pATSCUDPacket) * sizeof(AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEMENT) + \
                                              sizeof(BYTE))
#define GETATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS(Elem)     (((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS) >> 3)
#define GETATSCUD_STARTCODE(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[0]) << 24 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[1]) << 16 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[2]) <<  8 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[3]) )
#define GETATSCUD_IDENTIFIER(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[0]) << 24 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[1]) << 16 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[2]) <<  8 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[3]) )
#define ISATSCUD_TYPE_EIA(pATSCUDPacket)  (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_TYPECODE_EIA == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21UDTypeCode & 0xFF))
#define ISATSCUD_EM_DATA(pATSCUDPacket)   (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_EM_DATA_FLAG == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_EM_DATA_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_CC_DATA(pATSCUDPacket)   (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_CC_DATA_FLAG == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_CC_DATA_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_ADDL_DATA(pATSCUDPacket) (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_ADDL_DATA_FLAG == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_ADDL_DATA_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS_VALID(Elem)     (AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS == \
                                        ((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS))
#define ISATSCUD_ELEM_CCVALID(Elem)  (AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_VALID_FLAG == \
                                        ((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_VALID_FLAG))
#define GETATSCUD_ELEM_CCTYPE(Elem)    (DWORD)((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_TYPE_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_MARKER_BITSVALID(pATSCUDPacket) (AM_L21_ATSCUD_MARKERBITS == \
                                       ((pATSCUDPacket)->bMarkerBits & AM_L21_ATSCUD_MARKERBITS))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\lin21dec\l21decod.h
#define ISSUBTYPEVALID(ID) (AM_L21_CCSUBTYPEID_BytePair   == ID || \
                            AM_L21_CCSUBTYPEID_GOPPacket  == ID || \
                            AM_L21_CCSUBTYPEID_VBIRawData == ID)

// multimedia\dshow\filters\lin21dec\l21dfilt.h
#define GETGOPUD_NUMELEMENTS(pGOPUDPacket) ((pGOPUDPacket)->Header.bTopField_Rsrvd_NumElems & 0x3F)
#define GETGOPUD_PACKETSIZE(pGOPUDPacket)  (LONG)(sizeof(AM_L21_GOPUD_HEADER) + GETGOPUD_NUMELEMENTS(pGOPUDPacket) * sizeof(AM_L21_GOPUD_ELEMENT))
#define GETGOPUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS(Elem)     ((((Elem).bMarker_Switch & 0xFE) >> 1) & 0x7F)
#define GETGOPUD_ELEM_SWITCHBITS(Elem)     ((Elem).bMarker_Switch & 0x01)
#define GETGOPUD_L21STARTCODE(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[0]) << 24 | \
    (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[1]) << 16 | \
    (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[2]) <<  8 | \
(DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[3]) )
#define GETGOPUD_L21INDICATOR(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21Indicator[0]) << 8 |  \
(DWORD)((Header).abL21Indicator[1]) )
#define GETGOPUD_L21RESERVED(Header)              \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21Reserved[0]) << 8  |  \
(DWORD)((Header).abL21Reserved[1]) )
#define ISGOPUD_TOPFIELDFIRST(pGOPUDPacket)  ((pGOPUDPacket)->Header.bTopField_Rsrvd_NumElems & 0x80)
#define GETATSCUD_NUMELEMENTS(pATSCUDPacket) ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_CC_COUNT_MASK)
#define GETATSCUD_PACKETSIZE(pATSCUDPacket)  (LONG)(sizeof(AM_L21_ATSCUD_HEADER) + \
                                              GETATSCUD_NUMELEMENTS(pATSCUDPacket) * sizeof(AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEMENT) + \
                                              sizeof(BYTE))
#define GETATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS(Elem)     (((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS) >> 3)
#define GETATSCUD_STARTCODE(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[0]) << 24 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[1]) << 16 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[2]) <<  8 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21StartCode[3]) )
#define GETATSCUD_IDENTIFIER(Header)             \
    ( (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[0]) << 24 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[1]) << 16 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[2]) <<  8 | \
      (DWORD)((Header).abL21Identifier[3]) )
#define ISATSCUD_TYPE_EIA(pATSCUDPacket)  (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_TYPECODE_EIA == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21UDTypeCode & 0xFF))
#define ISATSCUD_EM_DATA(pATSCUDPacket)   (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_EM_DATA_FLAG == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_EM_DATA_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_CC_DATA(pATSCUDPacket)   (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_CC_DATA_FLAG == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_CC_DATA_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_ADDL_DATA(pATSCUDPacket) (AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_ADDL_DATA_FLAG == \
                                     ((pATSCUDPacket)->Header.bL21DataFlags_Count & AM_L21_ATSCUD_HDR_ADDL_DATA_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS_VALID(Elem)     (AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS == \
                                        ((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_MARKERBITS))
#define ISATSCUD_ELEM_CCVALID(Elem)  (AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_VALID_FLAG == \
                                        ((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_VALID_FLAG))
#define GETATSCUD_ELEM_CCTYPE(Elem)    (DWORD)((Elem).bCCMarker_Valid_Type & AM_L21_ATSCUD_ELEM_TYPE_FLAG))
#define ISATSCUD_MARKER_BITSVALID(pATSCUDPacket) (AM_L21_ATSCUD_MARKERBITS == \
                                       ((pATSCUDPacket)->bMarkerBits & AM_L21_ATSCUD_MARKERBITS))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\lin21dec\l21dgdi.cpp
#define SETPALETTECOLOR(pe, r, g, b)  pe.peRed = r ; pe.peGreen = g ; pe.peBlue = b ; pe.peFlags = 0 ;

// multimedia\dshow\filters\mixer\ovmixer\omfilter.cpp
#define MAKE_VER_NUM( v1, v2, v3, v4 ) (((UINT64(v1) << 16 | (v2) )<<16 | (v3) ) << 16 | (v4) )

// multimedia\dshow\filters\mpeg1\inc\mpegdef.h
#define VALID_PACKET(data)      (((data) >= PACKET_START_CODE_MIN)  \
                              && ((data) <= PACKET_START_CODE_MAX))
#define VALID_SYSTEM_START_CODE(data)     \
       (VALID_PACKET(data)                \
    ||  (data) == SYSTEM_HEADER_START_CODE\
    ||  (data) == PACK_START_CODE         \
    ||  (data) == ISO_11172_END_CODE)
#define DWORD_SWAP(x) \
     ((DWORD)( ((x) << 24) | ((x) >> 24) | \
               (((x) & 0xFF00) << 8) | (((x) & 0xFF0000) >> 8)))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\sbe\dvrfilters\shared\dvrprof.cpp
#define DVR_NTOHL(l)                                    \
                    ( (((l) & 0xFF000000) >> 24)    |   \
                      (((l) & 0x00FF0000) >> 8)     |   \
                      (((l) & 0x0000FF00) << 8)     |   \
                      (((l) & 0x000000FF) << 24) )

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\atvefsend\crc32.c
#define DO1(buf) crc = crc_table[((int)crc ^ (*buf++)) & 0xff] ^ (crc >> 8);

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\atvefsend\deflate.c
#define UPDATE_HASH(s,h,c) (h = (((h)<<s->hash_shift) ^ (c)) & s->hash_mask)
#define INSERT_STRING(s, str, match_head) \
   (UPDATE_HASH(s, s->ins_h, s->window[(str) + (MIN_MATCH-1)]), \
    s->prev[(str) & s->w_mask] = match_head = s->head[s->ins_h], \
    s->head[s->ins_h] = (Pos)(str))

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\atvefsend\mgatesdefs.h
#define VALID_MULTICAST_IP(ip)                  (((ip) >> 24) >= 0xE0)

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\atvefsend\trees.c
#  define send_code(s, c, tree) \
     { if (verbose>2) fprintf(stderr,"\ncd %3d ",(c)); \
       send_bits(s, tree[c].Code, tree[c].Len); }
#define d_code(dist) \
   ((dist) < 256 ? dist_code[dist] : dist_code[256+((dist)>>7)])
#define put_short(s, w) { \
    put_byte(s, (uch)((w) & 0xff)); \
    put_byte(s, (uch)((ush)(w) >> 8)); \
}
#define send_bits(s, value, length) \
{ int len = length;\
  if (s->bi_valid > (int)Buf_size - len) {\
    int val = value;\
    s->bi_buf |= (val << s->bi_valid);\
    put_short(s, s->bi_buf);\
    s->bi_buf = (ush) ((ush)val >> (Buf_size - s->bi_valid));\
    s->bi_valid += len - Buf_size;\
  } else {\
    s->bi_buf |= (value) << s->bi_valid;\
    s->bi_valid += len;\
  }\
}

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\atvefsend\trees.cpp
#  define send_code(s, c, tree) \
     { if (verbose>2) fprintf(stderr,"\ncd %3d ",(c)); \
       send_bits(s, tree[c].Code, tree[c].Len); }
#define d_code(dist) \
   ((dist) < 256 ? dist_code[dist] : dist_code[256+((dist)>>7)])
#define put_short(s, w) { \
    put_byte(s, (uch)((w) & 0xff)); \
    put_byte(s, (uch)((ush)(w) >> 8)); \
}
#define send_bits(s, value, length) \
{ int len = length;\
  if (s->bi_valid > (int)Buf_size - len) {\
    int val = value;\
    s->bi_buf |= (val << s->bi_valid);\
    put_short(s, s->bi_buf);\
    s->bi_buf = (ush)val >> (Buf_size - s->bi_valid);\
    s->bi_valid += len - Buf_size;\
  } else {\
    s->bi_buf |= (value) << s->bi_valid;\
    s->bi_valid += len;\
  }\
}

#define DO1(buf) crc = crc_table[((int)crc ^ (*buf++)) & 0xff] ^ (crc >> 8);

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\mstve\inffast.c
#define GRABBITS(j) {while(k<(j)){b|=((uLong)NEXTBYTE)<<k;k+=8;}}
#define UNGRAB {n+=(c=k>>3);p-=c;k&=7;}

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\mstve\infutil.h
#define NEEDBITS(j) {while(k<(j)){NEEDBYTE;b|=((uLong)NEXTBYTE)<<k;k+=8;}}
#define DUMPBITS(j) {b>>=(j);k-=(j);}

// multimedia\dshow\filters\tve\mstve\tvefiltprops.cpp
#define _CHGFLAGS(theFlag, runFlags, haltFlags) \
{										\
	lGrfHaltFlags ^= theFlag;			\
	if(lGrfHaltFlags & theFlag)		\
		lGrfHaltFlags |= (haltFlags);	\
	else								\
		lGrfHaltFlags &= ~(runFlags);	\
	m_pITVEFilter->put_HaltFlags(lGrfHaltFlags); \
	UpdateFields(); \
}

	if(flag) grf |= (bitfield); else grf &= ~(bitfield);

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jccolor.c
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jcphuff.c
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
	((ishift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
	 (ishift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~0) << (16-(shft))) : \
	 (ishift_temp >> (shft)))
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)	((x) >> (shft))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jdcolor.c
#define SCALE_RND       (1 << (SCALE_PREC - 1))
#define SCALE           (1 << SCALE_PREC)
#define unscale(x)      (((x) + SCALE_RND) >> SCALE_PREC)
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jdct.h
#define CONST_SCALE (ONE << CONST_BITS)
#define DESCALE(x,n)  RIGHT_SHIFT((x) + (ONE << ((n)-1)), n)

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jdhuff.c
#define HUFF_EXTEND(x,s)  ((x) < (1<<((s)-1)) ? (x) + (((-1)<<(s)) + 1) : (x))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jdhuff.h
#define BITREAD_SAVE_STATE(cinfop,permstate)  \
	cinfop->src->next_input_byte = br_state.next_input_byte; \
	cinfop->src->bytes_in_buffer = br_state.bytes_in_buffer; \
	cinfop->unread_marker = br_state.unread_marker; \
	permstate.get_buffer = get_buffer; \
	permstate.bits_left = bits_left
#define CHECK_BIT_BUFFER(state,nbits,action) \
	{ if (bits_left < (nbits)) {  \
	    if (! jpeg_fill_bit_buffer(&(state),get_buffer,bits_left,nbits))  \
	      { action; }  \
	    get_buffer = (state).get_buffer; bits_left = (state).bits_left; } }
#define GET_BITS(nbits) \
	(((int) (get_buffer >> (bits_left -= (nbits)))) & ((1<<(nbits))-1))
#define PEEK_BITS(nbits) \
	(((int) (get_buffer >> (bits_left -  (nbits)))) & ((1<<(nbits))-1))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jdmarker.c
#define INPUT_2BYTES(cinfo,V,action)  \
	MAKESTMT( MAKE_BYTE_AVAIL(cinfo,action); \
		  V = ((unsigned int) GETJOCTET(*next_input_byte++)) << 8; \
		  MAKE_BYTE_AVAIL(cinfo,action); \
		  V += GETJOCTET(*next_input_byte++); )

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jdmerge.c
#define ONE_HALF	((INT32) 1 << (SCALEBITS-1))
#define FIX(x)		((INT32) ((x) * (1L<<SCALEBITS) + 0.5))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jdphuff.c
#define HUFF_EXTEND(x,s)  ((x) < (1<<((s)-1)) ? (x) + (((-1)<<(s)) + 1) : (x))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jidctfst.c
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
    ((ishift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
     (ishift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~((DCTELEM) 0)) << (DCTELEMBITS-(shft))) : \
     (ishift_temp >> (shft)))
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)	((x) >> (shft))
#define IDESCALE(x,n)  ((int) IRIGHT_SHIFT((x) + (1 << ((n)-1)), n))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jpegint.h
#define RIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
	((shift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
	 (shift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~((INT32) 0)) << (32-(shft))) : \
	 (shift_temp >> (shft)))
#define RIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)	((x) >> (shft))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\jquant2.c
#define HIST_C0_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C0_BITS)
#define HIST_C1_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C1_BITS)
#define HIST_C2_ELEMS  (1<<HIST_C2_BITS)
#define STEP_C0  ((1 << C0_SHIFT) * C0_SCALE)
#define STEP_C1  ((1 << C1_SHIFT) * C1_SCALE)
#define STEP_C2  ((1 << C2_SHIFT) * C2_SCALE)

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\mifst.c
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
    ((ishift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \

     (ishift_temp >> (shft)))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\pifst.c
#define IRIGHT_SHIFT(x,shft)  \
    ((ishift_temp = (x)) < 0 ? \
     (ishift_temp >> (shft)) | ((~((DCTELEM) 0)) << (DCTELEMBITS-(shft))) : \
     (ishift_temp >> (shft)))

#define LZW_TABLE_SIZE	(1<<MAX_LZW_BITS) /* # of possible LZW symbols */

#define BitSet(byte, bit)	((byte) & (bit))
#define UPSCALE(x)  ((x) << (BITS_IN_JSAMPLE-8))

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\dexter\jpeglib\wrgif.c
#define LZW_TABLE_SIZE	((code_int) 1 << MAX_LZW_BITS)

#define CHAR_OUT(dinfo,c)  \
	{ (dinfo)->packetbuf[++(dinfo)->bytesinpkt] = (char) (c);  \
	    if ((dinfo)->bytesinpkt >= 255)  \
	      flush_packet(dinfo);  \
	}

// multimedia\dshow\filterus\midi\midirdr\smfi.h
#define DWORDSWAP(dw) \
    ((((dw)>>24)&0x000000FFL)|\
    (((dw)>>8)&0x0000FF00L)|\
    (((dw)<<8)&0x00FF0000L)|\
    (((dw)<<24)&0xFF000000L))
#define WORDSWAP(w) \
    ((((w)>>8)&0x00FF)|\
    (((w)<<8)&0xFF00))

#define CONVERT_PERFORMANCE_TIME(Frequency, PerformanceTime) \
    ((((ULONGLONG)(ULONG)(PerformanceTime).HighPart * NANOSECONDS / (Frequency)) << 32) + \
    ((((((ULONGLONG)(ULONG)(PerformanceTime).HighPart * NANOSECONDS) % (Frequency)) << 32) + \
    ((ULONGLONG)(PerformanceTime).LowPart * NANOSECONDS)) / (Frequency)))

#define F_WRITE_CACHE  (1 << 7)
#define F_READ_CACHE   (1 << 6)

#define  IN_SIZE     (1 << IN_DEPTH) // max value of a color component
#define hist(r,g,b)  ((DWORD huge *)glpHistogram)[(WORD)(b) | ((WORD)(g)<<IN_DEPTH) | ((WORD)(r)<<(IN_DEPTH*2))]

// multimedia\media\avi\avicap.16\dibmap.h
#define RGB16(r,g,b) (\
            (((WORD)(r) >> 3) << 10) |  \
            (((WORD)(g) >> 3) << 5)  |  \
            (((WORD)(b) >> 3) << 0)  )

// multimedia\media\avi\avicap.16\iaverage.c
#define RGB16(r,g,b)      ((((WORD)(r) >> 3) << 10) | \
                          (((WORD)(g) >> 3) << 5)  | \
                          (((WORD)(b) >> 3) ) )
#define SumRGB16(b0,b1,b2,b3) (\
             ((((WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b0].peRed +         \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b1].peRed +         \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b2].peRed +         \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b3].peRed)          \
                & 0x03E) << 5) |                          \
                                                          \
             ((((WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b0].peGreen +       \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b1].peGreen +       \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b2].peGreen +       \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b3].peGreen)        \
                & 0x003E)) |                              \
                                                          \
             ((((WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b0].peBlue +        \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b1].peBlue +        \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b2].peBlue +        \
                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b3].peBlue)         \
                & 0x003E) >> 5) )
#define rgb16(r,g,b) (\
            ((UINT)(r) << 10) |  \
            ((UINT)(g) << 5)  |  \
            ((UINT)(b) << 0)  )
#define RGB16R(rgb)     aw5to8[((UINT)(rgb) >> 10) & 0x1F]
#define RGB16G(rgb)     aw5to8[((UINT)(rgb) >> 5)  & 0x1F]
#define RGB16B(rgb)     aw5to8[((UINT)(rgb) >> 0)  & 0x1F]
#define RGB16r(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 10) & 0x1F)
#define RGB16g(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 5)  & 0x1F)
#define RGB16b(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 0)  & 0x1F)
#define Pel(p,x) (BYTE)(BitCount == 1 ? Pel1(p,x) : \
                        BitCount == 4 ? Pel4(p,x) : Pel8(p,x))
#define Pel4(p,x)   (BYTE)((x & 1) ? (((HPBYTE)(p))[(x)/2] & 15) : (((HPBYTE)(p))[(x)/2] >> 4))

// multimedia\media\avi\avicap.io\capavi.c
  #define MAKEFOURCC(a,b,c,d) ((DWORD)(a) | ((DWORD)(b) << 8) | ((DWORD)(c) << 16) | ((DWORD)(d) << 24))
 #define RIFFTYPE(dw) (((dw & 0xFF) << 24) | ((dw & 0xFF00) << 8) | ((dw & 0xFF0000) >> 8) | ((dw & 0xFF000000) >> 24))

                (WORD)pal.palPalEntry[b2].peBlue +        \

#define RGB16G(rgb)     aw5to8[((UINT)(rgb) >> 5)  & 0x1F]

#define RGB16g(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 5)  & 0x1F)
#define RGB16b(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 0)  & 0x1F)

// multimedia\media\avi\avifile.16\aviidx.h
#define MAX_LENGTH  (1l<<24)
#define MAX_STREAM  (1l<<7)
#define IndexLength(px, lx)         (LONG)((Index(px,lx).length) >> 8)
#define IndexStream(px, lx)         (BYTE)((Index(px,lx).flags & IDX_STREAM) >> 8)
#define IndexSetLength(px, lx, x)   { Index(px,lx).length &= ~0xFFFFFF00; Index(px,lx).length |= (DWORD)(x)<<8; }
#define IndexSetStream(px, lx, x)   { Index(px,lx).flags  &= ~IDX_STREAM; Index(px,lx).flags  |= (DWORD)(x)<<8; }
#define IndexSetFlags(px, lx, x)    { Index(px,lx).flags  &= IDX_STREAM|IDX_OFFHI; Index(px,lx).flags |= (UINT)(x); }
#define IndexSetKey(px, lx)         { Index(px,lx).flags  |= IDX_KEY; Index(px,lx).flags &= ~(IDX_NONKEY); }

// multimedia\media\avi\avifile.16\riffdisp.c
#define DibSizeImage(lpbi) (\
    (DWORD)(UINT)((((int)lpbi->biBitCount*(int)lpbi->biWidth+31)&~31)>>3) * \
    (DWORD)(UINT)lpbi->biHeight)
#define DibNumColors(lpbi) \
    (lpbi->biBitCount <= 8 ? (1 << (int)lpbi->biBitCount) : 0)

#define IndexSetLength(px, lx, x)   { Index(px,lx).length &= ~0xFFFFFF00; Index(px,lx).length |= (DWORD)(x)<<8; }
#define IndexSetStream(px, lx, x)   { Index(px,lx).flags  &= ~IDX_STREAM; Index(px,lx).flags  |= (DWORD)(x)<<8; }
#define IndexSetFlags(px, lx, x)    { Index(px,lx).flags  &= IDX_STREAM|IDX_OFFHI; Index(px,lx).flags |= (UINT)(x); }
#define IndexSetKey(px, lx)         { Index(px,lx).flags  |= IDX_KEY; Index(px,lx).flags &= ~(IDX_NONKEY); }

// multimedia\media\avi\avifile\aviview\cdib.c
#define bit(b,n) (BYTE)(((b) & (1 << (n))) >> (n))
#define SumRGB(b0,b1,b2,b3) RGB(\
        ((int)pal.palPalEntry[b0].peRed +        \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b1].peRed +        \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b2].peRed +        \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b3].peRed) >> 2,   \
                                                 \
        ((int)pal.palPalEntry[b0].peGreen +      \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b1].peGreen +      \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b2].peGreen +      \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b3].peGreen) >> 2, \
                                                  \
        ((int)pal.palPalEntry[b0].peBlue +       \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b1].peBlue +       \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b2].peBlue +       \
         (int)pal.palPalEntry[b3].peBlue) >> 2)
#define RGB16(r,g,b) (\
            (((UINT)(r) >> 3) << 10) |  \
            (((UINT)(g) >> 3) << 5)  |  \
            (((UINT)(b) >> 3) << 0)  )
#define rgb16(r,g,b) (\
            ((UINT)(r) << 10) |  \
            ((UINT)(g) << 5)  |  \
            ((UINT)(b) << 0)  )
#define RGB16R(rgb)     aw5to8[((UINT)(rgb) >> 10) & 0x1F]
#define RGB16G(rgb)     aw5to8[((UINT)(rgb) >> 5)  & 0x1F]
#define RGB16B(rgb)     aw5to8[((UINT)(rgb) >> 0)  & 0x1F]
#define RGB16r(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 10) & 0x1F)
#define RGB16g(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 5)  & 0x1F)
#define RGB16b(rgb)     ((BYTE)((UINT)(rgb) >> 0)  & 0x1F)
#define Pel(p,x) (BYTE)(BitCount == 1 ? Pel1(p,x) : \
                        BitCount == 4 ? Pel4(p,x) : Pel8(p,x))
#define Pel1(p,x)   (BYTE)bit(((LPBYTE)(p))[(x)/8],7-((x)%8))
#define Pel4(p,x)   (BYTE)((x & 1) ? (((LPBYTE)(p))[(x)/2] & 15) : (((LPBYTE)(p))[(x)/2] >> 4))

// multimedia\media\avi\avifile\aviview\dibmap.c
#define  IN_SIZE     (1 << IN_DEPTH) // max value of a color component

#define RGB16(r,g,b) (\
            (((WORD)(r) >> 3) << 10) |  \
            (((WORD)(g) >> 3) << 5)  |  \
            (((WORD)(b) >> 3) << 0)  )

// multimedia\media\avi\avifile\riffdisp.c
#define DibSizeImage(lpbi) (\

    (DWORD)(UINT)lpbi->biHeight)
#define DibNumColors(lpbi) \
    (lpbi->biBitCount <= 8 ? (1 << (int)lpbi->biBitCount) : 0)

#define mmioFOURCC( ch0, ch1, ch2, ch3 )				\
		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8 ) |	\
		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16 ) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ) )
#define aviTWOCC(ch0, ch1) ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8))

// multimedia\media\avi\compman.16\compman.c

// multimedia\media\avi\compman.16\compman.h
#define ICDecompressEx(hic, dwFlags, lpbiSrc, lpSrc, xSrc, ySrc, dxSrc, dySrc, lpbiDst, lpDst, xDst, yDst, dxDst, dyDst) \
    ICMessage(hic, ICM_DECOMPRESSEX, sizeof(ICDECOMPRESSEX), \
        (DWORD)(dwFlags), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiSrc), (LPVOID)(lpSrc), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiDst), (LPVOID)(lpDst), \
        (int)(xDst), (int)(yDst), (int)(dxDst), (int)(dyDst), \
        (int)(xSrc), (int)(ySrc), (int)(dxSrc), (int)(dySrc))
#define ICDecompressExBegin(hic, dwFlags, lpbiSrc, lpSrc, xSrc, ySrc, dxSrc, dySrc, lpbiDst, lpDst, xDst, yDst, dxDst, dyDst) \
    ICMessage(hic, ICM_DECOMPRESSEX_BEGIN, sizeof(ICDECOMPRESSEX), \
        (DWORD)(dwFlags), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiSrc), (LPVOID)(lpSrc), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiDst), (LPVOID)(lpDst), \
        (int)(xDst), (int)(yDst), (int)(dxDst), (int)(dyDst), \
        (int)(xSrc), (int)(ySrc), (int)(dxSrc), (int)(dySrc))
#define ICDecompressExQuery(hic, dwFlags, lpbiSrc, lpSrc, xSrc, ySrc, dxSrc, dySrc, lpbiDst, lpDst, xDst, yDst, dxDst, dyDst) \
    ICMessage(hic, ICM_DECOMPRESSEX_QUERY,  sizeof(ICDECOMPRESSEX), \
        (DWORD)(dwFlags), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiSrc), (LPVOID)(lpSrc), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiDst), (LPVOID)(lpDst), \
        (int)(xDst), (int)(yDst), (int)(dxDst), (int)(dyDst), \
        (int)(xSrc), (int)(ySrc), (int)(dxSrc), (int)(dySrc))
#define ICDrawSuggestFormat(hic,lpbiIn,lpbiOut,dxSrc,dySrc,dxDst,dyDst,hicDecomp) \
        ICMessage(hic, ICM_DRAW_SUGGESTFORMAT, sizeof(ICDRAWSUGGEST),   \
            (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiIn),(LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiOut), \
            (int)(dxSrc),(int)(dySrc),(int)(dxDst),(int)(dyDst), (HIC)(hicDecomp))

#define DibWidthBytes(lpbi)     (UINT)WIDTHBYTES((UINT)(lpbi)->biWidth * (UINT)((lpbi)->biBitCount))
#define DibNumColors(lpbi)      ((lpbi)->biClrUsed == 0 && (lpbi)->biBitCount <= 8 \
                                    ? (int)(1 << (int)(lpbi)->biBitCount)          \
                                    : (int)(lpbi)->biClrUsed)

#define DITH5(x,y,rgb)  aTranslate666[            \
    aHalftone5[0][(x)&3][(y)&3][((rgb)>>8)&0xFF] +\
    aHalftone5[1][(x)&3][(y)&3][((rgb)>>5)&0xFF] +\
    aHalftone5[2][(x)&3][(y)&3][((rgb)>>0)&0xFF] ]

// multimedia\media\avi\drawdib.16\dith775.c
#define DITHER24(mr, mg, mb) \
    GET24(); *pbD++ = (BYTE)lookup775[ rdith775[r +  mr] + gdith775[g +  mg] + ((b +  mb) >> 6) ];
#define DITHER32(mr, mg, mb) \
    GET32(); *pbD++ = (BYTE)lookup775[ rdith775[r +  mr] + gdith775[g +  mg] + ((b +  mb) >> 6) ];
#define GET16() \
    w = *((WORD _huge *)pbS)++;  \
    r = (int)((w >> 7) & 0xF8); \
    g = (int)((w >> 2) & 0xF8); \
    b = (int)((w << 3) & 0xF8);
#define DITHER16(mr, mg, mb) \
    GET16(); *pbD++ = (BYTE)lookup775[ rdith775[r +  mr] + gdith775[g +  mg] + ((b +  mb) >> 6)];

// multimedia\media\avi\drawdib.16\drawdib.c
#define Is565(bi)   (((bi)->biCompression == BI_BITFIELDS) &&   \
		    ((bi)->biBitCount == 16) &&			\
		    (((LPDWORD)((bi)+1))[0] == 0x00F800) &&	\
		    (((LPDWORD)((bi)+1))[1] == 0x0007E0) &&	\
		    (((LPDWORD)((bi)+1))[2] == 0x00001F) )

// multimedia\media\avi\drawdib.16\drawdibi.h
#define DDF_BEGINFLAGS      (DDF_JUSTDRAWIT | DDF_BUFFER | DDF_ANIMATE | DDF_FULLSCREEN | DDF_HALFTONE)

// multimedia\media\avi\drawdib.16\setdi.c
#define RGB565(r,g,b) (\
            (((WORD)(r) >> 3) << 11) |  \
            (((WORD)(g) >> 2) << 5)  |  \
            (((WORD)(b) >> 3) << 0)  )

// multimedia\media\avi\drawdib\dith666.h
#define DITH5(x,y,rgb)  aTranslate666[            \
    aHalftone5[0][(x)&3][(y)&3][((rgb)>>8)&0xFF] +\
    aHalftone5[1][(x)&3][(y)&3][((rgb)>>5)&0xFF] +\
    aHalftone5[2][(x)&3][(y)&3][((rgb)>>0)&0xFF] ]

    GET24(); *pbD++ = (BYTE)lookup775[ rdith775[r +  mr] + gdith775[g +  mg] + ((b +  mb) >> 6) ];
#define DITHER32(mr, mg, mb) \
    GET32(); *pbD++ = (BYTE)lookup775[ rdith775[r +  mr] + gdith775[g +  mg] + ((b +  mb) >> 6) ];
#define GET16() \
    w = *((WORD _huge *)pbS)++;  \
    r = (int)((w >> 7) & 0xF8); \
    g = (int)((w >> 2) & 0xF8); \
    b = (int)((w << 3) & 0xF8);
#define DITHER16(mr, mg, mb) \
    GET16(); *pbD++ = (BYTE)lookup775[ rdith775[r +  mr] + gdith775[g +  mg] + ((b +  mb) >> 6)];

// multimedia\media\avi\drawdib\drawdib.c
#define Is565(bi)   (((bi)->biCompression == BI_BITFIELDS) &&   \
		    ((bi)->biBitCount == 16) &&			\

#define cktypeDIBbits           aviTWOCC('d', 'b')

                                             (FromHex(HIBYTE(LOWORD(fcc))))))

// multimedia\media\avi\inc.16\compman.h
#define ICDecompressEx(hic, dwFlags, lpbiSrc, lpSrc, xSrc, ySrc, dxSrc, dySrc, lpbiDst, lpDst, xDst, yDst, dxDst, dyDst) \
    ICMessage(hic, ICM_DECOMPRESSEX, sizeof(ICDECOMPRESSEX), \
        (DWORD)(dwFlags), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiSrc), (LPVOID)(lpSrc), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiDst), (LPVOID)(lpDst), \
        (int)(xDst), (int)(yDst), (int)(dxDst), (int)(dyDst), \
        (int)(xSrc), (int)(ySrc), (int)(dxSrc), (int)(dySrc))
#define ICDecompressExBegin(hic, dwFlags, lpbiSrc, lpSrc, xSrc, ySrc, dxSrc, dySrc, lpbiDst, lpDst, xDst, yDst, dxDst, dyDst) \
    ICMessage(hic, ICM_DECOMPRESSEX_BEGIN, sizeof(ICDECOMPRESSEX), \
        (DWORD)(dwFlags), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiSrc), (LPVOID)(lpSrc), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiDst), (LPVOID)(lpDst), \
        (int)(xDst), (int)(yDst), (int)(dxDst), (int)(dyDst), \
        (int)(xSrc), (int)(ySrc), (int)(dxSrc), (int)(dySrc))
#define ICDecompressExQuery(hic, dwFlags, lpbiSrc, lpSrc, xSrc, ySrc, dxSrc, dySrc, lpbiDst, lpDst, xDst, yDst, dxDst, dyDst) \
    ICMessage(hic, ICM_DECOMPRESSEX_QUERY,  sizeof(ICDECOMPRESSEX), \
        (DWORD)(dwFlags), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiSrc), (LPVOID)(lpSrc), \
        (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiDst), (LPVOID)(lpDst), \
        (int)(xDst), (int)(yDst), (int)(dxDst), (int)(dyDst), \
        (int)(xSrc), (int)(ySrc), (int)(dxSrc), (int)(dySrc))
#define ICDrawSuggestFormat(hic,lpbiIn,lpbiOut,dxSrc,dySrc,dxDst,dyDst,hicDecomp) \
        ICMessage(hic, ICM_DRAW_SUGGESTFORMAT, sizeof(ICDRAWSUGGEST),   \
            (LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiIn),(LPBITMAPINFOHEADER)(lpbiOut), \
            (int)(dxSrc),(int)(dySrc),(int)(dxDst),(int)(dyDst), (HIC)(hicDecomp))

// multimedia\media\avi\inc.16\penwin.h
#define IN_PDEVENT		((IEN_PDEVENT<<8)|0)	// pointing device event occurred
#define IN_ERASEBKGND	((IEN_NULL<<8)|1)		// control needs bkgnd erased
#define IN_PREPAINT		((IEN_PAINT<<8)|2)	// before control paints its ink
#define IN_PAINT			((IEN_NULL<<8)|3)		// control needs to be painted
#define IN_POSTPAINT		((IEN_PAINT<<8)|4)	// after control has painted
#define IN_MODECHANGED	((IEN_EDIT<<8)|5)		// mode changed
#define IN_CHANGE			((IEN_EDIT<<8)|6)		// contents changed & painted
#define IN_UPDATE			((IEN_EDIT<<8)|7)		// contents changed & !painted
#define IN_SETFOCUS		((IEN_FOCUS<<8)|8)	// IEdit is getting focus
#define IN_KILLFOCUS		((IEN_FOCUS<<8)|9)	// IEdit is losing focus
#define IN_MEMERR			((IEN_NULL<<8)|10)	// Memory error
#define IN_HSCROLL		((IEN_SCROLL<<8)|11)	// horz scrolled, not painted
#define IN_VSCROLL		((IEN_SCROLL<<8)|12)	// vert scrolled, not painted
#define IN_GESTURE		((IEN_EDIT<<8)|13)	// user has gestured on control
#define IN_COMMAND		((IEN_EDIT<<8)|14)	// command selected from menu
#define FPenUpX(x)				((BOOL)(((x) & BITPENUP) != 0))
#define MpAlcB(lprc,i)			((lprc)->rgbfAlc[((i) & 0xff) >> 3])
#define MpIbf(i)					((BYTE)(1 << ((i) & 7)))
#define SetAlcBitAnsi(lprc,i)	do {MpAlcB(lprc,i) |= MpIbf(i);} while (0)
#define ResetAlcBitAnsi(lprc,i) do {MpAlcB(lprc,i) &= ~MpIbf(i);} while (0)
#define IsAlcBitAnsi(lprc, i)	((MpAlcB(lprc,i) & MpIbf(i)) != 0)

		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8 ) |	\
		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16 ) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ) )
#define aviTWOCC(ch0, ch1) ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8))
#define cktypeDIBbits           aviTWOCC('d', 'b')
#define StreamFromFOURCC(fcc) ((WORD) ((FromHex(LOBYTE(LOWORD(fcc))) << 4) + \
                                             (FromHex(HIBYTE(LOWORD(fcc))))))
#define MAKEAVICKID(tcc, stream) \
        MAKELONG((ToHex((stream) & 0x0f) << 8) | ToHex(((stream) & 0xf0) >> 4), tcc)

#define VIDFMT(stream) ((LPBITMAPINFOHEADER) FORMAT(stream))
#define MCIID      (DWORD)(((WORD)('V' | ('F'<<8))) | ((WORD)('W' | ('>'<<8))<<16))
#define MCIIDX     (DWORD)(((WORD)('v' | ('.'<<8))) | ((WORD)('w' | ('-'<<8))<<16))

// multimedia\media\avi\mciavi32\aviffmt.h
#define mmioFOURCC( ch0, ch1, ch2, ch3 )				\
		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8 ) |	\
		( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16 ) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ) )
#define aviTWOCC(ch0, ch1) ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ((WORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8))
#define cktypeDIBbits           aviTWOCC('d', 'b')
#define StreamFromFOURCC(fcc) ((WORD) ((FromHex(LOBYTE(LOWORD(fcc))) << 4) + \
                                             (FromHex(HIBYTE(LOWORD(fcc))))))
#define MAKEAVICKID(tcc, stream) \
        MAKELONG((ToHex((stream) & 0x0f) << 8) | ToHex(((stream) & 0xf0) >> 4), tcc)

    #define TestNTFlags(npMCI, bits) ((npMCI)->dwNTFlags & (bits))

#define DibSizeImage(lpbi) (\
    (DWORD)(UINT)((((int)lpbi->biBitCount*(int)lpbi->biWidth+31)&~31)>>3) * \
    (DWORD)(UINT)lpbi->biHeight)
#define DibNumColors(lpbi) \
    (lpbi->biBitCount <= 8 ? (1 << (int)lpbi->biBitCount) : 0)

// multimedia\media\avi\msrle\msrle.c
    #define WinFlags (UINT)(&__WinFlags)

// multimedia\media\avi\msrle\msrle.h
#define DibNumColors(lpbi)      ((lpbi)->biClrUsed == 0 && (lpbi)->biBitCount <= 8 \
                                    ? (int)(1 << (int)(lpbi)->biBitCount)          \
                                    : (int)(lpbi)->biClrUsed)
#define FixBitmapInfo(lpbi)     if ((lpbi)->biSizeImage == 0)                 \
                                    (lpbi)->biSizeImage = DibSizeImage(lpbi); \
                                if ((lpbi)->biClrUsed == 0)                   \
                                    (lpbi)->biClrUsed = DibNumColors(lpbi);

#define RGB16(r,g,b)   ((((WORD)(r) >> 3) << 10) | \
                        (((WORD)(g) >> 3) << 5)  | \
                        (((WORD)(b) >> 3) << 0) )

// multimedia\media\avi\msvidc\compress.h

// multimedia\media\avi\msvidc\decmprss.c
#define RGB555toRGBTRIPLE( rgbT, rgb ) rgbT.rgbtRed=(BYTE)((rgb & 0x7c00) >> 7); \
                                       rgbT.rgbtGreen=(BYTE)((rgb & 0x3e0) >>2); \
                                       rgbT.rgbtBlue=(BYTE)((rgb & 0x1f) << 3)
#define MAKE4(x)        ( (x << 24) | (x << 16) | (x << 8) | x)
#define MAKE22(x, y)    ( (y << 24) | (y << 16) | (x << 8) | (x))
#define RGB555_TO_RGB565(c)	(c = ( ((c & 0x7fe0) << 1) | (c & 0x1f)))

#define PACKETIZE_UNLOCK() LeaveCriticalSection(&g_PacketizeTimeoutListLock);

	&& (this->lpsdDesc->dwFlags & DPSESSION_CLIENTSERVER) )

	&& (this->lpsdDesc->dwFlags & DPSESSION_SECURESERVER)) )

				  ~(DPSESSION_NEWPLAYERSDISABLED | \
                    DPOPEN_CREATE | \
					DPSESSION_MIGRATEHOST | \
					DPSESSION_NOMESSAGEID | \
					DPSESSION_NOPLAYERMGMT | \
					DPSESSION_JOINDISABLED | \
					DPSESSION_KEEPALIVE | \
					DPSESSION_NODATAMESSAGES | \
					DPSESSION_SECURESERVER | \
					DPSESSION_PRIVATE | \
					DPSESSION_PASSWORDREQUIRED | \
					DPSESSION_CLIENTSERVER | \
					DPSESSION_MULTICASTSERVER | \
					DPSESSION_OPTIMIZELATENCY | \
					DPSESSION_DIRECTPLAYPROTOCOL | \
					DPSESSION_NOPRESERVEORDER ) \
		) )
#define VALID_RECEIVE_FLAGS(dwFlags) \
		(!((dwFlags) & \
                  ~(DPRECEIVE_ALL | \
                    DPRECEIVE_TOPLAYER | \
                    DPRECEIVE_FROMPLAYER | \
                    DPRECEIVE_PEEK) \
		) )

		(!((dwFlags) & \
                  ~(DPSEND_GUARANTEED) \
		) )
#define VALID_CREATEPLAYER_FLAGS(dwFlags) \
		(!((dwFlags) & \
                  ~(DPPLAYER_SERVERPLAYER | \
                    DPPLAYER_SPECTATOR) \
		) )
#define VALID_CREATEGROUP_FLAGS(dwFlags) \
		(!((dwFlags) & \
                  ~(DPGROUP_STAGINGAREA | \
					DPGROUP_HIDDEN) \
		) )
#define VALID_ENUMPLAYERS_FLAGS(dwFlags) \
		(!((dwFlags) & \
                  ~(DPENUMPLAYERS_LOCAL | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_REMOTE | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_GROUP | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_SESSION | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_SERVERPLAYER | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_SPECTATOR) \
		) )
#define VALID_ENUMGROUPPLAYERS_FLAGS(dwFlags) \
		(!((dwFlags) & \
                  ~(DPENUMPLAYERS_LOCAL | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_REMOTE | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_SESSION | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_SERVERPLAYER | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_SPECTATOR) \
		) )

		(!((dwFlags) & \
                  ~(DPENUMPLAYERS_LOCAL | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_REMOTE | \
                    DPENUMPLAYERS_SESSION | \
                    DPENUMGROUPS_HIDDEN | \
