// net\tcpip\apis\iphlpapi\dll\defs.h
#define ConvertRouteToForward(route,forwardRow){                \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardDest      = (route)->ire_dest;       \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardIfIndex   = (route)->ire_index;      \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric1   = (route)->ire_metric1;    \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric2   = (route)->ire_metric2;    \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric3   = (route)->ire_metric3;    \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric4   = (route)->ire_metric4;    \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric5   = (route)->ire_metric5;    \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardNextHop   = (route)->ire_nexthop;    \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardType	     = (route)->ire_type;       \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardProto     = (route)->ire_proto;      \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardAge       = (route)->ire_age;        \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardMask      = (route)->ire_mask;       \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardNextHopAS = 0;                       \
    (forwardRow)->dwForwardPolicy    = 0;                       \
  }
#define ConvertForwardToRoute(route,forwardRow){                \
    (route)->ire_dest       = (forwardRow)->dwForwardDest;      \
    (route)->ire_index      = (forwardRow)->dwForwardIfIndex;   \
    (route)->ire_metric1    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric1;   \
    (route)->ire_metric2    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric2;   \
    (route)->ire_metric3    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric3;   \
    (route)->ire_metric4    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric4;   \
    (route)->ire_metric5    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric5;   \
    (route)->ire_nexthop    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardNextHop;   \
    (route)->ire_type       = (forwardRow)->dwForwardType;      \
    (route)->ire_proto      = (forwardRow)->dwForwardProto;     \
    (route)->ire_age        = (forwardRow)->dwForwardAge;       \
    (route)->ire_mask       = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMask;      \
  }
#define ConvertForwardToRoute(route,forwardRow){                \
    (route)->ire_dest       = (forwardRow)->dwForwardDest;      \
    (route)->ire_index      = (forwardRow)->dwForwardIfIndex;   \
    (route)->ire_metric1    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric1;   \
    (route)->ire_metric2    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric2;   \
    (route)->ire_metric3    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric3;   \
    (route)->ire_metric4    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric4;   \
    (route)->ire_metric5    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMetric5;   \
    (route)->ire_nexthop    = (forwardRow)->dwForwardNextHop;   \
    (route)->ire_type       = (forwardRow)->dwForwardType;      \
    (route)->ire_proto      = (forwardRow)->dwForwardProto;     \
    (route)->ire_age        = (forwardRow)->dwForwardAge;       \
    (route)->ire_mask       = (forwardRow)->dwForwardMask;      \
    (route)->ire_context    = 0x00000000;                       \
  }

// net\tcpip\apis\iphlpapi\dll\extapi.c
#define GetClassMask(a)                                         \
            (CLASSA_ADDR(a) ? CLASSA_MASK :                     \
            (CLASSB_ADDR(a) ? CLASSB_MASK :                     \
            (CLASSC_ADDR(a) ? CLASSC_MASK :                     \
            (CLASSD_ADDR(a) ? CLASSD_MASK : CLASSE_MASK))))

// net\tcpip\apis\iphlpapi\lib\wins.c
#define BYTE_SWAP(w)    (HIBYTE(w) | (LOBYTE(w) << 8))
#define WORD_SWAP(d)    (BYTE_SWAP(HIWORD(d)) | (BYTE_SWAP(LOWORD(d)) << 16))

// net\tcpip\commands\pathping\pathqos.h
#define Error_Usage(x)  (((x)>>12)&3)

// net\tcpip\driver\common\9x\bitmap.c
#define RightShiftUlong(E1,E2) ((E2) < 32 ? (E1) >> (E2) : 0)
#define LeftShiftUlong(E1,E2)  ((E2) < 32 ? (E1) << (E2) : 0)
#define RtlpBitSetAnywhere( Byte ) RtlpBitsClearAnywhere[ (~(Byte) & 0xFF) ]
#define RtlpBitsSetLow( Byte ) RtlpBitsClearLow[ (~(Byte) & 0xFF) ]
#define RtlpBitsSetHigh( Byte ) RtlpBitsClearHigh[ (~(Byte) & 0xFF) ]
#define RtlpBitsSetTotal( Byte ) RtlpBitsClearTotal[ (~(Byte) & 0xFF) ]
#define GET_BYTE_DECLARATIONS() \
    PUCHAR _CURRENT_POSITION;
#define GET_BYTE_INITIALIZATION(RTL_BITMAP,BYTE_INDEX) {               \
    _CURRENT_POSITION = &((PUCHAR)((RTL_BITMAP)->Buffer))[BYTE_INDEX]; \
}

// net\tcpip\driver\inc\bitmap.h
#define RtlCheckBit(BMH,BP) ((((BMH)->Buffer[(BP) / 32]) >> ((BP) % 32)) & 0x1)

// net\tcpip\driver\inc\tcp.h
#define DELAYED_FLAGS   (NEED_RCV_CMPLT | NEED_ACK | NEED_OUTPUT)
#define TCP_SLOW_FLAGS  (URG_VALID | FLOW_CNTLD | GC_PENDING | \
                            TW_PENDING | DISC_NOTIFIED | IN_DELIV_URG | \
                            FIN_NEEDED | FIN_SENT | FIN_OUTSTANDING | \
                            DISC_PENDING | PMTU_BH_PROBE)
#define REXMIT_TO(t)    ((((t)->tcb_smrtt >> 2) + (t)->tcb_delta) >> 1)
#define TCP_FLAGS_ALL   (TCP_FLAG_FIN | TCP_FLAG_SYN | TCP_FLAG_RST | \
                         TCP_FLAG_ACK | TCP_FLAG_URG)
#define MAKE_TCP_FLAGS(o, f) ((f) | ((o) << 4))

// net\tcpip\driver\ipsec\sys\macros.h
#define IPSecAllocatePktInfo(__tag) \
    IPSecAllocateMemory(sizeof(NDIS_IPSEC_PACKET_INFO), __tag)
#define IPSecAllocatePktExt(__tag) \
    IPSecAllocateMemory(sizeof(NDIS_IPSEC_PACKET_INFO), __tag)
#define IS_INBOUND_FILTER(f)    ((f)->Flags & FILTER_FLAGS_INBOUND)
#define IS_OUTBOUND_FILTER(f)   ((f)->Flags & FILTER_FLAGS_OUTBOUND)
#define IS_EXEMPT_FILTER(f)     (((f)->Flags & FILTER_FLAGS_DROP) || ((f)->Flags & FILTER_FLAGS_PASS_THRU))
#define IPSEC_INC_TUNNELS(_pSA) {           \
    if ((_pSA)->sa_Flags & FLAGS_SA_TUNNEL) \
        g_ipsec.Statistics.dwNumActiveTunnels++; \
}
#define IPSEC_DEC_TUNNELS(_pSA) {           \
    if ((_pSA)->sa_Flags & FLAGS_SA_TUNNEL) \
        g_ipsec.Statistics.dwNumActiveTunnels--; \
}
#define UpdateIPLength(_piph, _length)                          \
{                                                               \
    ULONG   _sum;                                               \
    USHORT  _old;                                               \
                                                                \
    _old = NET_SHORT((_piph)->iph_length);                      \
    (_piph)->iph_length = (_length);                            \
    _sum = (~NET_SHORT((_piph)->iph_xsum) & 0xffff) +           \
           (~_old & 0xffff) +                                   \
           NET_SHORT((_piph)->iph_length);                      \
    _sum = (_sum & 0xffff) + (_sum >> 16);                      \
    _sum += (_sum >> 16);                                       \
    (_piph)->iph_xsum = NET_SHORT((USHORT)(~_sum & 0xffff));    \
}
#define UpdateIPProtocol(_piph, _proto)                         \
{                                                               \
    ULONG   _sum;                                               \
    USHORT  _old;                                               \
                                                                \
    _old = NET_SHORT(*(USHORT *)&(_piph)->iph_ttl);             \
    (_piph)->iph_protocol = (_proto);                           \
    _sum = (~NET_SHORT((_piph)->iph_xsum) & 0xffff) +           \
           (~_old & 0xffff) +                                   \
           NET_SHORT(*(USHORT *)&(_piph)->iph_ttl);             \
    _sum = (_sum & 0xffff) + (_sum >> 16);                      \
    _sum += (_sum >> 16);                                       \
    (_piph)->iph_xsum = NET_SHORT((USHORT)(~_sum & 0xffff));    \
}
#define IS_GPC_FILTER(f)    (g_ipsec.InitGpc &&                 \
                             f->SRC_MASK == FILTER_MASK_ALL &&  \
                             f->DEST_MASK == FILTER_MASK_ALL)
#define IPSEC_FORWARD_PATH()    (fFWPacket || (fOutbound && TCPIP_GET_ADDRTYPE(pIPHeader->iph_src) != DEST_LOCAL))

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\ipdef.h
#define IS_IF_INVALID( _interface ) \
    (_interface)->if_flags & \
        (IF_FLAGS_REMOVING_POWER|IF_FLAGS_POWER_DOWN|IF_FLAGS_REMOVING_DEVICE)
#define SET_CANCELID(irp, Packet) \
    if (irp) { \
       NdisSetPacketCancelId(Packet, ((PIRP)irp)->Tail.Overlay.DriverContext[1]); \
    }

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\ipmcast.h
#define PRINT_IPADDR(x) \
    ((x)&0x000000FF),(((x)&0x0000FF00)>>8),(((x)&0x00FF0000)>>16),(((x)&0xFF000000)>>24)

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\iproute.c
#define ATC_REGIONS             (1 << ATC_BITS)
#define ATC_ADDR_MASK           (ULONG32)(~ATC_CODE_MASK)
#define PR_IP_ADDR(x) \
    ((x)&0x000000ff),(((x)&0x0000ff00)>>8),(((x)&0x00ff0000)>>16),(((x)&0xff000000)>>24)

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\iproute.h
#define IP_LOOPBACK(x)  (((x) & CLASSA_MASK) == 0x7f)

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\iprtdef.h
#define IPNetMask(a)    IPMaskTable[(*(uchar *)&(a)) >> 4]

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\lookup.h
#define InitRouteTable(initflags, levelsBmp, fastTrieMem, slowTrieMem) \
            CreateTrie(levelsBmp, initflags, slowTrieMem, fastTrieMem, &RouteTable)
#define FindSpecificRTE(_Dest_, _Mask_, _FirstHop_, _OutIF_, _PrevRTE_, _bFindFirst_) \
   ((SearchRouteInTrie(RouteTable, _Dest_, _Mask_, _FirstHop_, _OutIF_,       \
                       (!_bFindFirst_ * MATCH_INTF) | MATCH_NHOP, _PrevRTE_)  \
                                            == TRIE_SUCCESS) ? *_PrevRTE_ : NULL)
#define FindMatchingRTE(_Dest_, _Mask_, _FirstHop_, _OutIF_, _PrevRTE_, _fMatchFlags_) \
   ((SearchRouteInTrie(RouteTable, _Dest_, _Mask_, _FirstHop_, _OutIF_,       \
                       _fMatchFlags_, _PrevRTE_)                              \
                                            == TRIE_SUCCESS) ? *_PrevRTE_ : NULL)

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\mcastfwd.c
#define ProcessWrongIfUpcall(pIf, pSrc, pLink, pHdr, ulHdrLen, pvOpt, ulOptLen, pvData, ulDataLen)  \
{                                                               \
    if(pIf->if_mcastflags & IPMCAST_IF_WRONG_IF)                \
    {                                                           \
        PEXCEPT_IF  pTempIf;                                    \
        BOOLEAN     bWrong = TRUE;                              \
        LONGLONG    llCurrentTime, llTime;                      \
                                                                \
        KeQueryTickCount((PLARGE_INTEGER)&llCurrentTime);       \
        llTime = llCurrentTime - pIf->if_lastupcall;            \
                                                                \
        if((llCurrentTime > pIf->if_lastupcall) && (llTime < SECS_TO_TICKS(UPCALL_PERIOD))) {                                                   \
                                                                \
            bWrong = FALSE;                                     \
                                                                \
        } else {                                                \
                                                                \
            for(pTempIf  = (pSrc)->pFirstExceptIf;              \
                pTempIf != NULL;                                \
                pTempIf  = pTempIf->pNextExceptIf)              \
            {                                                   \
                if(pTempIf->dwIfIndex == (pIf)->if_index)       \
                {                                               \
                    bWrong = FALSE;                             \
                    break;                                      \
                }                                               \
            }                                                   \
        }                                                       \
                                                                \
        if(bWrong)                                              \
        {                                                       \
            SendWrongIfUpcall((pIf), (pLink), (pHdr), (ulHdrLen), (pvOpt), (ulOptLen), (pvData), (ulDataLen));      \
        }                                                       \
    }                                                           \
}

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\strie.h
#define  NewRouteInSTrie(_pSTrie_, _pNewRoute_, _pOldRoute_)                    \
                                {                                               \
                                    AllocMemory1(_pNewRoute_,                   \
                                                 sizeof(Route),                 \
                                                 (_pSTrie_)->availMemory);      \
                                                                                \
                                    NdisZeroMemory(_pNewRoute_, sizeof(Route)); \
                                                                                \
                                    DEST(_pNewRoute_)   = DEST(_pOldRoute_);    \
                                    MASK(_pNewRoute_)   = MASK(_pOldRoute_);    \
                                    LEN(_pNewRoute_)    = LEN(_pOldRoute_);     \
                                    METRIC(_pNewRoute_) = METRIC(_pOldRoute_);  \
                                                                                \
                                    NEXT(_pNewRoute_)   = NULL;                 \
                                    FLAGS(_pNewRoute_)  = RTE_NEW;              \
                                                                                \
                                    (_pSTrie_)->numRoutes++;                    \
                                }                                               \
#define  NewSTrieNode(_pSTrie_, _pSTrieNode_, _numBits_, _keyBits_, _pDest_)    \
                                {                                               \
                                    AllocMemory1(_pSTrieNode_,                  \
                                                 sizeof(STrieNode),             \
                                                 (_pSTrie_)->availMemory);      \
                                                                                \
                                    _pSTrieNode_->numBits = _numBits_;          \
                                    _pSTrieNode_->keyBits = _keyBits_;          \
                                                                                \
                                    _pSTrieNode_->dest = _pDest_;               \
                                                                                \
                                    _pSTrieNode_->child[0] = NULL;              \
                                    _pSTrieNode_->child[1] = NULL;              \
                                                                                \
                                    (_pSTrie_)->numNodes++;                     \
                                }

// net\tcpip\driver\ipv4\trie.h
#define    LS(ul, nb)                   ((ul << nb) & ((nb & ~0x1f) ? 0 : -1))
#define    ShowMostSigNBits(ul, nb)     (ul & ( LS(~0,(ADDRSIZE - nb)) ))
#define    PickMostSigNBits(ul, nb)     ((ul) >> (ADDRSIZE - nb))
#define    RS(ul, nb)                   ((ul >> nb) & ((nb & ~0x1f) ? 0 : -1))
#define    PickDistPosition(ul1, ul2, nbits, ul)                                \
                             (ul = ((ul1 ^ ul2) & ~(RS(((ULONG)~0), nbits))))   \
                             ? ADDRSIZE - RtlGetMostSigBitSet(ul) - 1: nbits    \
//

// net\tcpip\driver\kdext2\inc\tcpdump.h
#define Print_flags(_p, _f, _pfs)       \
    PrintFieldName(#_f);                \
    printx("0x%08lx (", (ULONG)_p->_f); \
    DumpFlags(_p->_f, _pfs);            \
    printx(")" ENDL)

// net\tcpip\driver\tcp\addr.h
#define AO_VALID(A) ((A)->ao_flags & AO_VALID_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_INVALID(A)   (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_VALID_FLAG
#define AO_BUSY(A)  ((A)->ao_flags & AO_BUSY_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_BUSY(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_BUSY_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_BUSY(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_BUSY_FLAG
#define AO_OOR(A)   ((A)->ao_flags & AO_OOR_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_OOR(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_OOR_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_OOR(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_OOR_FLAG
#define AO_QUEUED(A)    ((A)->ao_flags & AO_QUEUED_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_QUEUED(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_QUEUED_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_QUEUED(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_QUEUED_FLAG
#define AO_XSUM(A)  ((A)->ao_flags & AO_XSUM_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_XSUM(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_XSUM_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_XSUM(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_XSUM_FLAG
#define AO_REQUEST(A, f) ((A)->ao_flags & f##_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_REQUEST(A, f) (A)->ao_flags |= f##_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_REQUEST(A, f) (A)->ao_flags &= ~f##_FLAG
#define AO_BROADCAST(A)  ((A)->ao_flags & AO_BROADCAST_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_BROADCAST(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_BROADCAST_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_BROADCAST(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_BROADCAST_FLAG
#define AO_CONNUDP(A)  ((A)->ao_flags & AO_CONNUDP_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_CONNUDP(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_CONNUDP_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_CONNUDP(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_CONNUDP_FLAG
#define AO_SHARE(A)  ((A)->ao_flags & AO_SHARE_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_SHARE(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_SHARE_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_SHARE(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_SHARE_FLAG
#define AO_PKTINFO(A)  ((A)->ao_flags & AO_PKTINFO_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_PKTINFO(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_PKTINFO_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_PKTINFO(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_PKTINFO_FLAG
#define AO_DEFERRED(A)  ((A)->ao_flags & AO_DEFERRED_FLAG)
#define SET_AO_DEFERRED(A) (A)->ao_flags |= AO_DEFERRED_FLAG
#define CLEAR_AO_DEFERRED(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_DEFERRED_FLAG
#define AMA_VALID(A) ((A)->ama_flags & AMA_VALID_FLAG)
#define SET_AMA_INVALID(A)   (A)->ama_flags &= ~AMA_VALID_FLAG

// net\tcpip\driver\tcp\ntinit.c
#define CACHE_ALIGN_MASK (~(CACHE_LINE_SIZE-1))

// net\tcpip\driver\tcp\tcb.h
#define ROR8(x) (ushort)( ( (ushort)(x) >> 1) | (ushort) ( ( (ushort)(x) & 1) << 15) )

// net\tcpip\driver\tcp\tcpconn.c
#define ROTATE_LEFT(x, n) (((x) << (n)) | ((x) >> (32-(n))))

// net\tcpip\driver\tcp\tcpconn.h
#define CONN_BLOCKID(c)     (((c) & 0xffff00) >> 8 )
#define CONN_INST(c)        ((uchar)((c) >> 24))
#define MAKE_CONN_ID(index,block,instance)  ((((uint)(instance)) << 24) | (((uint)(block)) << 8) | ((uint)(index)))

// net\tcpip\services\rip\rip.h
#define IS_BROADCAST_ADDR(a)                                                \
            ((a) == INADDR_BROADCAST ||                                     \
             (CLASSA_ADDR(a) && (((a) & ~CLASSA_MASK) == ~CLASSA_MASK)) ||  \
             (CLASSB_ADDR(a) && (((a) & ~CLASSB_MASK) == ~CLASSB_MASK)) ||  \
             (CLASSC_ADDR(a) && (((a) & ~CLASSC_MASK) == ~CLASSC_MASK)))
#define NETCLASS_MASK(a)                                        \
            (CLASSA_ADDR(a) ? CLASSA_MASK :                     \
            (CLASSB_ADDR(a) ? CLASSB_MASK :                     \
            (CLASSC_ADDR(a) ? CLASSC_MASK :                     \
            (CLASSD_ADDR(a) ? CLASSD_MASK : CLASSE_MASK))))
#define HASH_VALUE(ad)          (((ad & 0xff) +          \
                                 ((ad >> 8) & 0xff) +    \
                                 ((ad >> 16) & 0xff) +   \
                                 ((ad >> 24) & 0xff)) % HASH_TABLE_SIZE)

// net\tcpip\services\rip\table.h
#define net_part(addr)  ((addr) & net_mask(addr))

// net\tcpip\services\telnet\client\wintel.h
#define N_BITS_IN_UINT (sizeof(UINT) * N_BITS_IN_BYTE)
#define BitFlagSetON(pBitFlagArray, iBit) (pBitFlagArray[(iBit)/N_BITS_IN_UINT]|=(0x1<<((iBit)%N_BITS_IN_UINT)))
#define BitFlagSetOFF(pBitFlagArray, iBit) (pBitFlagArray[(iBit)/N_BITS_IN_UINT]&=(~(0x1<<((iBit)%N_BITS_IN_UINT))))
#define BitFlagReverse(pBitFlagArray, iBit) (pBitFlagArray[(iBit)/N_BITS_IN_UINT] ^= (0x1<<((iBit)%N_BITS_IN_UINT)))
#define FBitFlag(pBitFlagArray, iBit) (pBitFlagArray[(iBit)/N_BITS_IN_UINT] & (0x1<<((iBit)%N_BITS_IN_UINT)))

// net\tcpip\tpipv6\6to4svc\precomp.h
#define PRINT_IPADDR(x) \
    ((x)&0x000000ff),(((x)&0x0000ff00)>>8),(((x)&0x00ff0000)>>16),(((x)&0xff000000)>>24)

// net\tcpip\tpipv6\6to4svc\teredo.h
#define TEREDO_PACKET_BUFFER(Packet)  \
    ((PUCHAR) (((PTEREDO_PACKET) (Packet)) + 1))

// net\tcpip\tpipv6\dplayip6\dplaysp.h
#define DPLAYI_PLAYER_NONPROP_FLAGS ( DPLAYI_PLAYER_DOESNT_HAVE_NAMETABLE | \
									  DPLAYI_PLAYER_BEING_DESTROYED | \
									  DPLAYI_PLAYER_ON_DEATH_ROW |\
									  DPLAYI_PLAYER_CONNECTION_LOST )

// net\tcpip\tpipv6\dplayip6\dpsp.h
#define SIZE_MASK (~TOKEN_MASK)
#define VALID_SP_MESSAGE(pMsg) ( (*((DWORD *)pMsg) & TOKEN_MASK) == TOKEN ? TRUE : FALSE)
#define VALID_HELPER_MESSAGE(pMsg) ( (*((DWORD *)pMsg) & TOKEN_MASK) == HELPER_TOKEN ? TRUE : FALSE)
#define VALID_REUSE_MESSAGE(pMsg) ( (*((DWORD *)pMsg) & TOKEN_MASK) == REUSE_TOKEN ? TRUE : FALSE)
#define VALID_SERVER_MESSAGE(pMsg) ( (*((DWORD *)pMsg) & TOKEN_MASK) == SERVER_TOKEN ? TRUE : FALSE)
#define SP_MESSAGE_SIZE(pMsg) ( (*((DWORD *)pMsg) & SIZE_MASK))
#define SP_MESSAGE_TOKEN(pMsg) ( (*((DWORD *)pMsg) & TOKEN_MASK))
#define GET_MESSAGE_VERSION(pMsg) ( ((pMsg)->dwCmdToken & ~COMMAND_MASK) >> 16 )
#define GET_MESSAGE_COMMAND(pMsg) ( (pMsg)->dwCmdToken & COMMAND_MASK)
#define SET_MESSAGE_COMMAND(pMsg,dwCmd) ((pMsg)->dwCmdToken = ((dwCmd & COMMAND_MASK) \
        | (SP_MSG_VERSION<<16)) )

#define CLEAR_AO_QUEUED(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_QUEUED_FLAG

#define CLEAR_AO_REQUEST(A, f) (A)->ao_flags &= ~f##_FLAG

#define CLEAR_AO_SHARE(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_SHARE_FLAG

#define CLEAR_AO_PKTINFO(A) (A)->ao_flags &= ~AO_PKTINFO_FLAG

// net\tcpip\tpipv6\tcpip6\inc\ip6def.h
#define ADDR_CONF_MANUAL        ((PREFIX_CONF_MANUAL << 4) | IID_CONF_MANUAL)

#define ADDR_CONF_ANONYMOUS     ((PREFIX_CONF_RA << 4) | IID_CONF_RANDOM)

                        DISC_NOTIFIED | IN_DELIV_URG | FIN_NEEDED | \

                       TCP_FLAG_ACK | TCP_FLAG_URG)

#define CONN_INST(c)        ((uchar)((c) >> 24))

                                             (((uint)(block)) << 8) | \
                                             ((uint)(index)))

#define ClearFlag(obj, f)           do {obj &= ~(f);} while (0)

    #define fPENDING            (0x1<<1)
    #define fSUBTASK_PENDING    (0x1<<2)
    #define fAPC_QUEUED         (0x1<<3)
    #define fABORTING           (0x1<<4)
    #define IS_ALLOCATED(_pTask)    (((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags) & fALLOCATED)

    #define IS_APC_QUEUED(_pTask)   (((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags) & fAPC_QUEUED)
    #define IS_ABORTING(_pTask)     (((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags) & fABORTING)
    #define SET_ALLOCATED(_pTask)    ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags|= fALLOCATED)
    #define SET_PENDING(_pTask)      ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags|= fPENDING)
    #define SET_SUBTASK_PENDING(_pTask) \
                                     ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags|= fSUBTASK_PENDING)
    #define SET_APC_QUEUED(_pTask)   ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags|= fAPC_QUEUED)
    #define SET_ABORTING(_pTask)     ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags|= fABORTING)
    #define CLEAR_ALLOCATED(_pTask)    ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags&= ~fALLOCATED)
    #define CLEAR_PENDING(_pTask)      ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags&= ~fPENDING)
    #define CLEAR_SUBTASK_PENDING(_pTask) \
                                     ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags&= ~fSUBTASK_PENDING)
    #define CLEAR_APC_QUEUED(_pTask)   ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags&= ~fAPC_QUEUED)
    #define CLEAR_ABORTING(_pTask)     ((_pTask)->hdr.dwFlags&= ~fABORTING)

    ((DeviceType) << 16) | ((Access) << 14) | ((Function) << 2) | (Method) \
)

// net\wins\server\inc\assoc.h
#define COMMASSOC_SETUP_COMM_DS_M(mpDlgCtx, mpAssocCtx, mType_e, mRole_e) \
	{								\
		(mpAssocCtx)->DlgHdl.SeqNo   = (mpDlgCtx)->Top.SeqNo;	\
		(mpAssocCtx)->DlgHdl.pEnt    = (mpDlgCtx);		\
		(mpAssocCtx)->State_e        = COMMASSOC_ASSOC_E_ACTIVE; \
		(mpAssocCtx)->Typ_e          = (mType_e);		\
									\
		(mpDlgCtx)->AssocHdl.SeqNo   = (mpAssocCtx)->Top.SeqNo;	\
		(mpDlgCtx)->AssocHdl.pEnt    = (mpAssocCtx);		\
		(mpDlgCtx)->Role_e           = (mRole_e);		\
		(mpDlgCtx)->Typ_e            = (mType_e);		\
	}

// net\wins\server\inc\comm.h
#define  COMM_NET_ADDRESS_M(Add)	(Add >> 16)
#define COMM_SET_HEADER_M(pLong, Opc, uAssocCtx, MsgTyp)	 \
		{						 \
			LPBYTE _pTmpB = (LPBYTE)pLong++;	 \
			*(_pTmpB + 2)  = Opc << 3; 		 \
			*pLong++      = htonl(uAssocCtx); \
			*pLong++      = htonl(MsgTyp);		 \
		}
#define COMM_GET_HEADER_M(pMsg,  Opc, uAssocCtx, MsgTyp)  \
		{				         	\
			LPLONG	_pLong  = (LPLONG)pMsg;	\
			Opc             = ((*(pMsg + 2) & NMS_OPCODE_MASK) >> 3);\
			uAssocCtx       = ntohl(*++_pLong); \
			MsgTyp          = ntohl(*++_pLong); 	\
		}
#define  COMM_SET_LOCAL_M(pDlgHdl)  \
        (((PCOMMASSOC_DLG_CTX_T)(pDlgHdl->pEnt))->FromAdd.sin_family = NBT_UNIX)

// net\wins\server\inc\nms.h
#define NMSISNBT_M(pMsg) \
	(((*(pMsg + 2) & NMS_OPCODE_MASK) >> 3) != WINS_IS_NOT_NBT)
#define NMSISRPL_MSG_M(pMsg ) \
	(((*(pMsg + 2) & NMS_OPCODE_MASK) >> 3) == WINS_IS_NOT_NBT)

// net\wins\server\inc\nmsdb.h
#define NMSDB_ENTRY_STATE_M(Flag)  (((Flag) & NMSDB_BIT_STATE) >> NMSDB_SHIFT_STATE)
#define NMSDB_ENTRY_TYPE_M(Flag)  (((Flag) & NMSDB_BIT_ENT_TYP) >> NMSDB_SHIFT_ENT_TYP)
#define NMSDB_NODE_TYPE_M(Flag)    (((Flag) & NMSDB_BIT_NODE_TYP) >> NMSDB_SHIFT_NODE_TYP)
#define NMSDB_IS_ENTRY_LOCAL_M(Flag)  ((Flag) & NMSDB_BIT_LOCAL ? TRUE : FALSE)
#define NMSDB_SET_ENTRY_LOCAL_M(Flag)  (Flag) |= NMSDB_BIT_LOCAL
#define NMSDB_CLR_ENTRY_LOCAL_M(Flag)  (Flag) &= ~NMSDB_BIT_LOCAL
#define NMSDB_IS_ENTRY_STATIC_M(Flag)   ((Flag) & NMSDB_BIT_STATIC ? TRUE : FALSE)
#define NMSDB_CLR_ENTRY_TYPE_M(Flag)  (Flag) &= ~NMSDB_BIT_ENT_TYP
#define NMSDB_SET_ENTRY_TYPE_M(Flag, EntType)   {                        \
                                NMSDB_CLR_ENTRY_TYPE_M((Flag));                \
                                (Flag) |= ((EntType) << NMSDB_SHIFT_ENT_TYP);  \
                                        }
#define NMSDB_CLR_STATE_M(Flag)   (Flag) &= ~NMSDB_BIT_STATE
#define NMSDB_SET_STATE_M(Flag, state)   {                                \
                                NMSDB_CLR_STATE_M((Flag));                \
                                (Flag) |= ((state) << NMSDB_SHIFT_STATE);   \
                                        }
#define NMSDB_CLR_NODE_TYPE_M(Flag)  (Flag) &= ~NMSDB_BIT_NODE_TYP
#define NMSDB_SET_NODE_TYPE_M(Flag, NodeType)  {                        \
                        NMSDB_CLR_NODE_TYPE_M((Flag));                \
                        (Flag) |= ((NodeType) << NMSDB_SHIFT_NODE_TYP);   \
                                        }
#define NMSDB_CLR_STDYN_M(Flag)    (Flag) &= ~NMSDB_BIT_STATIC
#define NMSDB_SET_STDYN_M(Flag, StDynTyp)    {        \
                        NMSDB_CLR_STDYN_M(Flag);        \
                        (Flag) |= ((StDynTyp) << NMSDB_SHIFT_STATIC); \
                                             }
#define NMSDB_SET_STATIC_M(Flag)   (Flag) |= NMSDB_BIT_STATIC
#define NMSDB_SET_DYNAMIC_M(Flag)  (Flag) &= ~NMSDB_BIT_STATIC
#define NMSDB_INCREMENTAL_BACKUP   ((JET_bitBackupIncremental) | (JET_bitBackupAtomic))

// net\wins\server\inc\nmsmsgf.h
#define NMSMSGF_INSERT_IPADD_M(pTmpB, IPAdd)				   \
			{						   \
				*(pTmpB)++ = (BYTE)((IPAdd) >> 24);	   \
				*(pTmpB)++ = (BYTE)(((IPAdd) >> 16) % 256);\
				*(pTmpB)++ = (BYTE)(((IPAdd) >> 8) % 256); \
				*(pTmpB)++ = (BYTE)((IPAdd) % 256);	   \
			}
#define NMSMSGF_RETRIEVE_IPADD_M(pTmpB, IPAdd)				\
			{						\
				(IPAdd)  = *(pTmpB)++ << 24;		\
				(IPAdd) |= *(pTmpB)++ << 16;		\
				(IPAdd) |= *(pTmpB)++ << 8;		\
				(IPAdd) |= *(pTmpB)++;			\
			}

// net\wins\server\inc\rpl.h
#define   RPL_FIND_ADD_BY_OWNER_ID_M(OwnerId, pWinsAdd, pWinsState_e, pStartVersNo)                                                                          \
                {                                                        \
                        PNMSDB_ADD_STATE_T pWinsRec;                     \
                        if (OwnerId < NmsDbTotNoOfSlots)                 \
                        {                                                \
                            pWinsRec       = pNmsDbOwnAddTbl+OwnerId;    \
                            (pWinsAdd)     = &(pWinsRec->WinsAdd);       \
                            (pWinsState_e) = &pWinsRec->WinsState_e;     \
                            (pStartVersNo) = &pWinsRec->StartVersNo;     \
                        }                                                \
                        else                                             \
                        {                                                \
                            (pWinsAdd)     = NULL;                       \
                            (pWinsState_e) = NULL;                       \
                            (pStartVersNo) = NULL;                       \
                        }                                                \
                }

// net\wins\server\msc\nmfilter.c
#define SET_BIT(Mask, Key)     (Mask)[(Key)>>3] |= 1<<((Key)&7)
#define CLR_BIT(Mask, Key)     (Mask)[(Key)>>3] &= ~(1<<((Key)&7))
#define IS_SET(Mask, Key)      ((Mask)[(Key)>>3] & (1<<((Key)&7)))

// net\wins\server\nms\nmschl.c
#define WACK_TTL			(((1 << WinsCnf.MaxNoOfRetries) * \
					 WinsCnf.RetryInterval) + \
					WAIT_PAD)

// net\wins\server\nms\nmsscv.c
#define SET_STATE_IF_REQD_M(pRec, CurrentTime, TimeInterval, State, Cntr)   \
                {                                                           \
                        pRec->fScv = FALSE;                                 \
                        if (CurrentTime >= (time_t)(pRec)->TimeStamp)       \
                        {                                                   \
                                NMSDB_SET_STATE_M(                  \
                                                  (pRec)->Flag,     \
                                                  (State)           \
                                                 );                 \
                                (pRec)->NewTimeStamp = (pRec)->TimeStamp +  \
                                                         TimeInterval;  \
                                        (pRec)->fScv = TRUE;            \
                                        NoOfRecsScv++;                  \
                                        (Cntr)++;                       \
                        }                                               \
                }

// net\wlbs\driver\main.h
#define MAIN_RESP_FIELD(pkt, left, ps, rsp, send)   \
(ps) = NdisIMGetCurrentPacketStack((pkt), &(left)); \
if ((ps))                                           \
{                                                   \
    if (MAIN_IMRESERVED_FIELD((ps)))                \
        (rsp) = MAIN_IMRESERVED_FIELD((ps));        \
    else if ((send))                                \
        (rsp) = MAIN_PROTOCOL_FIELD((pkt));         \
    else if (MAIN_MINIPORT_FIELD((pkt)))            \
        (rsp) = MAIN_MINIPORT_FIELD((pkt));         \
    else                                            \
        (rsp) = MAIN_PROTOCOL_FIELD((pkt));         \
}                                                   \
else                                                \
{                                                   \
    if ((send))                                     \
        (rsp) = MAIN_PROTOCOL_FIELD((pkt));         \
    else if (MAIN_MINIPORT_FIELD((pkt)))            \
        (rsp) = MAIN_MINIPORT_FIELD((pkt));         \
    else                                            \
        (rsp) = MAIN_PROTOCOL_FIELD((pkt));         \
}
#define MAIN_PNP_DEV_ON(c)		((c)->nic_pnp_state == NdisDeviceStateD0 && (c)->prot_pnp_state == NdisDeviceStateD0 )

// net\wlbs\driver\params.h
#define CVY_DRIVER_RULE_CODE_SET(rulep) ((rulep) -> code =                          \
                                         ((ULONG) (((rulep) -> start_port) <<  0) | \
                                          (ULONG) (((rulep) -> end_port)   << 12) | \
                                          (ULONG) (((rulep) -> protocol)   << 24) | \
                                          (ULONG) (((rulep) -> mode)       << 28) | \
                                          (ULONG) (((rulep) -> mode == CVY_MULTI ? (rulep) -> mode_data . multi . affinity : 0) << 30)) \
                                         ^ ~((rulep) -> virtual_ip_addr))

// net\wlbs\inc\wlbsiocl.h
#define NLB_MIN_RCTL_PACKET_LEN(ip_hdrp)   ((sizeof(ULONG) * IP_GET_HLEN(ip_hdrp)) + sizeof(UDP_HDR) + sizeof(IOCTL_REMOTE_HDR) - sizeof(IOCTL_OPTIONS))
#define NLB_NT40_RCTL_PACKET_LEN(ip_hdrp)  ((sizeof(ULONG) * IP_GET_HLEN(ip_hdrp)) + sizeof(UDP_HDR) + sizeof(IOCTL_REMOTE_HDR) - sizeof(IOCTL_OPTIONS))
#define NLB_WIN2K_RCTL_PACKET_LEN(ip_hdrp) ((sizeof(ULONG) * IP_GET_HLEN(ip_hdrp)) + sizeof(UDP_HDR) + sizeof(IOCTL_REMOTE_HDR) - sizeof(IOCTL_OPTIONS))
#define NLB_WINXP_RCTL_PACKET_LEN(ip_hdrp) ((sizeof(ULONG) * IP_GET_HLEN(ip_hdrp)) + sizeof(UDP_HDR) + sizeof(IOCTL_REMOTE_HDR))
#define NLB_MAX_RCTL_PACKET_LEN(ip_hdrp)   ((sizeof(ULONG) * IP_GET_HLEN(ip_hdrp)) + sizeof(UDP_HDR) + sizeof(IOCTL_REMOTE_HDR))

// net\wlbs\inc\wlbsip.h
#define ARP_GET_MAC_TYPE(p)     (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[0]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[1]))
#define ARP_GET_PROT_TYPE(p)    (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[2]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[3]))
#define ARP_GET_MSG_TYPE(p)     (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[6]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[7]))
#define ARP_GET_SRC_PROT_64(p)  ((ULONG) (((p) -> byte[14] << 0)   | ((p) -> byte[15] << 8) | \
                                          ((p) -> byte[16] << 16)  | ((p) -> byte[17] << 24)))
#define ARP_GET_DST_PROT_64(p)  ((ULONG) (((p) -> byte[18] << 0)   | ((p) -> byte[19] << 8) | \
                                          ((p) -> byte[20] << 16)  | ((p) -> byte[21] << 24)))
#define IP_GET_FRAG_ID(p)       (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[5]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[4]))
#define IP_GET_FRAG_FLGS(p)     ((ULONG) ((((p) -> byte[6]) >> 5) & 0x7))
#define IP_GET_CHKSUM(p)        (((USHORT) ((p) -> byte[10]) << 8) | (USHORT) ((p) -> byte[11]))
#define IP_GET_SRC_FADDR(p)     (* ((PULONG) &((p) -> byte[12]))) /* 64-bit -- ramkrish */
    #define IP_GET_SRC_ADDR_64(p)   ((ULONG) (((p) -> byte[12] << 0) | ((p) -> byte[13] << 8) | \
                                          ((p) -> byte[14] << 16)  | ((p) -> byte[15] << 24)))
    #define IP_GET_DST_ADDR_64(p)   ((ULONG) (((p) -> byte[16] << 0)   | ((p) -> byte[17] << 8) | \
                                          ((p) -> byte[18] << 16)  | ((p) -> byte[19] << 24)))
#define IP_SET_ADDR(p,b0,b1,b2,b3) (* (p) = (((b0) << 0) | ((b1) << 8) | ((b2) << 16) | ((b3) << 24)))
#define TCP_GET_DST_PORT(p)     (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[2]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[3]))
#define TCP_GET_SEQ_NO(p)       (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[4]) << 24) | ((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[5]) << 16) | \
                                 ((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[6]) << 8)  |  (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[7]))
#define TCP_GET_ACK_NO(p)       (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[8])  << 24) | ((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[9]) << 16) | \
                                 ((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[10]) << 8)  |  (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[11]))
#define TCP_GET_FLAGS(p)        (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[13])) & 0x3f)
#define TCP_GET_HLEN(p)         ((ULONG) (((p) -> byte[12]) >> 4))
#define TCP_GET_CHKSUM(p)       ((((USHORT)((p) -> byte[16])) << 8) | (USHORT)((p) -> byte[17]))
#define TCP_SET_CHKSUM(p,c)     (((p) -> byte[16] = (c) >> 8), ((p) -> byte[17] = (c) & 0xff))
#define UDP_GET_SRC_PORT(p)     (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[0]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[1]))
#define UDP_SET_SRC_PORT_64(p,v) (((p) -> byte[0] = v >> 8), ((p) -> byte[1] = v & 0xff))
#define UDP_GET_DST_PORT(p)     (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[2]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[3]))
#define UDP_SET_DST_PORT_64(p,v) (((p) -> byte[2] = v >> 8), ((p) -> byte[3] = v & 0xff))
#define UDP_GET_LEN(p)          (((ULONG) ((p) -> byte[4]) << 8) | (ULONG) ((p) -> byte[5]))
#define UDP_GET_CHKSUM(p)       (((USHORT) ((p) -> byte[6]) << 8) | (USHORT) ((p) -> byte[7]))
#define UDP_SET_CHKSUM(p,c)     (((p) -> byte[6] = (c) >> 8), ((p) -> byte[7] = (c) & 0xff))

       #define SIZE_PACKET_STACKS (sizeof(STACK_INDEX) + (sizeof(NDIS_PACKET_STACK) * ndisPacketStackSize)) */

// net\wlbs\nlbmgr\nlbsprov\wlbsctrl.h
#define WLBS_API_VER             (WLBS_API_VER_MINOR | (WLBS_API_VER_MAJOR << 8))

// printscan\fax\config\dll\faxcpl.h
#define PRINTERPAGE_MASK    ((1 << CLIENT_OPTIONS_PAGE) | \
                             (1 << SERVER_COVERPG_PAGE) | \
                             (1 << SEND_OPTIONS_PAGE))
#define GetChangedFlag(pageIndex) (gConfigData->changeFlag & (1 << (pageIndex)))
#define IsFaxDeviceListInSync(pageIndex) (gConfigData->faxDeviceSyncFlag & (1 << (pageIndex)))
#define SetFaxDeviceListInSync(pageIndex) gConfigData->faxDeviceSyncFlag |= (1 << (pageIndex))

// printscan\fax\config\dll\recvopts.c
#define MatchRoutingOption(matchFlag, routingFlag) { \
            if ((pMatchInfo->match & (matchFlag)) && \
                (pRefInfo->Mask & (routingFlag)) != (pDevInfo->Mask & (routingFlag))) \
            { \
                pMatchInfo->match &= ~(matchFlag); \
            } \
        }
#define MatchDWORDField(matchFlag, FieldName) { \
            if ((pMatchInfo->match & (matchFlag)) && \
                (pRefInfo->FieldName != pDevInfo->FieldName)) \
            { \
                pMatchInfo->match &= ~(matchFlag); \
            } \
        }
#define MatchTextField(matchFlag, pFieldName) { \
            if ((pMatchInfo->match & (matchFlag)) && \
                (! pRefInfo->pFieldName || \
                 ! pDevInfo->pFieldName || \
                 _tcsicmp(pRefInfo->pFieldName, pDevInfo->pFieldName) != EQUAL_STRING)) \
            { \
                pMatchInfo->match &= ~(matchFlag); \
            } \
        }
#define SetMatchedCheckBox(matchFlag, routingFlag, itemId) \
        CheckDlgButton(hDlg, itemId, \
            (match & (matchFlag)) ? \
                ((pDevInfo->Mask & (routingFlag)) ? BST_CHECKED : BST_UNCHECKED) : \
                BST_INDETERMINATE)
#define SetMatchedTextField(matchFlag, itemId, pFieldName) \
        SetDlgItemText(hDlg, itemId, \
                       ((match & (matchFlag)) && pDevInfo->pFieldName) ? \
                           pDevInfo->pFieldName : TEXT(""))
#define SetMatchedDWORDField(matchFlag, itemId, pFieldName) \
        SetDlgItemInt(hDlg, itemId, \
                       (match & matchFlag) ? pDevInfo->pFieldName : 0, FALSE)

// printscan\fax\exchange\ab\abctbl.h
#define CBitsB(b, cbits) {                               \
                                                         \
		cbits = 0;                                       \
		                                                 \
		cbits = ((b)   & 0x55) + ((b>>1) & 0x55);        \
		cbits = (cbits & 0x33) + ((cbits>>2) & 0x33);    \
		cbits = (cbits & 0x0f) + (cbits>>4);             \
	}

// printscan\fax\inc\config.h
#define MakeTime(hh,mm,ampm)    ((ULONG)(((BYTE)(ampm)) | ((ULONG)((BYTE)(mm))) << 8) | ((ULONG)((BYTE)(hh))) << 16)
#define GetTime(tv,hh,mm,ampm)  \
                {\
                  ampm = (SHORT)((tv) & 0xff);\
                  mm   = (SHORT)(((tv) >> 8)  & 0xff);\
                  hh   = (SHORT)(((tv) >> 16) & 0xff);\
                }

#define     PIXARLOGDATAFMT_10BITLOG    2       // 10-bit log-encoded (raw)
#define     PIXARLOGDATAFMT_12BITPICIO  3       // as per PICIO (1.0==2048)

// printscan\fax\print\faxprint\faxdrv\faxdrv.h
#define DWORDBITS   (sizeof(DWORD) * BYTEBITS)
#define GetBackgroundRop3(rop4) (((rop4) >> 8) & 0xFF)
#define Rop3NeedPattern(rop3)   (((rop3 >> 4) & 0x0F) != (rop3 & 0x0F))
#define Rop3NeedSource(rop3)    (((rop3 >> 2) & 0x33) != (rop3 & 0x33))
#define Rop3NeedDest(rop3)      (((rop3 >> 1) & 0x55) != (rop3 & 0x55))

// printscan\fax\print\faxprint\faxdrv\faxtiff.h
#define NextChangingElement(pbuf, startBit, stopBit, isBlack) \
        ((startBit) + ((isBlack) ? FindBlackRun((pbuf), (startBit), (stopBit)) : \
                                   FindWhiteRun((pbuf), (startBit), (stopBit))))
#define GetBit(pbuf, bit)   (((pbuf)[(bit) >> 3] >> (((bit) ^ 7) & 7)) & 1)

// printscan\fax\print\faxprint\inc\forms.h
#define IsSupportedForm(pForm)  ((pForm)->Flags & FORM_SUPPORTED)
#define SetSupportedForm(pForm) ((pForm)->Flags |= FORM_SUPPORTED)

// printscan\fax\print\faxprint\test\decode\decode.c
#define ReadCompressedBits() \
        while (bitCount <= 24 && bytecnt > 0) { \
            codeValue |= *pBuffer++ << (24 - bitCount); \
            bitCount += 8; \
            bytecnt--; \
        }

// printscan\fax\provider\t30\class1\ddi.c
#define         ST_MASK         (0x8 | ST_FLAG)         // 8 selects V17 only. 16 selects ST flag
#define POSTPAGEOK_TIMEOUT (10000L + (((ULONG)COM_OUTBUFSIZE) << 2))
#define MUNGECRC(crc) MAKEWORD(LOBYTE(crc),\
                                                        (HIBYTE(crc)<<2)|(LOBYTE(crc)>>6))

// printscan\fax\provider\t30\class1\encoder.h
#define HDLC_End(lpbDst, lpState)                                                                       \
        {       (lpState)->len = 0;                                                                                     \
                *lpbDst = (lpState)->carry;                                                                     \
                *lpbDst++ |= (0xFF << ((lpState)->enc_width));                                  \
                (lpState)->carry = (lpState)->enc_width = 0; }

// printscan\fax\provider\t30\headers\nsfmacro.h
#define NSFvMsgProtocol(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x38) >> 3)
#define fBinaryData(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x40) >> 6)
#define fInwardRouting(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x80) >> 7)
#define vSecurity(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define vMsgCompress(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x18) >> 3)
#define fDontCache(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x20) >> 5)
#define OperatingSys(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define vShortFlags(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0x18) >> 3)
#define NSFvInteractive(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0xE0) >> 5)
#define DataSpeed(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[4]) & 0x1F) >> 0)
#define DataLink(p)			(((((LPBYTE)(p))[4]) & 0xE0) >> 5)
#define SetBCSTD0(p, l, n, m, b, i)							\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6));	\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((m) & 0x07) << 3) | \
				(((b) & 0x01) << 6) | (((i) & 0x01) << 7));
#define SetBCSTD2(p, s, c, d)									\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((s) & 0x07) << 0) | (((c) & 0x03) << 3) | (((d) & 0x01) << 5));
#define SetBCSTD3(p, o, f, i)								\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) = ((((o) & 0x07) << 0) | (((f) & 0x03) << 3) | (((i) & 0x07) << 5));
#define SetBCSTD4(p, s, l)									\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[4]) = ((((s) & 0x1F) << 0) | (((l) & 0x07) << 5));
#define TextEncoding(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0xF8) >> 3)
#define fAnyWidth(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x08) >> 3)
#define vRamboVer(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0xF0) >> 4)
#define vCoverAttach(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define vAddrAttach(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x18) >> 3)
#define vMetaFile(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x60) >> 5)
#define HiResolution(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0x0F) >> 0)
#define HiEncoding(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0xF0) >> 4)
#define fOddCutSheet(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[5]) & 0x01) >> 0)
#define SetBCIMAGE0(p, l, n, a, r)							\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6));	\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((a) & 0x01) << 3) | \
			(((r) & 0x0F) << 4));
#define SetBCIMAGE2(p, c, a, m)								\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((c) & 0x07) << 0) | (((a) & 0x03) << 3) | (((m) & 0x03) << 5));
#define SetBCIMAGE3(p, r, e)								\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) = ((((r) & 0x0F) << 0) | (((e) & 0x0F) << 4));
#define SetBCIMAGE5(p, c)	(((LPBYTE)(p))[5]) = (((c) & 0x01) << 0);
#define fLowSpeedPoll(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x08) >> 3)
#define fHighSpeedPoll(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x10) >> 4)
#define fPollByNameAvail(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x20) >> 5)
#define fPollByRecipAvail(p) (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x40) >> 6)
#define fFilePolling(p)		 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x80) >> 7)
#define fExtCapsAvail(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x01) >> 0)
#define fNoShortTurn(p)	 	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x02) >> 1)
#define vMsgRelay(p)	 	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x1C) >> 2)
#define ExtCapsCRC(p)	 	 (((WORD)(((LPBYTE)(p))[3])) | (((WORD)(((LPBYTE)(p))[4])) << 8))
#define SetExtCapsCRC(p, w)  ((((LPBYTE)(p))[3] = (((WORD)(w)) & 0xFF)), (((LPBYTE)(p))[4] = ((((WORD)(w)) >> 8) & 0xFF)))
#define SetBCPOLLCAPS0(p, l, n, lp, hp, pn, pr, pf)			  \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) |  (((n) & 0x03) << 6));  \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) =  ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((lp) & 0x01) << 3) | \
				(((hp) & 0x01) << 4) | (((pn) & 0x01) << 5) | \
				(((pr) & 0x01) << 6) | (((pf) & 0x01) << 7));
#define SetBCPOLLCAPS2(p, e, n, m)							  \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((e) & 0x01) << 0) | (((n) & 0x01) << 1) | (((m) & 0x07) << 2));
#define NSSvMsgProtocol(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x38) >> 3)
#define NSSvInteractive(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define SetBCNSS0(p, l, n, m, i)							\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6)); \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((m) & 0x07) << 3)); \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((i) & 0x07) << 0));
#define PollType(p)			(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0xF0) >> 4)
#define SetBCPOLLREQ0(p, l, n, f, t) 										\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6));	\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((f) & 0x01) << 3) | 	\
			(((t) & 0x0F) << 4));
#define SetBCSTD3(p, o, f, i)				\
			(((p)->OperatingSys) = (o));	\
			(((p)->vShortFlags)	 = (f));	\
			(((p)->vInteractive) = (i));

// printscan\faxsrv\src\print\faxprint\faxdrv\faxdrv.h
#define DWORDBITS   (sizeof(DWORD) * BYTEBITS)
#define GetBackgroundRop3(rop4) (((rop4) >> 8) & 0xFF)
#define Rop3NeedPattern(rop3)   (((rop3 >> 4) & 0x0F) != (rop3 & 0x0F))
#define Rop3NeedSource(rop3)    (((rop3 >> 2) & 0x33) != (rop3 & 0x33))
#define Rop3NeedDest(rop3)      (((rop3 >> 1) & 0x55) != (rop3 & 0x55))

// printscan\faxsrv\src\print\faxprint\faxdrv\faxtiff.h
#define NextChangingElement(pbuf, startBit, stopBit, isBlack) \
        ((startBit) + ((isBlack) ? FindBlackRun((pbuf), (startBit), (stopBit)) : \
                                   FindWhiteRun((pbuf), (startBit), (stopBit))))
#define GetBit(pbuf, bit)   (((pbuf)[(bit) >> 3] >> (((bit) ^ 7) & 7)) & 1)

#define SetSupportedForm(pForm) ((pForm)->Flags |= FORM_SUPPORTED)

				ULONG				ulTransferMethod) IPURE;	\

		(THIS_	ULONG				ulTransferMethod,			\

#define POSTPAGEOK_TIMEOUT (10000L + (((ULONG)COM_OUTBUFSIZE) << 2))
#define MUNGECRC(crc) MAKEWORD(LOBYTE(crc),(HIBYTE(crc)<<2)|(LOBYTE(crc)>>6))

// printscan\faxsrv\src\provider\t30\class1\encoder.h
#define HDLC_End(lpbDst, lpState)                                                                       \
        {       (lpState)->len = 0;                                                                                     \
                *lpbDst = (lpState)->carry;                                                                     \
                *lpbDst++ |= (0xFF << ((lpState)->enc_width));                                  \
                (lpState)->carry = (lpState)->enc_width = 0; }

    (((LPBYTE)(lp))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6));   \
    (((LPBYTE)(lp))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((t) & 0x1F) << 3));

        (pTG->gMonInfo.fInited && MonPutEvent(pTG, wFlags, ID, SubID, dw0, dw1, lpsz))
#define MIN_MRBUFSIZE           (65536L>>2)
#define fMON_COMM_RESERVED      (0x1<<15) // Should never be used.
#define fMON_COMM_IN            (0x1<<0) // Read operation
#define fMON_COMM_OUT           (0x1<<1) // Write operation
#define fMON_COMM_CMDRESP       (0x1<<3) // We believe modem is in command mode
#define fMON_COMM_DATA          (0x1<<4) // We believe modem is in data mode

// printscan\faxsrv\src\provider\t30\headers\nsfmacro.h
#define NSFvMsgProtocol(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x38) >> 3)
#define fBinaryData(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x40) >> 6)
#define fInwardRouting(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x80) >> 7)
#define vSecurity(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define vMsgCompress(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x18) >> 3)
#define fDontCache(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x20) >> 5)
#define OperatingSys(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define vShortFlags(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0x18) >> 3)
#define NSFvInteractive(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0xE0) >> 5)
#define DataSpeed(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[4]) & 0x1F) >> 0)
#define DataLink(p)			(((((LPBYTE)(p))[4]) & 0xE0) >> 5)
#define SetBCSTD0(p, l, n, m, b, i)							\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6));	\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((m) & 0x07) << 3) | \
				(((b) & 0x01) << 6) | (((i) & 0x01) << 7));
#define SetBCSTD2(p, s, c, d)									\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((s) & 0x07) << 0) | (((c) & 0x03) << 3) | (((d) & 0x01) << 5));
#define SetBCSTD3(p, o, f, i)								\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) = ((((o) & 0x07) << 0) | (((f) & 0x03) << 3) | (((i) & 0x07) << 5));
#define SetBCSTD4(p, s, l)									\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[4]) = ((((s) & 0x1F) << 0) | (((l) & 0x07) << 5));
#define TextEncoding(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0xF8) >> 3)
#define fAnyWidth(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x08) >> 3)
#define vRamboVer(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0xF0) >> 4)
#define vCoverAttach(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define vAddrAttach(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x18) >> 3)
#define vMetaFile(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x60) >> 5)
#define HiResolution(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0x0F) >> 0)
#define HiEncoding(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) & 0xF0) >> 4)
#define fOddCutSheet(p)	(((((LPBYTE)(p))[5]) & 0x01) >> 0)
#define SetBCIMAGE0(p, l, n, a, r)							\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6));	\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((a) & 0x01) << 3) | \
			(((r) & 0x0F) << 4));
#define SetBCIMAGE2(p, c, a, m)								\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((c) & 0x07) << 0) | (((a) & 0x03) << 3) | (((m) & 0x03) << 5));
#define SetBCIMAGE3(p, r, e)								\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[3]) = ((((r) & 0x0F) << 0) | (((e) & 0x0F) << 4));
#define SetBCIMAGE5(p, c)	(((LPBYTE)(p))[5]) = (((c) & 0x01) << 0);
#define fLowSpeedPoll(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x08) >> 3)
#define fHighSpeedPoll(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x10) >> 4)
#define fPollByNameAvail(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x20) >> 5)
#define fPollByRecipAvail(p) (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x40) >> 6)
#define fFilePolling(p)		 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x80) >> 7)
#define fExtCapsAvail(p)	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x01) >> 0)
#define fNoShortTurn(p)	 	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x02) >> 1)
#define vMsgRelay(p)	 	 (((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x1C) >> 2)
#define ExtCapsCRC(p)	 	 (((WORD)(((LPBYTE)(p))[3])) | (((WORD)(((LPBYTE)(p))[4])) << 8))
#define SetExtCapsCRC(p, w)  ((((LPBYTE)(p))[3] = (((WORD)(w)) & 0xFF)), (((LPBYTE)(p))[4] = ((((WORD)(w)) >> 8) & 0xFF)))
#define SetBCPOLLCAPS0(p, l, n, lp, hp, pn, pr, pf)			  \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) |  (((n) & 0x03) << 6));  \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) =  ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((lp) & 0x01) << 3) | \
				(((hp) & 0x01) << 4) | (((pn) & 0x01) << 5) | \
				(((pr) & 0x01) << 6) | (((pf) & 0x01) << 7));
#define SetBCPOLLCAPS2(p, e, n, m)							  \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((e) & 0x01) << 0) | (((n) & 0x01) << 1) | (((m) & 0x07) << 2));
#define NSSvMsgProtocol(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0x38) >> 3)
#define NSSvInteractive(p)		(((((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) & 0x07) >> 0)
#define SetBCNSS0(p, l, n, m, i)							\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6)); \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((m) & 0x07) << 3)); \
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[2]) = ((((i) & 0x07) << 0));
#define PollType(p)			(((((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) & 0xF0) >> 4)
#define SetBCPOLLREQ0(p, l, n, f, t) 										\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[0]) = ((((l) & 0x3F) << 0) | (((n) & 0x03) << 6));	\
	(((LPBYTE)(p))[1]) = ((((n) & 0x1C) >> 2) | (((f) & 0x01) << 3) | 	\
			(((t) & 0x0F) << 4));
#define SetBCSTD3(p, o, f, i)				\
			(((p)->OperatingSys) = (o));	\
			(((p)->vShortFlags)	 = (f));	\
			(((p)->vInteractive) = (i));

	( (grfKeyState & MK_CONTROL) ?          \

// printscan\faxsrv\src\sdktools\msvc15\include\penwin.h
#define FPenUpX(x)             (((x) & BITPENUP)!=0)
#define MpAlcB(lprc,i) ((lprc)->rgbfAlc[((i) & 0xff) >> 3])
#define MpIbf(i)       ((BYTE)(1 << ((i) & 7)))
#define SetAlcBitAnsi(lprc,i)      do {MpAlcB(lprc,i) |= MpIbf(i);} while (0)
#define ResetAlcBitAnsi(lprc,i)    do {MpAlcB(lprc,i) &= ~MpIbf(i);} while (0)
#define IsAlcBitAnsi(lprc, i)      ((MpAlcB(lprc,i) & MpIbf(i)) != 0)

#define TEST_ECR_FIFO(registerValue,testValue)  \
	( ( (registerValue) & ECR_FIFO_MASK ) == testValue )
    #define SET_DCR(b5,b4,b3,b2,b1,b0) \
    ((UCHAR)((b5==ACTIVE? BIT_5_SET : 0) | \
            (b4==ACTIVE?  BIT_4_SET : 0) | \
            (b3==ACTIVE?  0         : BIT_3_SET) | \
            (b2==ACTIVE?  BIT_2_SET : 0) | \
            (b1==ACTIVE?  0         : BIT_1_SET) | \
            (b0==ACTIVE?  0         : BIT_0_SET) ) )
    #define SET_DCR(b5,b4,b3,b2,b1,b0) \
    ((UCHAR)(((b5==ACTIVE?1:0)<<BIT_5) | \
            ((b4==ACTIVE?1:0)<<BIT_4) | \
            ((b3==ACTIVE?0:1)<<BIT_3) | \
            ((b2==ACTIVE?1:0)<<BIT_2) | \
            ((b1==ACTIVE?0:1)<<BIT_1) | \
            ((b0==ACTIVE?0:1)<<BIT_0) ) )

// printscan\faxsrv\src\test\src\xxxunusedxxx\deviceioctls\socketclientioctl.cpp
#define PROTOCOL_ID(Type, VendorMajor, VendorMinor, Id) (((Type)<<28)|((VendorMajor)<<24)|((VendorMinor)<<16)|(Id))

// printscan\faxsrv\src\test\src\xxxunusedxxx\deviceioctls\socketioctl.cpp
#define PROTOCOL_ID(Type, VendorMajor, VendorMinor, Id) (((Type)<<28)|((VendorMajor)<<24)|((VendorMinor)<<16)|(Id))

// printscan\faxsrv\src\test\src\xxxunusedxxx\deviceioctls\socketserverioctl.cpp
#define PROTOCOL_ID(Type, VendorMajor, VendorMinor, Id) (((Type)<<28)|((VendorMajor)<<24)|((VendorMinor)<<16)|(Id))

#define WDMAUD_CTL_CODE( DeviceType, Function, Method, Access ) (ULONG)(   \
    ((ULONG)(DeviceType) << 16) | ((ULONG)(Access) << 14) | ((ULONG)(Function) << 2) | (ULONG)(Method) \
)

// printscan\faxsrv\src\test\src\xxxunusedxxx\mscrash\main.cpp
#define DWORD_RAND \
	(rand()%10 ? RtlRandom(&g_tlsRandomSeed) : \
	rand()%10 ? ((rand()<<17) | (rand()<<2) | (rand()%4)) : \
	rand()%2 ? rand() : \
	rand()%2 ? (MAXULONG-rand()) : \
	rand()%2 ? MAXULONG : \
	rand()%2 ? MINLONG : \
	rand()%2 ? MAXLONG : \
	0)
#define QUAD_RAND ((0 == rand()%10) ? (ULONGLONGDWORD_RAND | (ULONGLONGDWORD_RAND<<32)) : rand()%4 ? ULONGLONGDWORD_RAND : rand()%2 ? (0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFi64-ULONGLONGDWORD_RAND) : rand()%2 ? (MAXLONGLONG - ULONGLONGDWORD_RAND) : (MAXLONGLONG + ULONGLONGDWORD_RAND))

// printscan\faxsrv\src\tiff\src\tifflibp.h
#define NextChangingElement( pbuf, startBit, stopBit, isBlack ) \
        ((startBit) + ((isBlack) ? FindBlackRun((pbuf), (startBit), (stopBit)) : \
                                   FindWhiteRun((pbuf), (startBit), (stopBit))))
#define GetBit( pbuf, bit )   (((pbuf)[(bit) >> 3] >> (((bit) ^ 7) & 7)) & 1)
#define WORDBITS    (sizeof(WORD)  * BYTEBITS)
#define DWORDBITS   (sizeof(DWORD) * BYTEBITS)

// printscan\faxsrv\src\tiff\src\util.c
#define PIXELS_TO_BYTES(x)  (((x) + 7)/8)   // Calculates the number of bytes required to store x pixels (bits)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\driverui\driverui.h
#define IS_WITHIN_PROPSHEET_SESSION(pci) ((pci)->dwFlags & FLAG_PROPSHEET_SESSION)
#define IS_HIDING_STD_UI(pUiData) \
    ((((pUiData)->iMode == MODE_DOCUMENT_STICKY) &&           \
      ((pUiData)->dwHideFlags & HIDEFLAG_HIDE_STD_DOCPROP)) ||  \
     (((pUiData)->iMode == MODE_PRINTER_STICKY) &&            \
      ((pUiData)->dwHideFlags & HIDEFLAG_HIDE_STD_PRNPROP)))
#define IS_CONSTRAINED(pitem, sel) ((pitem)->pOptType->pOptParam[sel].Flags & CONSTRAINED_FLAG)
#define FILLOPTITEM(poptitem,popttype,name,sel,level,dmpub,userdata,help)   \
        (poptitem)->cbSize = sizeof(OPTITEM);                               \
        (poptitem)->Flags |= OPTIF_CALLBACK;                                \
        (poptitem)->pOptType = (popttype);                                  \
        (poptitem)->pName = (PWSTR) (name);                                 \
        (poptitem)->pSel = (PVOID) (sel);                                   \
        (poptitem)->Level = (BYTE) (level);                                 \
        (poptitem)->DMPubID = (BYTE) (dmpub);                               \
        SETUSERDATAID(poptitem, userdata);                                  \
        (poptitem)->HelpIndex = (help)
#define ISSET_MFSPOOL_FLAG(pdmExtra)    ((pdmExtra)->dwFlags & PSDEVMODE_METAFILE_SPOOL)
#define SET_MFSPOOL_FLAG(pdmExtra)      ((pdmExtra)->dwFlags |= PSDEVMODE_METAFILE_SPOOL)
#define CLEAR_MFSPOOL_FLAG(pdmExtra)    ((pdmExtra)->dwFlags &= ~PSDEVMODE_METAFILE_SPOOL)
#define ISSET_MFSPOOL_FLAG(pdmExtra)    (((pdmExtra)->dwFlags & DXF_NOEMFSPOOL) == 0)
#define SET_MFSPOOL_FLAG(pdmExtra)      ((pdmExtra)->dwFlags &= ~DXF_NOEMFSPOOL)
#define CLEAR_MFSPOOL_FLAG(pdmExtra)    ((pdmExtra)->dwFlags |= DXF_NOEMFSPOOL)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\gpdres\riafui\devmode.h
#define BITCLR32(flag,num)      ((flag) &= ~BIT(num))
#define BITSET32(flag,num)      ((flag) |= BIT(num))
#define BITTEST32(flag,num)     ((flag) & BIT(num))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\gpdres\rpdlres\nt4\pdev.h
#define BITCLR32(flag,num)      ((flag) &= ~BIT(num))
#define BITSET32(flag,num)      ((flag) |= BIT(num))
#define BITTEST32(flag,num)     ((flag) & BIT(num))
#define TO1BIT(flag,num)        (((flag)>>(num)) & (DWORD)1)
#define BITCPY32(dst,src,num)   ((dst) = ((DWORD)(src) & BIT(num))? \
                                (DWORD)(dst) | BIT(num) : (DWORD)(dst) & ~BIT(num))
#define BITNCPY32(dst,src,num)  ((dst) = ((DWORD)(src) & BIT(num))? \
                                (DWORD)(dst) & ~BIT(num) : (DWORD)(dst) | BIT(num))
#define TEST_OBJ_CHANGE(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(BRUSH_CHANGE)|BIT(PEN_CHANGE)| \
                                           BIT(SCAN_PEN_WIDTH_1)|BIT(SCAN_PEN_WIDTH_ORG)))
#define TEST_2IN1_MODE(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(IMGCTRL_2IN1_100)|BIT(IMGCTRL_2IN1_67)))
#define TEST_4IN1_MODE(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(IMGCTRL_4IN1_50)))
#define TEST_NIN1_MODE(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(IMGCTRL_2IN1_100)|BIT(IMGCTRL_2IN1_67)|BIT(IMGCTRL_4IN1_50)))
#define BITCLR_NIN1_MODE(flag)  ((flag) &= ~(BIT(IMGCTRL_2IN1_100)|BIT(IMGCTRL_2IN1_67)|BIT(IMGCTRL_4IN1_50)))
#define TEST_SCALING_SEL_TRAY(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(IMGCTRL_AA67)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA80)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA115)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA141)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA200)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA283)|BIT(IMGCTRL_A1_400)))
#define BITCLR_SCALING_SEL_TRAY(flag) ((flag) &= ~(BIT(IMGCTRL_AA67)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA80)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA115)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA141)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA200)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA283)|BIT(IMGCTRL_A1_400)))
#define BITCLR_BARCODE(flag)    ((flag) &= ~(BIT(BARCODE_MODE_IN)|BIT(BARCODE_DATA_VALID)| \
                                             BIT(BARCODE_FINISH)|BIT(BARCODE_CHECKDIGIT_ON)| \
                                             BIT(BARCODE_ROT90)|BIT(BARCODE_ROT270)))
#define BITCLR_UPPER_FLAG(flag) ((flag) &= 0x0000FFFF)
#define PRODUCTS_SINCE99        (BIT(GRP_NX900)|BIT(GRP_MF1530))
#define PRODUCTS_SINCE98        (BIT(GRP_MF3550)|BIT(GRP_MF3300)|BIT(GRP_NX70)|BIT(GRP_NX700)|PRODUCTS_SINCE99)
#define PRODUCTS_SINCE97        (BIT(GRP_NX500)|BIT(GRP_MF250M)|PRODUCTS_SINCE98)
#define PRODUCTS_SINCE96        (BIT(GRP_SP9II)|BIT(GRP_MF200)|BIT(GRP_NX100)|PRODUCTS_SINCE97)
#define TEST_CAPABLE_MEDIATYPE(flag)  ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF3550)|BIT(GRP_MF1530)))
#define TEST_CAPABLE_PAPER_A2(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF3300)))
#define TEST_PLOTTERMODEL_SCALING(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF3300)|BIT(GRP_IP1)))
#define TEST_CAPABLE_PAPER_A3_W297(flag)   ((flag) & (PRODUCTS_SINCE97 & ~BIT(GRP_MF3300)))
#define TEST_CAPABLE_PAPER_A4MAX(flag)  ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_NX70)))
#define TEST_CAPABLE_PAPERX(flag)       ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF150e)|BIT(GRP_MFP250)|BIT(GRP_IP1)|PRODUCTS_SINCE96))
#define TEST_BUGFIX_RESET_SMOOTH(flag)  ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_SP10)|BIT(GRP_SP9)|PRODUCTS_SINCE96))
#define TEST_BUGFIX_FORMFEED(flag)      ((flag) & PRODUCTS_SINCE98)
#define TEST_CAPABLE_DOWNLOADFONT_DRC(flag)  ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_NX70)|BIT(GRP_NX700)|PRODUCTS_SINCE99))
#define TEST_AFTER_SP9II(flag)  ((flag) & PRODUCTS_SINCE96)
#define TEST_AFTER_SP10(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_SP10)|BIT(GRP_SP9)|BIT(GRP_MFP250)|BIT(GRP_IP1)|PRODUCTS_SINCE96))
#define TEST_AFTER_SP8(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_SP8)|BIT(GRP_SP10)|BIT(GRP_SP9)|BIT(GRP_MFP250)|BIT(GRP_IP1)|PRODUCTS_SINCE96))
#define TEST_GRP_240DPI(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_SP4mkII)|BIT(GRP_SP8)))
#define TEST_GRP_OLDMF(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF530)|BIT(GRP_MF150)|BIT(GRP_MF150e)))
#define TEST_MAXCOPIES_99(flag) ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_SP4mkII)|BIT(GRP_SP8)|BIT(GRP_SP10)|BIT(GRP_SP9)|BIT(GRP_MF150)|BIT(GRP_MF150e)|BIT(GRP_MF200)|BIT(GRP_MF250M)|BIT(GRP_IP1)))  // @Sep/01/98

#define TO1BIT(flag,num)        (((flag)>>(num)) & (DWORD)1)

                                (DWORD)(dst) | BIT(num) : (DWORD)(dst) & ~BIT(num))

                                           BIT(SCAN_PEN_WIDTH_1)|BIT(SCAN_PEN_WIDTH_ORG)))

#define TEST_4IN1_MODE(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(IMGCTRL_4IN1_50)))

#define TEST_SCALING_SEL_TRAY(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(IMGCTRL_AA67)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA80)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA115)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA141)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA200)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA283)|BIT(IMGCTRL_A1_400)))
#define BITCLR_SCALING_SEL_TRAY(flag) ((flag) &= ~(BIT(IMGCTRL_AA67)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA80)|BIT(IMGCTRL_BA115)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA141)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA200)|BIT(IMGCTRL_AA283)|BIT(IMGCTRL_A1_400)))

                                             BIT(BARCODE_FINISH)|BIT(BARCODE_CHECKDIGIT_ON)| \
                                             BIT(BARCODE_ROT90)|BIT(BARCODE_ROT270)))

#define PRODUCTS_SINCE98        (BIT(GRP_MF3550)|BIT(GRP_MF3300)|BIT(GRP_NX70)|BIT(GRP_NX700)|PRODUCTS_SINCE99)
#define PRODUCTS_SINCE97        (BIT(GRP_NX500)|BIT(GRP_MF250M)|PRODUCTS_SINCE98)

#define TEST_PLOTTERMODEL_SCALING(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF3300)|BIT(GRP_IP1)))
#define TEST_CAPABLE_PAPER_A3_W297(flag)   ((flag) & (PRODUCTS_SINCE97 & ~BIT(GRP_MF3300)))

#define TEST_CAPABLE_PAPERX(flag)       ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF150e)|BIT(GRP_MFP250)|BIT(GRP_IP1)|PRODUCTS_SINCE96))

#define TEST_CAPABLE_DOWNLOADFONT_DRC(flag)  ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_NX70)|BIT(GRP_NX700)|PRODUCTS_SINCE99))
#define TEST_GWMODEL(flag)              ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_NX720)))
#define TEST_AFTER_SP9II(flag)  ((flag) & PRODUCTS_SINCE96)
#define TEST_AFTER_SP10(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_SP10)|BIT(GRP_SP9)|BIT(GRP_MFP250)|BIT(GRP_IP1)|PRODUCTS_SINCE96))

#define TEST_GRP_240DPI(flag)   ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_SP4mkII)|BIT(GRP_SP8)))
#define TEST_GRP_OLDMF(flag)    ((flag) & (BIT(GRP_MF530)|BIT(GRP_MF150)|BIT(GRP_MF150e)))

#define CSUP(a) \
    (1 << a)
#define CSET_SUPPORT(cpt, cset) \
    (cpt & (CSUP(cset)))
#define CHR_DEF(gi) \
    (1 << (gi % 8))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\inc\lib.h
#define FIX_24_8_SCALE  (1 << FIX_24_8_SHIFT)
#define BITTST(p, i) (((PBYTE) (p))[(i) >> 3] & (1 << ((i) & 7)))
#define BITSET(p, i) (((PBYTE) (p))[(i) >> 3] |= (1 << ((i) & 7)))
#define BITCLR(p, i) (((PBYTE) (p))[(i) >> 3] &= ~(1 << ((i) & 7)))

        (BITTST((pOemEntry)->aubProcFlags, EP_##ep) ? \
            (pOemEntry)->oemprocs[EP_##ep] : \
            PGetOemEntrypointAddress(pOemEntry, EP_##ep))

#define SUPPORT_CUSTOMSIZE(pUIInfo) ((pUIInfo)->dwFlags & FLAG_CUSTOMSIZE_SUPPORT)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\inc\pfm.h

                             ((DWORD) ((PBYTE)(p))[3] <<  8) |  \
                             ((DWORD) ((PBYTE)(p))[4] << 16) |  \
                             ((DWORD) ((PBYTE)(p))[5] << 24))

        ((pUIInfo)->dwSpecVersion >= PPD_SPECVERSION_43 || \
         ((pPpdData)->dwCustomSizeFlags & CUSTOMSIZE_ROLLFED))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\inc\psntm.h
#define CH_DEF(gi)                  (1 << ((gi) % 8))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\inc\regdata.h
#define PERFORM_TRUE_GRAY_TEXT(pdev)   ((pdev)->PrinterData.dwFlags & PFLAGS_TRUE_GRAY_TEXT)
#define PERFORM_TRUE_GRAY_GRAPH(pdev)  ((pdev)->PrinterData.dwFlags & PFLAGS_TRUE_GRAY_GRAPH)
#define PERFORM_ADD_EURO(pdev)    (((pdev)->PrinterData.dwFlags & PFLAGS_ADD_EURO) && \
                                    (TARGET_PSLEVEL(pdev) >= 2))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\lib\ufl\api\ttformat.h
#define MOTOROLALONG(a)     (unsigned long)(((unsigned long)*((unsigned char *)&a) << 24) \
                             + ((unsigned long)*(((unsigned char *)&a) + 1) << 16) \
                             + ((unsigned long)*(((unsigned char *)&a) + 2) << 8)  \
                             + ((unsigned long)*(((unsigned char *)&a) + 3)))
#define MOTOROLAINT(a)      (unsigned short)(((unsigned short)*((unsigned char *)&a) << 8) \
                             + (unsigned short)*(((unsigned char *)&a) + 1))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\lib\ufl\api\uflmath.h
#define UFLTruncFixedToShort( x )      (short)( (x) >> 16 )
#define UFLRoundFixedToShort( x )     (short)( ((x) + 0x08000) >> 16 )
#define UFLCeilingFixedToShort( x )        (short)( ((x) + 0x0ffff) >> 16 )
#define UFLShortToFixed( x )               ( ((UFLFixed)(x)) << 16 )

#define GET_HIBYTE(c)   (((c) & 0x00FF) >> 8)
#define GET_HIBYTE(c)   (((c) & 0xFF00) >> 8)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\lib\ufl\api\ufo.h
#define IS_GLYPH_SENT(arr, i)         ((arr)[((i)>>3)] & (1 << ((i)&7)))

#define HOSTFONT_VALIDATE_UFO(pUFO)  		((pUFO)->dwFlags |=  UFO_HostFontAble)
#define HOSTFONT_INVALIDATE_UFO(pUFO)      	((pUFO)->dwFlags &= ~UFO_HostFontAble)
#define HOSTFONT_SAVE_CURRENTNAME(pUFO, pName) \
    (UFLBool)(pUFO)->pUFL->fontProcs.pfHostFontUFLHandler(HOSTFONT_UFLREQUEST_SET_CURRENTNAME, \
                                                            (pUFO)->hHostFontData, \
                                                            (pName), NULL, \
                                                            NULL, 0)

#define cff_ESC(op)                 (cff_escape<<8|(op))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\lib\xcf\xcf_priv.h
#define ROUND_FIXED_TO_INT(x) ((Int16)(x < 0 ? ((x)-(FIXEDHALF))>>16 : ((x)+(FIXEDHALF))>>16))
#define INT_TO_FIXED(number)	(((Fixed)(number))<<16)
#define FIXED_TO_INT(number)	((Int16)((number)>>16))
#define CIDFONT (h->type1.cid.flags & CID_FLAG)	/* xxx do we want a better flag for this? */
#define IS_GLYPH_SENT(arr, i) 		      ((arr)[((i)>>3)] & (1 << ((i)&7)))

#define tx_ESC(op)          (tx_escape<<8|(op))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\msplot\plotter\compress.c
#define SET_ADAPT_CONTROL(pPDev, m, c)                                      \
{                                                                           \
    BYTE    bAdaptCtrl[4];                                                  \
                                                                            \
    bAdaptCtrl[0] = (BYTE)(m);                                              \
    bAdaptCtrl[1] = (BYTE)(((c) >> 8) & 0xFF);                              \
    bAdaptCtrl[2] = (BYTE)(((c)     ) & 0xFF);                              \
    OutputBytes(pPDev, bAdaptCtrl, 3);                                      \
}

#define ORIENTATION_AVAILABLE(iOrient) (dwFlags & (1 << (iOrient)))

#define BINARY_MASK  (QUOTED_MASK|XLATION_MASK)

#define GENERIC_ENTRY(featureId)    ((featureId) << 16)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\parsers\ppd\ppdparse.h
#define IS_MASKED_CHAR(ch, mask) (gubCharMasks[(BYTE) (ch)] & (mask))
#define IS_DIGIT(ch)             (gubCharMasks[(BYTE) (ch)] & DIGIT_MASK)
#define IS_HEX_DIGIT(ch)         (gubCharMasks[(BYTE) (ch)] & (DIGIT_MASK|HEX_DIGIT_MASK))
#define CLEAR_SYMBOL_INVOC(pInvoc) ((pInvoc)->dwLength &= ~SYMBOL_INVOCATION_LENGTH)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\tools\ps\cpsi2tif\cpsi2tif.c
#define swap_integer(n) \
        ((((n) >> 24) & 0x00ff) | \
         (((n) >>  8) & 0xff00) | \
         (((n) & 0xff00) <<  8) | \
         (((n) & 0x00ff) << 24))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\tools\ps\cpsi2tif\tiffcomp.c
#define NextChangingElement(buf, startBit, stopBit, isBlack) \
        ((startBit) + ((isBlack) ? FindBlackRun((buf), (startBit), (stopBit)) : \
                                   FindWhiteRun((buf), (startBit), (stopBit))))
#define GetBit(buf, bit)   (((buf)[(bit) >> 3] >> (((bit) ^ 7) & 7)) & 1)
#define OutputBits(length, code) { \
            tiffData |= ((UINT32) (code) << (tiffDataBits - (length))); \
            if ((tiffDataBits -= (length)) <= 16) { \
                OutputByte(tiffData >> 24); \
                OutputByte(tiffData >> 16); \
                tiffData <<= 16; \
                tiffDataBits += 16; \
            } \
        }

                               ((pdm)->pfm->flFlags &  \
                               (FM_SENT | FM_GEN_SFONT)) )

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\font\fmmacro.h
#define     SET_CURSOR_FOR_EACH_GLYPH(flAccel)    \
                        (                       \
                        (!(flAccel & SO_FLAG_DEFAULT_PLACEMENT)) ||  \
                        ( flAccel & SO_VERTICAL )                ||  \
                        ( flAccel & SO_REVERSED )                    \
                        )
#define     SET_CURSOR_POS(pPDev,pgp,flAccel) \
                        if (!(flAccel & SO_FLAG_DEFAULT_PLACEMENT)) \
                           XMoveTo(pPDev, pgp->ptl.x, MV_GRAPHICS|MV_FINE)

#define SWAL( x )  ((ULONG)(x) = (ULONG) ((((((x) >> 24) & 0x000000ff) | \
                                         (((((x) >> 8) & 0x0000ff00)   | \
                                         ((((x) << 8) & 0x00ff0000)    | \
                                         (((x) << 24) & 0xff000000))))))))
#define FIXEDTOLONG(fixed) (((fixed).value << 16) | ((fixed).fract))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\inc\palette.h

#define BLUE_VALUE(c)  ((BYTE) (c >> 16) & 0xff)

#define DWBITS          (sizeof( DWORD ) * BBITS)

#define MIN_SIZE_OF_BITMAP (ONE_MBYTE / 2L)

#define SWAB(x) ((WORD)(x) = (WORD)((((x) >> 8)& 0xff) | (((x) << 8) &0xff00)))

#define GREEN_VALUE(c) ((BYTE) (c >> 8) & 0xff)
#define BLUE_VALUE(c)  ((BYTE) (c >> 16) & 0xff)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\render\rmrender.h
#define WBITS   (sizeof( WORD ) * BBITS)
#define DWBITS  (sizeof( DWORD ) * BBITS)

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\render\stretch.c
#define ROP4_NEED_MASK(Rop4)    (((Rop4 >> 8) & 0xFF) != (Rop4 & 0xFF))
#define ROP3_NEED_PAT(Rop3)     (((Rop3 >> 4) & 0x0F) != (Rop3 & 0x0F))
#define ROP3_NEED_SRC(Rop3)     (((Rop3 >> 2) & 0x33) != (Rop3 & 0x33))
#define ROP3_NEED_DST(Rop3)     (((Rop3 >> 1) & 0x55) != (Rop3 & 0x55))
#define ROP4_BG_ROP(Rop4)       ((Rop4 >> 8) & 0xFF)
#define MIXCOPYPEN (R2_COPYPEN | (R2_COPYPEN << 8))
#define MIXWHITE   (R2_WHITE | (R2_WHITE << 8))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\render\whiteskp.c
#define TABLE_SIZE      ((DWBITS + 1) * sizeof( DWORD ))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\vector\pclxl\cmnhdr.h
#define SWAPW(a)        (USHORT)(((BYTE)((a) >> 8)) | ((BYTE)(a) << 8))
#define SWAPDW(a)       (ULONG) ((((((a) >> 24) & 0x000000ff)  | \
                                (((((a) >> 8) & 0x0000ff00)   | \
                                ((((a) << 8) & 0x00ff0000)    | \
                                (((a) << 24) & 0xff000000)))))))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\vector\pclxl\xlbmpcvt.h
#define GREEN(x)          ((BYTE) ((x) >>  8))
#define BLUE(x)           ((BYTE) ((x) >> 16))
#define MAGENTA(x)        ((BYTE) ((x) >>  8))
#define YELLOW(x)         ((BYTE) ((x) >> 16))
#define BLACK(x)          ((BYTE) ((x) >> 24))
#define RGB2GRAY(r, g, b) ((BYTE) (((r)*77 + (g)*151 + (b)*28) >> 8))

// printscan\print\drivers\usermode\unidrv2\vector\pclxl\xloutput.h
#define GET_BACKGROUND_ROP3(rop4) (((rop4) >> 8) & 0xFF)
#define ROP3_NEED_PATTERN(rop3)   (((rop3 >> 4) & 0x0F) != (rop3 & 0x0F))
#define ROP3_NEED_SOURCE(rop3)    (((rop3 >> 2) & 0x33) != (rop3 & 0x33))
#define ROP3_NEED_DEST(rop3)      (((rop3 >> 1) & 0x55) != (rop3 & 0x55))

// printscan\print\spooler\inc\splcom.h
#define MARKUSE(map, pos) ((map)[(pos) / 32] |= (1 << ((pos) % 32) ))
#define MARKOFF(map, pos) ((map)[(pos) / 32] &= ~(1 << ((pos) % 32) ))
#define ISBITON(map, id) ((map)[id / 32] & ( 1 << ((id) % 32) ) )

// printscan\print\spooler\inetpp2\server\inetpp.h
#define INETPP_REQ_FLAGS (INTERNET_FLAG_KEEP_CONNECTION | INTERNET_FLAG_RELOAD)

// printscan\print\spooler\inetpp2\server\ping.cxx
#define net_long(x) (((((ULONG)(x))&0xffL)<<24) | \
                     ((((ULONG)(x))&0xff00L)<<8) | \
                     ((((ULONG)(x))&0xff0000L)>>8) | \
                     ((((ULONG)(x))&0xff000000L)>>24))

// printscan\print\spooler\inetpp2\server\util.cxx
#define BIN2ASC(bCode,lpHTMLStr)   *lpHTMLStr++ = HexToAsc ((bCode) >> 4);\
                                   *lpHTMLStr++ = HexToAsc ((bCode) & 0xf)

// printscan\print\spooler\inetsrv\genutil.cxx
#define CRC_HI(wHi) (((wHi << 1) | (wHi & 0x8000)) ? 0x0001 : 0)
#define CRC_LO(wLo) (((wLo >> 1) | (wLo & 0x0001)) ? 0x8000 : 0)

// printscan\print\spooler\localspl\jobid.h
#define vMarkOn( hJobId, Id) \
    ((pMapFromHandle( hJobId ))[(Id) / 32] |= (1 << ((Id) % 32) ))
#define vMarkOff( hJobId, Id) \
    ((pMapFromHandle( hJobId ))[(Id) / 32] &= ~(1 << ((Id) % 32) ))
#define bBitOn( hJobId, Id) \
    ((pMapFromHandle( hJobId ))[Id / 32] & ( 1 << ((Id) % 32) ) )

// printscan\print\spooler\localspl\local.h
#define GETBIT(map, id) ((map)[id / 8] & ( 1 << ((id) & 7) ) )

// printscan\print\spooler\localspl\separate.c
#define CJ_DIB16_SCAN(cx) ((((cx) + 15) & ~15) >> 3)

// printscan\print\spooler\localspl\spltypes.h
#define BIT_ALL ((DWORD)~0)

// printscan\print\spooler\spllib\common.hxx
#define BYTE_SWAP_DWORD( val )   \
    ( (val & 0xff) << 24     |   \
      (val & 0xff00) << 8    |   \
      (val & 0xff0000) >> 8  |   \
      (val & 0xff000000) >> 24 )
#define BITCOUNTOF(x) (sizeof(x)*8)

// printscan\print\spooler\spllib\webutil.cxx
#define HIGER_6_BIT(u)   ((u) >> 12)           //
#define MIDDLE_6_BIT(u)  (((u) & 0x0fc0) >> 6) //
#define LOWER_6_BIT(u)   ((u) & 0x003f)        //
#define BIT7(a)          ((a) & 0x80)          //
#define BIT6(a)          ((a) & 0x40)          //
#define BIN2ASC(bCode,lpHTMLStr)   *lpHTMLStr++ = HexToAsc ((bCode) >> 4);\
                                   *lpHTMLStr++ = HexToAsc ((bCode) & 0xf)

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\ddeml.h
#define     XTYP_ADVDATA            (0x0010 | XCLASS_FLAGS         )
#define     XTYP_EXECUTE            (0x0050 | XCLASS_FLAGS         )
#define     XTYP_POKE               (0x0090 | XCLASS_FLAGS         )

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\gdidefs.inc
#define FF_DONTCARE	(0<<4)	/* Don't care or don't know.		*/
#define FF_ROMAN	(1<<4)	/* Variable stroke width, serifed.	*/
#define FF_SWISS	(2<<4)	/* Variable stroke width, sans-serifed. */
#define FF_MODERN	(3<<4)	/* Constant stroke width, serifed or sans-serifed. */
#define FF_SCRIPT	(4<<4)	/* Cursive, etc.			*/
#define FF_DECORATIVE	(5<<4)	/* Old English, etc.			*/

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\mmsystem.h
#define	MMIO_ADVANCE_VALID (MMIO_WRITE | MMIO_READ)	/* valid flags for mmioAdvance */ /* ;Internal */
#define mmioFOURCC( ch0, ch1, ch2, ch3 )                                \
                ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch0) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch1) << 8 ) |    \
                ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch2) << 16 ) | ( (DWORD)(BYTE)(ch3) << 24 ) )
#define MCI_MSF_SECOND(msf)             ((BYTE)(((WORD)(msf)) >> 8))
#define MCI_MSF_FRAME(msf)              ((BYTE)((msf)>>16))
#define MCI_MAKE_MSF(m, s, f)           ((DWORD)(((BYTE)(m) | \
                                                  ((WORD)(s)<<8)) | \
                                                 (((DWORD)(BYTE)(f))<<16)))
#define MCI_TMSF_MINUTE(tmsf)           ((BYTE)(((WORD)(tmsf)) >> 8))
#define MCI_TMSF_SECOND(tmsf)           ((BYTE)((tmsf)>>16))
#define MCI_TMSF_FRAME(tmsf)            ((BYTE)((tmsf)>>24))
#define MCI_MAKE_TMSF(t, m, s, f)       ((DWORD)(((BYTE)(t) | \
                                                  ((WORD)(m)<<8)) | \
                                                 (((DWORD)(BYTE)(s) | \
                                                   ((WORD)(f)<<8))<<16)))
#define MCI_HMS_MINUTE(hms)             ((BYTE)(((WORD)(hms)) >> 8))
#define MCI_HMS_SECOND(hms)             ((BYTE)((hms)>>16))
#define MCI_MAKE_HMS(h, m, s)           ((DWORD)(((BYTE)(h) | \
                                                  ((WORD)(m)<<8)) | \
                                                 (((DWORD)(BYTE)(s))<<16)))

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\penwin.h
#define FPenUpX(x)             (((x) & BITPENUP)!=0)
#define MpAlcB(lprc,i) ((lprc)->rgbfAlc[((i) & 0xff) >> 3])
#define MpIbf(i)       ((BYTE)(1 << ((i) & 7)))
#define SetAlcBitAnsi(lprc,i)      do {MpAlcB(lprc,i) |= MpIbf(i);} while (0)
#define ResetAlcBitAnsi(lprc,i)    do {MpAlcB(lprc,i) &= ~MpIbf(i);} while (0)
#define IsAlcBitAnsi(lprc, i)      ((MpAlcB(lprc,i) & MpIbf(i)) != 0)

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\printer.h
#define HWORD(y)        ((short)(((y)>>16)&0xFFFF))

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\stdio.h
#define feof(_stream)	  ((_stream)->_flag & _IOEOF)
#define ferror(_stream)   ((_stream)->_flag & _IOERR)

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\wife.h
#define PartOfY(xy)	((SHORT)(((DWORD)(xy) >> 16) & 0xFFFF))

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\windows.h
#define RT_BITMAP           MAKEINTRESOURCE(2)
#define RGB(r,g,b)          ((COLORREF)(((BYTE)(r)|((WORD)(g)<<8))|(((DWORD)(BYTE)(b))<<16)))
#define GetGValue(rgb)      ((BYTE)(((WORD)(rgb)) >> 8))
#define GetBValue(rgb)      ((BYTE)((rgb)>>16))
#define SWP_CHANGEMASK      (SWP_NOSIZE | SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOZORDER | /* ;Internal */ \
                            SWP_FRAMECHANGED |                        /* ;Internal */ \
                            SWP_SHOWWINDOW | SWP_HIDEWINDOW |         /* ;Internal */ \
                            SWP_NOCLIENTSIZE | SWP_NOCLIENTMOVE)      /* ;Internal */
#define DCX_MATCHMASK           (DCX_WINDOW | DCX_CACHE |                 /* ;Internal */ \
                                 DCX_CLIPCHILDREN | DCX_CLIPSIBLINGS |    /* ;Internal */ \
                                 DCX_LOCKWINDOWUPDATE                     /* ;Internal */ \
                                )                                         /* ;Internal */
#define BM_GETSTATE         (WM_USER+2)
#define BM_SETSTATE         (WM_USER+3)

// printscan\print\spooler\wpnpinst\wow\inc\windowsx.h
#define     SelectBitmap(hdc, hbm)  ((HBITMAP)SelectObject((hdc), (HGDIOBJ)(HBITMAP)(hbm)))

// printscan\publish\compstui.h
#define MAKE_DMPUB_HIDEBIT(DMPub)   (DWORD)(((DWORD)0x01 << ((DMPub) - 1)))
#define IS_DMPUB_HIDDEN(dw, DMPub)  (BOOL)((DWORD)(dw) &                    \
                                           MAKE_DMPUB_HIDEBIT(DMPub))

// printscan\ui\compstui\dlgctrl.c
#define EDF_STATIC_MASK         (EDF_MINUS_OK | EDF_IN_TVPAGE)
#define IS_TVDLG    (InitFlags & INITCF_TVDLG)
#define SHOWCTRL(hCtrl, Enable, swMode)                                     \
{                                                                           \
    EnableWindow(hCtrl, (Enable) && (InitFlags & INITCF_ENABLE));           \
    ShowWindow(hCtrl, (swMode));                                            \
}

#define REAL_ECB_CHECKED(pItem, pECB)                                       \
    (BOOL)(((pECB) = (pItem)->pExtChkBox)               &&                  \
           (((pItem)->Flags & (OPTIF_EXT_HIDE | OPTIF_EXT_IS_EXTPUSH |      \
                                OPTIF_ECB_CHECKED)) == OPTIF_ECB_CHECKED))
#define INIT_EXTENDED(pTVWnd,hDlg,pItem,ecbID,epID,IconID,Idx,InitFlags)    \
    ((pItem->Flags & OPTIF_EXT_IS_EXTPUSH) ?                                \
        InitExtPush(pTVWnd,hDlg,pItem,ecbID,epID,IconID,Idx,InitFlags) :    \
        InitExtChkBox(pTVWnd,hDlg,pItem,ecbID,epID,IconID,Idx,InitFlags))

                                GSBuf.chPreAdd = L'\0';GSBuf.Flags=         \
                                (_OI_EXTFLAGS(p) & OIEXTF_ANSI_STRING) ?    \
                                GBF_ANSI_CALL : 0;GSBUF_PBUF=(LPWSTR)(b);   \
